Joshua14:10 Añave, yandeYa omee aiko vaerä, jae jei rami, kuae cuarenta y cinco año ma oasa yandeYa imiari kuae ñee reta Moisés pe güire, Israel iñemuña reta oguatase yave ñuu rupi, jare añave anoi ma ochenta y cinco año." 
Joshua14:11 Ërei añave chetäta vɨteriño, Moisés chembou ɨvɨ re amae yave rami, jókuae ara rupi chepɨ̈rata rami, jökorai vɨteri chepuere ñeraro pe." 
Joshua14:12 Jayave emee cheve jókuae ɨvɨtɨ guasu yandeYa imiari jese vae. Nde reikuaa jókuae ara rupi Anac iñemuña reta yogüɨreko joko pe vae, jare oime tëta guasu reta tuicha yae vae jare oñekëse kavi yae vae. Ërei aäro yandeYa oï vaerä che ndive, anoe vaerä amombo reta joko güi, yandeYa jei rami.”" 
Joshua14:13 Jayave Josué jei ñee kavi Caleb, Jefone taɨ kotɨ jare omee chupe Hebrón, jae imbaerä jare iñemuña reta peguarä." 
Joshua14:14 Jökorai Hebrón opɨta Caleb, Jefone taɨ imbaerä añave regua, yandeYa, Israel iñemuña reta iTumpa kotɨño oyeko jeko pegua." 
Joshua14:15 Hebrón jee tenondegua jae ko Quiriat-arba; echa Arba jae ko jërakua yae vae, Anac kuimbae puku yae vae iñemuña pegua. Jare ɨvɨ oputuu ñeraro güi." 
Joshua15:1 Judá iñemuña reta omboresive ɨvɨ suerte rupi, jëtara ñavo rupi vae, ojo oväe Edom jembeɨ pe, jare arayevɨ kotɨ güɨnoi jembeɨrä ñuu Zin," 
Joshua15:2 arayevɨ kotɨ jembeɨ oï vae jae ko ɨguasu Jembochɨ vae jembeɨ güive, ɨguasu oyemboɨpɨ arayevɨ kotɨgua vae güive," 
Joshua15:3 jare oë arayevɨ kotɨ Acrabim ikúa rupi, oasa ojo Zin kotɨ, jare oyeupi ye arayevɨ kotɨ güi Cades-barnea kotɨ, oasa Hezrón rupi, jare oyeupi Adar kotɨ rupi oyere Carca kotɨ," 
Joshua15:4 joko güi oasa Asmón kotɨ jare oë ɨ̈aka Egipto pegua rupi, jare iyapɨ ɨguasu pe. Kuae ko jae ɨvɨ jembeɨ arayevɨ kotɨ rupi." 
Joshua15:5 Ɨvɨ jembeɨ kuaraɨ oëa kotɨgua jae ko Ɨguasu Jembochɨ vae, jare jembeɨ ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨgua oyemboɨpɨ Ɨguasu Jembochɨ vae pe ɨ̈aka Jordán ou oyeaa pe," 
Joshua15:6 jare oyeupi Bet-hogla rupi, oasa Bet-arabá güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, kuae güi oyeupi Rubén taɨ Bohán iyeita oïa kotɨ;" 
Joshua15:7 javoi oyeupi ɨvɨtɨ päu Acor güi Debir kotɨ, jare ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ Gilgal kotɨ, Adumín ikúa jóvai oï vae, ɨ̈aka raɨ güi arayevɨ kotɨ oï vae; joko güi oasa ye ɨesaɨ En-semes rupi, jare oë ɨesaɨ Rogel rupi;" 
Joshua15:8 jare oyeupi ɨvɨtɨ päu Hinom rupi Jebús güi arayevɨ kotɨ, jae ko Jerusalén. Javoi oyeupi ɨvɨtɨ iyapɨte rupi, ɨvɨtɨ päu Hinom jóvai, kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ oï vae rupi, kuae oï ɨvɨtɨ päu Refaim güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ," 
Joshua15:9 jare oyere ɨvɨtɨ iyapɨte güive ɨesaɨ Neftoa kotɨ, jare oë ojo ɨvɨtɨ Efrón pe tëta guasu reta ñogüɨnoia pe, joko güi oyere Baala kotɨ, jae ko Quiriat-jearim." 
Joshua15:10 Baala güi ɨvɨ jembeɨ oyere kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, ɨvɨtɨ Seir kotɨ, jare oasa ɨvɨtɨ Jearim iyɨ́vɨri rupi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, jae ko Quesalón, jare ogüeyɨ Bet-semes kotɨ, jare oasa Timna kotɨ," 
Joshua15:11 javoi oë ɨvɨtɨ ikúa rupi, Ecrón güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, jare oyere Sicrón kotɨ, jare oasa ɨvɨtɨ Baala rupi, jare oë Jabneel rupi ojo iyapɨ ɨguasu pe." 
Joshua15:12 Ɨvɨ iyapɨ kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ jae ko Ɨguasu Mediterráneo jee vae. Kuae ko jae Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ, omboyao reta iyeupe jëtara ñavo ñavo rupi vae." 
Joshua15:13 Josué omee Caleb, Jefone taɨ pe Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe. YandeYa oyókuai rami omee chupe tëta guasu Arba jae ko Hebrón. Arba jae ko Anac tu." 
Joshua15:14 Caleb güɨnoe omombo joko güi mboapɨ Anac iñemuña reta: Sesai, Ahimán jare Talmai." 
Joshua15:15 Joko güi oporepeña Debir pe yogüɨreko vae reta re; Debir tenonde yave jee yepi Quiriat-sefer," 
Joshua15:16 jare Caleb jei: “Quiriat-sefer re oporepeña jare opɨ̈ro vae pe, ameeta jembirekorä cherayɨ Acsa.”" 
Joshua15:17 Jare jiɨ Otoniel, Cenaz taɨ, opɨ̈ro jókuae tëta guasu, jare Caleb omee tayɨ Acsa jiɨ jembirekorä." 
Joshua15:18 Opata ma yogüɨraja jo kotɨ yave, Otoniel jei Acsa pe oiporu vaerä tu pe ɨvɨ, oparavɨkɨ vaerä pɨpe. Jayave Acsa ogüeyɨ mburika güi, jare Caleb oparandu chupe: —¿Mbae pa reipota?" 
Joshua15:19 Acsa jei: —Aipota reyapo ikavi vae cheve. Mase, ko remee ma cheve ɨvɨ ñuu Neguev pe, emee vi cheve ɨesaɨ reta. Jare jae omee chupe ɨesaɨ reta ɨvate kotɨgua jare ɨvɨpe rupigua." 
Joshua15:20 Kuae reta ko jae Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, omboyao iyeupe reta jëtara ñavo rupi vae." 
Joshua15:21 Tëta guasu reta Judá iñemuña reta imbaerä opɨta arayevɨ kotɨ vae, Edom jembeɨ kotɨ vae, jae ko: Cabseel, Edar, Jagur," 
Joshua15:22 Cina, Dimona, Adada," 
Joshua15:23 Cedes, Hazor, Itnán," 
Joshua15:24 Zif, Telem, Bealot," 
Joshua15:25 Hazor-hadata, Queriot, Hezrón (ïru jee ko Hazor)," 
Joshua15:26 Amam, Sema, Molada," 
Joshua15:27 Hazar-gada, Hesmón, Bet-pelet," 
Joshua15:28 Hazar-sual, Beerseba, Bizotia," 
Joshua15:29 Baala, Iim, Esem," 
Joshua15:30 Eltolad, Quesil, Horma," 
Joshua15:31 Siclag, Madmana, Sansana," 
Joshua15:32 Lebaot, Silhim, Aín jare Rimón; opaete reve veintinueve tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:33 Ɨvɨpe kavi rupi tëta guasu ñogüɨnoi vae jae: Estaol, Zora, Asena," 
Joshua15:34 Zanoa, En-ganim, Tapúa, Enam," 
Joshua15:35 Jarmut, Adulam, Soco, Azeca," 
Joshua15:36 Saaraim, Aditaim, Gedera jare Gederotaim; catorce tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:37 Tëta guasu reta Zenán, Hadasa, Migdal-gad," 
Joshua15:38 Dileán, Mizpa, Jocteel," 
Joshua15:39 Laquis, Boscat, Eglón," 
Joshua15:40 Cabón, Lahmam, Quitlis," 
Joshua15:41 Gederot, Bet-dagón, Naama jare Maceda; diecisei tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:42 Tëta guasu reta Libna, Eter, Asán," 
Joshua15:43 Jifta, Asena, Nezib," 
Joshua15:44 Keila, Aczib jare Maresa; chau tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:45 Tëta guasu Ecrón, tëta reta ndive jare tëta raɨ reta ndive," 
Joshua15:46 jare Ecrón güi ɨguasu kotɨ, opaete köi ñogüɨnoi Asdod güi vae reta tëta raɨ raɨ ndive." 
Joshua15:47 Tëta guasu Asdod, tëta reta ndive jare tëta raɨ raɨ ndive, jare tëta guasu Gaza, tëta reta ndive jare tëta raɨ raɨ ndive, ɨ̈aka Egipto kotɨ ojo oväe regua, jare Ɨguasu Mediterráneo jee vae jembeɨ." 
Joshua15:48 Jare ɨvɨtɨ guasu reta rupi tëta guasu reta ñogüɨnoi vae jae: Samir, Jatir, Soco," 
Joshua15:49 Dana, Quiriat-sana (ïru jee ko Debir)," 
Joshua15:50 Anab, Estemoa, Anim," 
Joshua15:51 Gosén, Holón jare Gilo; once tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:52 Tëta guasu reta: Arab, Duma, Esán," 
Joshua15:53 Janum, Bet-tapúa, Afeca," 
Joshua15:54 Humta, Quiriat-arba (ïru jee ko Hebrón) jare Sior; chau tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:55 Tëta guasu reta: Maón, Carmel, Zif, Juta," 
Joshua15:56 Jezreel, Jocdeam, Zanoa," 
Joshua15:57 Caín, Gabaa jare Timna; payandepo tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:58 Tëta guasu reta: Halhul, Bet-sur, Gedor," 
Joshua15:59 Maarat, Bet-anot jare Eltecón; ova tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:60 Tëta guasu reta Quiriat-baal (ïru jee ko Quiriat-jearim) jare Rabá; mókoi tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ. 
Joshua15:61 Ñuu rupi tëta guasu ñogüɨnoi vae jae: Bet-arabá, Midín, Secaca," 
Joshua15:62 Nibsán, Tëta guasu Yukɨ renda jare En-gadi; ova tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua15:63 Judá iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere güɨnoe omombo Jerusalén güi jebuseo reta, jáeramo jebuseo reta yogüɨreko añave rupi Jerusalén pe Judá iñemuña reta ipɨte pe." 
Joshua16:1 José iñemuña reta omboresive ɨvɨ suerte rupi vae oyemboɨpɨ kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ güi ɨ̈aka Jordán güive, ɨesaɨ Jericó pegua re katu, joko güi ñuu rupi, ɨvɨtɨ guasu ojoi oväe Jericó güi Bet-el kotɨ vae rupi." 
Joshua16:2 Jare Bet-el güi oë Luz kotɨ jare oasa sɨmbi arquita reta iɨvɨ rupi Atarot kotɨ; 
Joshua16:3 joko güi ogüeyɨ kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ jafletita reta iɨvɨ kotɨ, Bet-horón jembeɨ ɨvɨpe pegua kotɨ, jare Gezer kotɨ oë ojo ɨguasu pe." 
Joshua16:4 Körai Manasés jare Efraín iñemuña reta, José iñemuña reta omboresive ɨ́vɨ." 
Joshua16:5 Efraín iñemuña reta jëtara ñavo rupi omboresive ɨvɨ vae oyemboɨpɨ kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, Atarot-adar güive Bet-horón ɨvategua kotɨ." 
Joshua16:6 Joko güi oasa ɨguasu kotɨ, jare Micmetat kotɨ ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, jare oasa kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ Taanat-silo kotɨ jare jókuae güi oasa Janoa kotɨ." 
Joshua16:7 Janoa güi ogüeyɨ Atarot jare Naarat kotɨ, jare ojo oya Jericó re, javoi oë ɨ̈aka Jordán kotɨ." 
Joshua16:8 Jare Tapúa güi ombosɨmbi ɨguasu kotɨ, ɨ̈aka raɨ Caná kotɨ, jare oë ojo ɨguasu pe. Kuae ko jae Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ omboyao iyeupe reta jëtara ñavo rupi vae." 
Joshua16:9 Oime vi tëta guasu reta jare tëta raɨ reta oñemee reta iɨvɨ pe. 
Joshua16:10 Ërei Efraín iñemuña reta mbaetɨ güɨnoe omombo Gezer güi cananeo reta; jökorai cananeo reta yogüɨreko Efraín iñemuña reta ipɨte pe, jare ombaemboepɨ yogüɨreko. Añave rupi cananeo reta oime yogüɨreko joko pe." 
Joshua17:1 Kuae ɨvɨ ko jae Manasés iñemuña reta omboresive suerte rupi vae; Manasés jae ko José taɨrɨpɨ. Maquir jae ko Manasés taɨrɨpɨ, jae ko Galaad tu. Maquir ko kuimbae ñeraro regua, omboresive iɨvɨrä Galaad jare Basán ɨ̈aka Jordán güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ." 
Joshua17:2 Oyeapo vi suerte ɨvɨ oyemboyao vaerä ïru Manasés iñemuña reta peguarä, jëtara ñavo rupi: Abiezer taɨ reta, Helec taɨ reta, Asriel taɨ reta, Siquem taɨ reta, Hefer taɨ reta jare Semida taɨ reta; jae ko kuae Manasés taɨ reta, José jɨmɨmino reta." 
Joshua17:3 Ërei Zelofehad, Hefer taɨ Galaad jɨmɨmino, Maquir taɨ Manasés jɨmɨmino mbaetɨ taɨ, jaeño oime pandepo tayɨ, jae ko Maala, Noa, Hogla, Milca jare Tirsa." 
Joshua17:4 Kuae reta yogüeru sacerdote Eleazar jare Josué, Nun taɨ jóvai jare mburuvicha reta jóvai, jei reta: “YandeYa oyókuai Moisés omee vaerä oreve ɨvɨ orerëtara reta pe oñemee rami.” Jayave Josué omee chupe reta ɨvɨ, tu jëtara reta pe oñemee rami, yandeYa jei chupe rami." 
Joshua17:5 Körai Manasés iñemuña reta omboresive ɨvɨ payandepo yemboyao, oyepapambae reve ɨvɨ Galaad jare Basán, ɨ̈aka Jordán jovaicho kotɨ ñogüɨnoi vae," 
Joshua17:6 echa Manasés tayɨ reta pe oñemee vi ɨvɨ, jaɨe reta pe oñemee rami; jare ɨvɨ Galaad opɨta ïru Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe peguarä." 
Joshua17:7 Manasés iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ oyemboɨpɨ Aser güive Micmetat kotɨ, Siquem jóvai oï vae kotɨ, jare ojo arayevɨ kotɨ, Tapúa pe yogüɨreko vae reta kotɨ rupi." 
Joshua17:8 Ɨvɨ Tapúa jae ko Manasés iñemuña reta imbae, ërei tëta guasu Tapúa, Manasés iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ pe oï vae, jae ko Efraín iñemuña reta imbae." 
Joshua17:9 Kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ ogüeyɨ ɨ̈aka raɨ Caná kotɨ, jókuae ɨ̈aka raɨ güi arayevɨ kotɨ. Kuae tëta guasu reta Efraín iñemuña reta imbae ñogüɨnoi Manasés iñemuña reta iɨvɨ ipäu pe; jare Manasés iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ jae ko ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ ɨ̈aka oïa güi oë ojo ɨguasu pe." 
Joshua17:10 Efraín iñemuña reta opɨta ɨ̈aka raɨ güi arayevɨ kotɨ jare Manasés iñemuña reta opɨta ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ jare Ɨguasu Mediterráneo güɨnoi reta iɨvɨ jembeɨrä jare Aser iñemuña reta iɨvɨ oï ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ jare Isacar iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ. 
Joshua17:11 Manasés iñemuña reta güɨnoi vi tëta guasu reta; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ, Isacar jare Aser iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe jae ko: Bet-seán, Ibleam, Dor, Endor, Taanac jare Meguido, mboapɨ yemboyao ɨvɨ." 
Joshua17:12 Ërei Manasés iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere güɨnoe omombo jókuae tëta guasu pegua reta; jökorai cananeo reta opɨta yogüɨreko jókuae ɨvɨ pe. 
Joshua17:13 Ërei Israel iñemuña reta imbaepuere yae reta ma yave, ombaemboepɨuka cananeo reta pe, ërei mbaetɨ güɨnoe reta omombo." 
Joshua17:14 Jare José iñemuña reta jei Josué pe: —¿Maera pa michi yae ɨvɨ remboyao oreve? Echa ore jeta yae ko roiko, yandeYa iporerekua ko oreré." 
Joshua17:15 Jare Josué jei chupe reta: —Pereta yae ko yave, pekua kaa kotɨ jare peitɨ ɨvɨra reta jókuae ferezeo reta jare refaita reta iɨvɨ pe, Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ michi ko peve yave." 
Joshua17:16 Jare José iñemuña reta jei: —Ngaraa kuae ɨvɨ oreave; jare opaete cananeo reta ɨvɨpe kavi rupi yogüɨreko vae reta güɨnoi käretou jiero pegua, Bet-seán jare tëta raɨ reta rupi yogüɨreko vae jare ɨvɨtɨ päu Jezreel rupi yogüɨreko vae." 
Joshua17:17 Jayave Josué jei José iñemuña reta pe, jae ko Efraín jare Manasés iñemuña reta: —Pereta yae ko, jare pembaepuere yae; ngaraa michi ɨvɨ penoi," 
Joshua17:18 jókuae ɨvɨ pembaerä ko; yepe tëi ɨvɨra katuai, pe opata peitɨ jare pepɨ̈rota pembaerä opaetei; echa opata pemoë pemombo cananeo reta, yepe tëi käretou jiero pegua güɨnoi reta ani imbaepuere yae reta tëi reve." 
Joshua18:1 Opaete Israel iñemuña reta oyomboatɨ Silo pe, jare joko pe omopüa reta o guakapi pegua opɨ̈ro güire ɨvɨ," 
Joshua18:2 ërei Israel iñemuña reta güi chiu ñemuña vɨteri oata güɨnoi vaerä ɨvɨ. 
Joshua18:3 Jayave Josué jei Israel iñemuña reta pe: “¿Mbae pa peäro peo vaerä pepɨ̈ro jókuae ɨvɨ, yandeYa peñemuñagüe reta iTumpa omee peve vae?" 
Joshua18:4 Peiparavo mboapɨ kuimbae ñemuña ñavo güi, che amondo vaerä omae reta opaete ɨvɨ re, ipuere vaerä oyemboyao ɨvɨ jae reta yogüeru imiari jese rami." 
Joshua18:5 Jare jókuae kuimbae reta tomboyao ɨvɨ chiu yemboyao pe, jare Judá iñemuña reta topɨta iɨvɨ pe ae, arayevɨ kotɨ, jare José iñemuña reta topɨta iɨvɨ pe ae, ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ." 
Joshua18:6 Pe reta peikuatía peru jókuae ɨvɨ iä chiu yemboyao pe, jare peru cheve, jare che ayapota suerte kuae pe yandeYa Tumpa jóvai." 
Joshua18:7 Ërei Leví iñemuña reta pe mbaetɨta ɨvɨ oyemboyao pepɨte pe, echa jae reta ko yogüɨrekota sacerdoterä yandeYa pe. Gad jare Rubén iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe oime ma güɨnoi reta iɨvɨ, ɨ̈aka Jordán jovaicho kotɨ kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, Moisés yandeYa jembiokuai omee chupe reta vae.”" 
Joshua18:8 Jayave jókuae kuimbae reta ɨvɨ iä oikuatiata vae opüa yogüɨraja yave, Josué jei chupe reta: “Pekua opaete ɨvɨ rupi jare pemboyao, jare peyerova ye opa peyapo yave, che ayapo vaerä suerte kuae Silo pe, yandeYa jóvai.”" 
Joshua18:9 Jayave jókuae kuimbae reta opa yogüɨraja jare oguata reta opaete ɨvɨ rupi, omboyao reta tëta guasu reta chiu yemboyao pe, jare oikuatía reta güeru iä. Javoi yogüeru ye Josué oïa pe, teyupa pe, Silo pe." 
Joshua18:10 Jayave Josué omboyao ɨvɨ suerte rupi yandeYa jóvai Silo pe, jökorai omboyao ɨvɨ Israel iñemuña reta imbaerä." 
Joshua18:11 Ɨvɨ oyembosuerte Benjamín iñemuña reta imbaerä jëtara ñavo rupi yave, oë chupe Judá jare José iñemuña reta iɨvɨ ipäu pe." 
Joshua18:12 Kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ oyemboɨpɨ ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ güi, ɨ̈aka Jordán güive, jare oyeupi Jericó güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ rupi; joko güi oyeupi ɨvɨtɨ guasu re, kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ jare oë ojo ñuu Bet-avén pegua pe." 
Joshua18:13 Joko güi oasa Luz kotɨ arayevɨ kotɨ rupi (jae ko Bet-el), jare Atarot-adar güi ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ guasu oï Bet-horón ɨvɨpe pegua güi arayevɨ kotɨ vae re;" 
Joshua18:14 joko güi ombosɨmbi kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, Bet-horón jenonde ɨvɨtɨ guasu oï vae güi arayevɨ kotɨ rupi; jare ojo oë Quiriat-baal pe (jae ko Quiriat-jearim), Judá iñemuña reta jëta guasu. Kuae ko jae ɨvɨ jembeɨ kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ rupi." 
Joshua18:15 Arayevɨ kotɨgua ɨvɨ jembeɨ oyemboɨpɨ Quiriat-jearim jembeɨ güive, oë ojo kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, ɨesaɨ Neftoa pe," 
Joshua18:16 javoi kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ päu Hinom jóvai ɨvɨtɨ guasu oï vae iyapɨ kotɨ, ɨvɨtɨ päu Refaim güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ. Joko güi ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ päu Hinom kotɨ, jebuseo reta güi arayevɨ kotɨ rupi Jebús ikúa rupi arayevɨ kotɨ jare joko güi ogüeyɨ ɨesaɨ Rogel pe." 
Joshua18:17 Javoi ombosɨmbi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ jare oë ojo En-semes pe, joko güi oasa Gelilot kotɨ, ɨvɨtɨ ikúa Adumín jee vae jóvai oï vae kotɨ, jare ogüeyɨ Bohán, Rubén taɨ iyeita oïa kotɨ;" 
Joshua18:18 javoi oasa Arabá jóvai rupi, jare ogüeyɨ jókuae Arabá pe," 
Joshua18:19 jare oasa Bet-hogla güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ rupi jare ojo iyapɨ Ɨguasu Jembochɨ vae pe, ɨguasu ipɨmiía pe, ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ oï vae pe, ɨ̈aka Jordán ou oyeaa pe, arayevɨ kotɨ. Kuae ko jae ɨvɨ jembeɨ arayevɨ kotɨ." 
Joshua18:20 Jare ɨ̈aka Jordán jae ko oï ɨvɨ jembeɨrä kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ. Kuae jae ko Benjamín iñemuña reta jëtara ñavo rupi iɨvɨ jembeɨ. 
Joshua18:21 Tëta guasu reta, Benjamín iñemuña reta jëtara ñavo pe oyemboyao vae jae ko: Jericó, Bet-hogla, ɨvɨtɨ päu Casis," 
Joshua18:22 Bet-arabá, Zemaraim, Bet-el," 
Joshua18:23 Avim, Pará, Ofra," 
Joshua18:24 Quefar-haamoni, Ofni jare Geba; doce tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua18:25 Ïru tëta guasu reta jae ko: Gabaón, Ramá, Beerot," 
Joshua18:26 Mizpa, Cafira, Mozah," 
Joshua18:27 Requem, Irpeel, Tarala," 
Joshua18:28 Zela, Elef, Jebús (jae ko Jerusalén), Gabaa jare Quiriat; catorce tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ. Kuae ko jae Benjamín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jëtara ñavo rupi." 
Joshua19:1 Ɨvɨ o yemboyao vaerä oyeapo mokoía ma suerte vae oë Simeón iñemuña reta imbaerä jëtara ñavo rupi. Kuae ɨvɨ opɨta Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe. 
Joshua19:2 Jare tëta guasu reta Simeón iñemuña reta imbaerä vae jae ko: Beerseba, Seba, Molada," 
Joshua19:3 Hazar-sual, Bala, Ezem," 
Joshua19:4 Eltolad, Betul, Horma," 
Joshua19:5 Siclag, Bet-marcabot, Hazar-susa," 
Joshua19:6 Bet-lebaot jare Saruhén; trece tëta guasu reta; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ. 
Joshua19:7 Jare ïru tëta guasu reta jae ko: Aín, Rimón, Eter jare Asán; irundɨ tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:8 Jare opaete tëta raɨ raɨ, kuae tëta guasu reta iyɨ́vɨri ñogüɨnoi vae, Baalat-beer kotɨ oväe regua, jae ko Ramat Neguev pegua. Kuae jae ko Simeón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, jëtara ñavo rupi." 
Joshua19:9 Simeón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ opɨta Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe, echa kuae ñemuña reta tuicha yae ete güɨnoi ɨvɨ, jáeramo Simeón iñemuña reta güɨnoi ɨvɨ Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua19:10 Mboapɨa ɨvɨ oyembosuerte vae oë Zabulón iñemuña reta imbaerä jëtara ñavo rupi. Kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ ojo oväe Sarid pe," 
Joshua19:11 jare oyeupi kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, Marala kotɨ jare oasa Dabeset kotɨ jare joko güi ojo oväe ɨ̈aka raɨ oï Jocneam jóvai vae pe." 
Joshua19:12 Jare Sarid güi oyere kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, Quislot-tabor jembeɨ pe oväe regua, joko güi oë Daberat pe, jare oyeupi Jafía kotɨ." 
Joshua19:13 Joko güi oasa kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, Gat-hefer kotɨ jare oasa Ita-cazín rupi jare ojo oväe Rimón pe, oyere reve Nea rupi." 
Joshua19:14 Ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ ɨvɨ jembeɨ oï vae, oyere Hanatón kotɨ rupi jare ou oë ɨvɨtɨ päu Jefte-el pe;" 
Joshua19:15 kuae ɨvɨ pe oime doce tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ; jókuae reta güi jae ko Catat, Naalal, Simrón, Idala jare Belén." 
Joshua19:16 Kuae jae ko Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, jëtara ñavo rupi; kuae tëta guasu reta; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:17 Irundɨa ɨvɨ oyembosuerte vae oë Isacar iñemuña reta imbaerä, jëtara ñavo rupi." 
Joshua19:18 Jókuae ɨvɨ pegua tëta guasu reta jae: Jezreel, Quesulot, Sunem," 
Joshua19:19 Hafaraim, Sihón, Anaharat," 
Joshua19:20 Rabit, Quisión, Abez," 
Joshua19:21 Remet, En-ganim, En-hada jare Bet-pases." 
Joshua19:22 Jare kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ ojo oväe Tabor, Sahazima jare Bet-semes rupi, jare ojo iyapɨ ɨ̈aka Jordán pe; diecisei tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:23 Kuae jae ko Isacar iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jëtara ñavo rupi; kuae tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ. 
Joshua19:24 Pandepoa ɨvɨ oyembosuerte vae oë Aser iñemuña reta imbaerä, jëtara ñavo rupi," 
Joshua19:25 jare iɨvɨ pegua tëta guasu reta jae: Helcat, Halí, Betén, Acsaf," 
Joshua19:26 Alamelec, Amad jare Miseal; jare ojo oväe ɨvɨtɨ guasu Carmelo pe kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, jare Sihor-libnat kotɨ." 
Joshua19:27 Joko güi ɨvɨ jembeɨ ombosɨmbi Bet-dagón kotɨ, kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ jare ojo oya Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ re, ɨvɨtɨ päu Jefte-el re ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, Bet-emec jare Neiel re, jare oë Cabul kotɨ, ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ," 
Joshua19:28 joko güi oasa Hebrón, Rehob, Hamón jare Caná rupi, ojo oväe tëta guasu Sidón pe regua." 
Joshua19:29 Joko güi kuae ɨvɨ jembeɨ oyere Ramá kotɨ, jare ojo oväe Tiro tëta guasu oñekëse kavi yae vae pe, jare oyere Hosa kotɨ, jare oë ojo Ɨguasu Mediterráneo pe tëta Aczib kotɨ güi." 
Joshua19:30 Jare Uma, Afec, jare Rehob; veintidó tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:31 Kuae jae ko Aser iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, jëtara ñavo rupi; kuae tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:32 Ovaa ɨvɨ oyembosuerte vae oë Neftalí iñemuña reta imbaerä, jëtara ñavo rupi." 
Joshua19:33 Jae reta iɨvɨ oyemboɨpɨ Helef, Alón-saananim, Adami-neceb jare Jabneel güive, Lacum kotɨ, jare oë ojo ɨ̈aka Jordán pe." 
Joshua19:34 Jare ɨvɨ jembeɨ oyere kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ Aznot-tabor rupi, joko güi oasa Hucoc pe, jare ojo oya Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ re, arayevɨ kotɨ, jare kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ oya oyoe Aser iñemuña reta iɨvɨ ndive, jare ɨ̈aka Jordán rupi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ." 
Joshua19:35 Jare tëta guasu reta oñekëse kavi vae jae: Sidim, Zer, Hamat, Racat, Cineret," 
Joshua19:36 Adama, Ramá, Hazor," 
Joshua19:37 Cedes, Edrei, En-hazor," 
Joshua19:38 Irón, Migdal-el, Horem, Bet-anat jare Bet-semes; diecinueve tëta guasu; tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:39 Kuae jae ko Neftalí iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, jëtara ñavo rupi; kuae tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:40 Chiúa ɨvɨ oyembosuerte vae oë Dan iñemuña reta imbaerä, jëtara ñavo rupi." 
Joshua19:41 Jare kuae ɨvɨ pe ñogüɨnoi tëta guasu: Zora, Estaol, Ir-semes," 
Joshua19:42 Saalabín, Ajalón, Jetla," 
Joshua19:43 Elón, Timnat, Ecrón," 
Joshua19:44 Elteque, Gibetón, Baalat," 
Joshua19:45 Jehúd, Bene-berac, Gat-rimón," 
Joshua19:46 Mejarcón jare Racón, tëta Jope jóvai ɨvɨ oï vae ndive." 
Joshua19:47 Jare Dan iñemuña reta pe oata ɨvɨ, jáeramo oporepeña tëta Lesem re, jare opɨ̈ro reta jókuae tëta guasu opa güire oyuka kɨsepuku pe joko pegua reta. Jökorai opɨta yogüɨreko joko pe; jare Lesem ombojee reta, Dan, jae reta iñemuñagüe jee pe." 
Joshua19:48 Kuae jae ko Dan iñemuña reta iɨvɨ, jëtara ñavo rupi; kuae tëta guasu ñavo güɨnoi tëta raɨ raɨ." 
Joshua19:49 Israel iñemuña reta opa güire omboyao oyoupe ɨvɨ ñemuña ñavo rupi, omee reta vi ɨvɨ Josué, Nun taɨ pe jae reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua19:50 YandeYa oporookuai rami, omee reta Josué pe tëta guasu jae oiporu iyeupe vae, tëta Timnat-sera, ɨvɨtɨ guasu pe, Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe. Jare Josué omopüa pɨau ye jókuae tëta guasu jare oiko joko pe." 
Joshua19:51 Opaete kuae ɨvɨ jae ko sacerdote Eleazar, Josué, Nun taɨ jare Israel iñemuña juvicha reta omboyao suerte rupi Israel iñemuña reta pe vae, o yemboatɨ renda jöke pe yandeYa jóvai Silo pe. Jökorai opa omboyao reta ɨvɨ." 
Joshua20:1 YandeYa jei Josué pe: 
Joshua20:2 “Emomiari Israel iñemuña reta, ere chupe reta: Peiparavo tëta guasu reta ñepɨ̈rokarä, Moisés rupi poyókuai rami." 
Joshua20:3 Kia nunga vae oyuka yave japicha oyemongetambae reve, ipuere otekuarai jokotɨ oñepɨ̈ro vaerä jókuae omano vae jëtara ipo güi." 
Joshua20:4 Jare ojo yave oñepɨ̈ro vaerä jókuae tëta guasu pe, tojo jókuae tëta guasu jöke pe, jare timiari oyapogüe re jókuae tëta guasu pegua tenondegua reta pe. Jayave jae reta tomaeño toike jare tomee reta chupe oiko vaerä joko pe." 
Joshua20:5 Ërei omano vae jëtaragüe oaɨkuemoña yave, jókuae tenondegua reta agüɨye tomee chupe jókuae oporoyuka vae, echa oyemongetambae reve oyuka japicha, mbaetɨ oñomotareɨ jae ndive tenonde yave rupi." 
Joshua20:6 Jare topɨta jókuae tëta guasu pe oñejäauka regua opaete vae jóvai, jare omano regua jókuae año rupi oiko sacerdote tenondeguarä vae. Jayave jókuae oporoyuka vae ipuere oyerova ye jëta guasu kotɨ jare jo pe, jókuae tëta guasu güi jae otekuarai ojoa pe.”" 
Joshua20:7 Jayave oiparavo reta tëta guasu Cedes, Galilea pe, Neftalí iñemuña reta iɨvɨtɨ guasu re, tëta guasu Siquem, Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨtɨ guasu re jare tëta guasu Quiriat-arba (jae ko Hebrón) Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨtɨ re." 
Joshua20:8 Jare Jordán jovaicho kotɨ Jericó güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, oiparavo reta tëta guasu Beser, ñuu pe, Rubén iñemuña reta iɨvɨ ipe kavi vae pe; Galaad pe oiparavo reta tëta guasu Ramot, Gad iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe, jare Basán pe oiparavo reta tëta guasu Golán, Manasés iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua20:9 Kuae ko jae tëta guasu reta oyeparavo opaete Israel iñemuña reta peguarä vae, jare ketɨgua reta yogüɨreko jae reta ipɨte pe vae peguarä, oñepɨ̈ro vaerä joko pe, kia nunga vae oyuka yave japicha oyemongetambae reve, agüɨye vaerä omano jókuae oyuka vae jëtaragüe ipo pe, ndei opaete vae ojäa mbove." 
Joshua21:1 Leví iñemuña juvicha reta yogüeru omomiari vaerä jëtara sacerdote Eleazar, Josué, Nun taɨ jare Israel iñemuña juvicha reta Silo pe ɨvɨ Canaán pe; jei reta körai: “Moisés rupi, yandeYa oporookuai oñemee vaerä oreve tëta guasu reta, roiko vaerä pɨpe, orerɨmba reta ikaruarä vae ndive.”" 
Joshua21:2  
Joshua21:3 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta omee iɨvɨ pegua tëta guasu reta mɨmba ikarúa ndive ndive Leví iñemuña reta imbaerä, yandeYa oporookuai rami." 
Joshua21:4 Leví iñemuña reta pe oñemee tëta guasu yave, oë suerte rupi Coat iñemuña reta pe, jae ko Aarón iñemuña pegua reta; oë chupe reta trece tëta guasu, Judá, Simeón jare Benjamɨ́n iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua21:5 Coat iñemuña ïru vae reta pe oë suerte rupi payandepo tëta guasu, Dan, Efraín jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua21:6 Gersón iñemuña reta pe oë suerte rupi trece tëta guasu, Isacar, Aser, Neftalí jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe iɨvɨ pe, Basán pe." 
Joshua21:7 Merari iñemuña reta, jëtara ñavo peguarä oë doce tëta guasu, Rubén, Gad jare Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua21:8 Israel iñemuña reta omee suerte rupi Leví iñemuña reta pe tëta guasu reta, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive, yandeYa oporookuai Moisés rupi rami." 
Joshua21:9 Judá jare Simeón iñemuña reta omee iɨvɨ pegua tëta guasu reta; 
Joshua21:10 kuae tëta guasu reta opɨta Aarón iñemuña reta pe; Aarón jae ko Coat jɨmɨmino, Leví iñemuña pegua; echa chupe reta räri oë suerte oyeapo yave." 
Joshua21:11 Judá iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pegua ɨvɨtɨ guasu re omee chupe reta tëta Quiriat-arba, jae ko Hebrón, jare iyɨ́vɨri güɨnoi mɨmba ikaruarä, jae ko tëta guasu tuicha yae vae, Anac kuimbae puku yae vae iñemuña reta imbaegüe." 
Joshua21:12 Ërei jókuae tëta guasu pegua ko reta jare tëta raɨ reta omee reta Caleb, Jefone taɨ pe." 
Joshua21:13 Jare sacerdote Aarón iñemuña reta pe omee reta tëta guasu Hebrón, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive, ñepɨ̈rokarä oporoyuka vae reta pe; omee reta vi tëta guasu reta: Libna," 
Joshua21:14 Jatir, Estemoa," 
Joshua21:15 Holón, Debir," 
Joshua21:16 Aín, Juta jare Bet-semes. Kuae chau tëta guasu reta mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:17 Jare Benjamín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta: Gabaón, Geba," 
Joshua21:18 Anatot jare Almón; irundɨ tëta guasu, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:19 Opaete tëta guasu sacerdote Aarón iñemuña reta imbaerä opɨta vae jae ko trece tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive. 
Joshua21:20 Coat, Leví taɨ iñemuña reta oataño vɨteri vae pe oñemee suerte rupi tëta guasu reta Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua21:21 Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨtɨ pe oñemee chupe reta tëta guasu Siquem mɨmba ikaruarä ndive, ñepɨ̈rokarä oporoyuka vae reta pe; oñemee vi chupe reta tëta guasu reta: Gezer," 
Joshua21:22 Kibsaim jare Bet-horón; irundɨ tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive. 
Joshua21:23 Dan iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta: Tëta Elteque, Gibetón," 
Joshua21:24 Ajalón jare Gat-rimón; irundɨ tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive. 
Joshua21:25 Jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe iɨvɨ pe oñemee mókoi tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive, jae ko Taanac jare Gat-rimón." 
Joshua21:26 Opaete tëta guasu Coat iñemuña reta oataño vae reta imbaerä opɨta vae, jae ko payandepo tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:27 Jare Gersón, Leví taɨ iñemuña reta pe oñemee Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe iɨvɨ pe mókoi tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive; tëta guasu Golán ñepɨ̈rokarä oporoyuka vae reta pe, Basán pe oï vae; oñemee vi chupe reta tëta guasu reta: Beestera," 
Joshua21:28 jare Isacar iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta Cisón, Daberat," 
Joshua21:29 Jarmut jare En-ganim; irundɨ tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive. 
Joshua21:30 Aser iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta: Tëta Miseal, Abdón," 
Joshua21:31 Helcat jare Rehob; irundɨ tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive. 
Joshua21:32 Neftalí iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta mboapɨ tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive: Tëta guasu Cedes, Galilea pe oï vae, ñepɨ̈rokarä oporoyuka vae reta pe; omee reta vi Hamot-dor jare Cartán." 
Joshua21:33 Opaete tëta guasu reta, Gersón iñemuña reta jëtara ñavo rupi imbaerä opɨta vae jae ko trece tëta guasu mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:34 Merari, Leví taɨ iñemuña reta pe mbaetɨño tëta guasu oñemee vae pe, omee reta Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe: Tëta Jocneam, tëta Carta," 
Joshua21:35 Dimna jare Naalal; irundɨ tëta guasu, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:36 Rubén iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta: Tëta Beser, Jahaza," 
Joshua21:37 Cademot jare Mefaat; irundɨ tëta guasu, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:38 Gad iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oñemee chupe reta tëta Ramot, Galaad pe oï vae, ñepɨ̈rokarä oporoyuka vae reta pe; omee reta vi tëta Mahanaim," 
Joshua21:39 Hesbón jare Jazer; irundɨ tëta guasu, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:40 Opaete tëta guasu reta Merari iñemuña reta, jëtara ñavo rupi imbaerä opɨta suerte rupi vae jae ko doce tëta guasu." 
Joshua21:41 Opaete tëta guasu Leví iñemuña reta imbaerä opɨta Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte vae, jae ko cuarenta y ocho tëta guasu, mɨmba ikaruarä ndive ndive." 
Joshua21:42 Jare kuae tëta guasu reta mbaetɨ köi ñogüɨnoi oyougüi, metei ñavo güɨnoi iyɨ́vɨri rupi mɨmba ikaruarä. Jökorai metei ñavo opaete kuae tëta guasu reta." 
Joshua21:43 Körai yandeYa omee Israel iñemuña reta opaete kuae ɨvɨ, jae oñererökuavee jee re ae omee vaerä iñemuñagüe reta pe vae, oike reta opɨ̈ro jare yogüɨreko jókuae ɨvɨ pe." 
Joshua21:44 Jare yandeYa omee yogüɨreko pɨagüive vaerä jókuae ɨvɨ pe, jae oñererökuavee jee re ae Israel iñemuñagüe reta pe rami; jare opaete jovaicho reta güi mbaetɨ metei ave ipuere oñeraro jae reta ndive, echa yandeYa omee jae reta ipo pe opaete jovaicho reta." 
Joshua21:45 Mbaetɨ metei ave ñee oyeapombae, opaete ñee ikavigüe yandeYa jei Israel iñemuña reta pe vae, opaetei oyeapo." 
Joshua22:1 Jayave Josué omboatɨ Rubén jare Gad ñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe," 
Joshua22:2 jare jei chupe reta: “Pe reta peyapo opaete peokuai Moisés yandeYa jembiokuai vae, jare peyapo opaete che poyókuai vae." 
Joshua22:3 Mbaetɨ pemombo perëtara reta kuae ɨma año oasa vae rupi añave regua, jare peyapo jupi rupi kavi yandeYa Tumpa iporookuai reta." 
Joshua22:4 Añave, yandeYa Tumpa omee perëtara reta pe yogüɨreko pɨagüive vaerä, jae güɨrökuavee rami, peyerova ye peteyupa pe, peɨvɨ ae kotɨ, Moisés, yandeYa jembiokuai omee peve ɨ̈aka Jordán jovaicho kotɨ vae pe." 
Joshua22:5 Jaeño aiporu peve peyeandu reve kavi peyapo mborookuai reta Moisés, yandeYa jembiokuai omee peve vae: Peaɨu yandeYa Tumpa, peguata jae jemimbota rupiño; peñovatu iporookuai reta, jaeño peiko jupi rupi chupe jare peyeokuai chupe opaete pepɨa ndive, añete rupi kavi.”" 
Joshua22:6 Javoi Josué jei ñee kavi chupe reta jare opa omondo, jare jae reta opa yogüɨraja iɨvɨ ae kotɨ." 
Joshua22:7 Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe pe Moisés omee vi yepe ɨvɨ, Basán pe. Ïru Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe pe Josué omee ɨvɨ jëtara reta ipɨte pe, ɨ̈aka Jordán güi kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ; jökorai Josué omondo ye kuae ñemuña reta iɨvɨ ae kotɨ, opa ñee kavi jei chupe reta güire." 
Joshua22:8 Jei chupe reta: “Peyerova ye peɨvɨ ae kotɨ jeta mbaeyekou ndive jare jeta mɨmba ndive, oro, korepoti, jiero iyu vae ndive jare jeta temimonde ndive. Pemboyao perëtara reta pe perovaicho reta güi pepɨ̈rogüe.”" 
Joshua22:9 Jökorai Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta, jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe oyerova ye, jökorai osɨrɨ oyougüi ïru ñemuña reta ndive Silo pe Canaán pe oï vae pe, opa vaerä yogüɨraja ɨvɨ oñemee chupea pe Galaad pe, yandeYa oyókuai Moisés omee chupe reta vae pe." 
Joshua22:10 Jare yogüeru oväe ɨ̈aka Jordán jembeɨ pe, ɨvɨ Canaán pe vɨteri yave, Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta, jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe omopüa joko pe mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae tuicha vae, ɨ̈aka Jordán jembeɨ pe." 
Joshua22:11 Ïru Israel iñemuña reta oendu amogüe jei, Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe omopüa mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae, ɨvɨ Canaán jembeɨ pe, ɨ̈aka Jordán jembeɨ pe, jókuae ïru ñemuña reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ pe;" 
Joshua22:12 jare jókuae ɨvɨ pe Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoi vae oendu yave kuae regua, oyomboatɨ opaete vae Silo pe, yogüɨraja vaerä oñeraro jókuae ïru ñemuña reta ndive." 
Joshua22:13 Tenonde omondo reta Finees sacerdote Eleazar taɨ, Galaad kotɨ, Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe ñogüɨnoia kotɨ." 
Joshua22:14 Kuae sacerdote ndive omondo reta vi payandepo Israel iñemuña juvicha reta, yogüɨraja metei ñemuña ñavo jee re, jare jëtara ñavo jee re." 
Joshua22:15 Opaete kuae reta yogüɨraja Galaad kotɨ, Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe ñogüɨnoia pe, jare omomiari reta jei reta reve:" 
Joshua22:16 —Opaete ore roe yandeYa imbae vae reta jee re körai: ¿Maera pa peyapo jupimbae Israel iTumpa kotɨ? ¿Maera pa pepia jare pemopüa mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae, pepɨapochɨ yandeYa kotɨ reve?" 
Joshua22:17 ¿Mbaetɨño pa jaekavi peve ikavimbae peyapo Peor pe vae? Mbaetɨño yayetɨo kavi ye chugüi vae, ¿kuae jeko peguaä pa ko mbaerasɨ pɨ̈chɨi jeta yae oparapi ti yandeYa jembiparavo reta re?" 
Joshua22:18 ¿Jókuae jaekaviño maä pa, pe reta jekuae pesɨrɨ ye vaerä yandeYa güi? Pe reta añave pepɨapochɨ yandeYa kotɨ, pɨareve jae iyarasɨta opaete Israel iñemuña reta kotɨ." 
Joshua22:19 Peɨvɨ re pemae ikɨa vae ko yave, peyu yandeYa iɨvɨ pe, o yemboatɨa yandeYa imbae oïa pe, peyu peiko ore ndive. Ërei agüɨye pepɨapochɨ yandeYa kotɨ jare orekotɨ vi, agüɨye pemopüa peyeupe ïru mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae yandeYa Tumpa imbae güi." 
Joshua22:20 Pemaendúa Acán, Zera taɨ re, iyoa oñeñono tee okañɨtei vaerä vae re opoko yave, kuae jeko pegua ou arasɨ opaete Israel iñemuña reta re. ¡Jókuae kuimbae mbaetɨ jaeño oiporara iyoa re!" 
Joshua22:21 Jayave Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe jei Israel iñemuña juvicha reta pe: 
Joshua22:22 —YandeYa Tumpa, opaete tumpa reta güi imbaepuere vae oikuaa mbaetɨ ko royapo orepɨapochɨ güi vae ani rosɨrɨ vaerä chugüi. Jae oikuaa jare toikuaauka peve opaete; agüɨye tiñɨ̈ro oreve mbaetɨ ko jaekavi royapo yave." 
Joshua22:23 Kuae mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae romopüa oreyeupe vae royapo yave rosɨrɨ vaerä yandeYa güi ani romee vaerä jese mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae, ani mbota temitɨ jäɨgüe romee jese vaerä ani romee vaerä jese mbota mbɨakatu pegua; jökorai ko yave yandeYa etei toikuaa mbae oyapo vaerä oreve." 
Joshua22:24 Kuae royapo ko agüɨye vaerä metei ara peraɨ reta jei oreraɨ reta pe: “¿Mbae pa peeka Israel iTumpa oïa pe? 
Joshua22:25 YandeYa oñono ɨvɨ jembeɨrä ɨ̈aka Jordán, roiko tee vaerä pegüi, pe Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe; jayave, ¿mbae pa peeka Tumpa oïa pe?” Jökorai peraɨ reta oeyaukata oreraɨ reta pe mboromboete yandeYa kotɨ." 
Joshua22:26 Jáeramo royemongeta romopüa vaerä metei mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae, mbaetɨ mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae romee jese vaerä ani mɨmba oyeyukagüe romee jese vaerä." 
Joshua22:27 Jae ko yandemomaendúa vaerä jare ñaneñemuña reta peguarä, kërai ore orepuere romboete yandeYa, mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ ndive, jare mɨmba oyeyukagüe mbɨakatu pegua ndive; agüɨye vaerä kuri peraɨ reta jei oreraɨ reta pe: “¿Mbae pa peeka Tumpa oïa pe?”" 
Joshua22:28 Echa ore royemongeta kia nunga vae jei yave oreve ani oreñemuña reta pe jei yave, orepuere roe chupe reta: “¡Mase! Ñaneñemuñagüe reta omopüa kuae mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae iä yandeYa imbae rami vae, mbaetɨ ko omopüa reta mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ jese vaerä, ani mɨmba oyeyukagüe oñemee jese vaerä, omopüa reta ko oime vaerä yemomaendúa peve jare oreve.”" 
Joshua22:29 YandeYa agüɨye tomaeño orepɨapochɨ vaerä ikotɨ ani rosɨrɨ vaerä chugüi, royapo yave mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae, romee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae, mbota temitɨ iagüe romee jese vaerä ani mbota oyeyukagüe romee vaerä jese, romopüa yave ïru mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae yandeYa imbae o yemboatɨa jóvai oï vae güi." 
Joshua22:30 Sacerdote Finees jare opaete vae juvicha reta jare Israel iñemuña itenondegua reta jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta oendu yave, Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta, jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe jei vae, ikavi yae chupe reta opaete jókuae jei reta vae." 
Joshua22:31 Jayave Finees sacerdote Eleazar taɨ jei chupe reta: —Añave yaikuaa kavi ma yandeYa oï yande ndive vae, echa kuae peyapo vae mbaetɨ peyapo pepɨapochɨ yandeYa kotɨ jeko pegua. Jökorai añave orereroasayepe yandeYa iporonupa güi." 
Joshua22:32 Jare Finees sacerdote Eleazar taɨ jare mburuvicha reta oeya Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta jare Manasés iñemuña reta oyemboyaogüe, jare opa ye oyerova ɨvɨ Galaad güi ɨvɨ Canaán pe, ïru ñemuña reta ñogüɨnoia pe. Jare imiari reta joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe, jëtara reta jeigüe." 
Joshua22:33 Ikavi yae kuae yemongeta chupe reta jare omboete reta Tumpa. Jare jókuae güire mbaetɨ ye oyemongeta yogüɨraja vaerä oñeraro Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta ndive, ani omboai vaerä iɨvɨ chugüi reta." 
Joshua22:34 Rubén jare Gad iñemuña reta ombojee jókuae mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae iä Ed, echa jei reta: “Kuae mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae toiko yandeve yandemomaendúa vaerä yandeYa jae ko Tumpa vae.”" 
Joshua23:1 Ɨma ma yandeYa omee yogüɨreko pɨagüive Israel iñemuña reta opaete jovaicho iyɨvɨrigua reta güi yave, jare Josué indechi yae ma yave," 
Joshua23:2 oenɨi opaete Israel iñemuña itenondegua reta, jare mburuvicha reta, oporojäa vae reta, jare opaete ïru mburuvicha reta, jei chupe reta: “Che chendechi yae ma ko." 
Joshua23:3 Jare pe reta peecha opaete kërai yandeYa Tumpa omoamɨri peve opaete kuae tëtaguasu reta vae; echa yandeYa Tumpa ko oñeraro perekovia pe. 
Joshua23:4 Che amboyao ma peñemuña reta peguarä opaete kuae tëtaguasu reta suerte rupi, ɨ̈aka Jordán güive Ɨguasu Mediterráneo jee vae kotɨ, kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ; opaete kuae tëtaguasu reta oñepɨ̈rogüe, jaeramiño vi opaete ndeiño oñepɨ̈ro vae reta." 
Joshua23:5 YandeYa Tumpa oekɨta omombo reta perenonde güi; jare pe reta peiketa penoi vaerä iɨvɨ reta, yandeYa Tumpa jei peve rami." 
Joshua23:6 Peñemoäta ngatu peyapo vaerä opaete Moisés iporookuai reta kuae tupapire pe oyekuatía oï vae, pepiambae reve chugüi ketɨ ave yepe;" 
Joshua23:7 agüɨye vaerä peyea kuae tëtaguasu reta opɨta pepɨte pe vae ndive, agüɨye peenɨi itumpa reta jare agüɨye mbae peiporu jare peyapo itumpa reta jee re, agüɨye peyeokuai chupe, agüɨye ave peyetavatɨka jae reta jóvai." 
Joshua23:8 Ërei yandeYa Tumpa jupieño peguata, peyapo ma peyu peiko rami." 
Joshua23:9 Echa yandeYa oekɨ omombo perenonde güi tëtaguasu tuichagüe reta jare imbaepuere yae vae reta, jare mbaetɨño kia ipuere peré oñeraro pe reta ndive yave añave regua." 
Joshua23:10 Metei kuimbae vaeño pegüi reta ombosɨita mil kuimbae, echa yandeYa Tumpa ko oñeraro perekovia pe, jae jei peve rami." 
Joshua23:11 Peyeandu reve kavi peñeñovatu, peaɨu yandeYa Tumpa." 
Joshua23:12 Echa pesɨrɨ jare peñemoïru kuae tëtaguasu reta, pepɨte pe jembɨregüe reta ndive yave, menda rupi peyea yave jae reta ndive, jare jae reta oyea pe reta ndive yave," 
Joshua23:13 peikuaa voi, yandeYa ngaraa ye ma oekɨ güɨnoe omombo perenonde güi kuae tëtaguasu reta, yogüɨreko retata peve ñuai rami, pepɨ̈sa-yeyuka rami jese reta vaerä, yogüɨreko retata chikote rami peve, yogüɨreko retata peve ñurati rami peresa peguarä, opa regua pekañɨtei kuae ɨvɨ kavi yandeYa Tumpa omee peve vae güi." 
Joshua23:14 Mase, che amanota ma ko; añave, pemaendúa kavi opaete pepɨa ndive jare opaete perekove ndive, kërai mbaetɨ oata metei ave ñee kavi yandeYa Tumpa jei pekotɨ vae; opaete oyembopo peve, mbaetɨ oata metei ave." 
Joshua23:15 Ërei opaete ñee kavi reta yandeYa Tumpa jei peve vae oyembopo rami, jökorai vi yandeYa güeruta peré opaete ñee kavimbae, opa regua pemokañɨtei kuae ɨvɨ kavi jae omee peve vae iárambo güi," 
Joshua23:16 perokomegua yave yandeYa Tumpa iporogüɨrökuavee päve rupi peokuai vae, peo jare pemboete yave tumpa ambuae reta, jare peyetavatɨka yave jae reta jóvai. Jayave yandeYa iyarasɨta pekotɨ, jare ɨmambae pekañɨteita kuae ɨvɨ kavi jae omee peve vae güi.”" 
Joshua24:1 Josué omboatɨ opaete Israel iñemuña reta Siquem pe, oenɨi mburuvicha reta, tenondegua reta, oporojäa vae reta, jare kuimbae ñeraro regua juvicha reta jare oñeñono reta Tumpa jóvai." 
Joshua24:2 Jare Josué jei opaete vae pe: —Körai jei yandeYa, Israel iTumpa: “Arakae ete, peñemuñagüe Taré, Abraham jare Nacor tu, yogüɨrekose ɨ̈aka Éufrates jembeɨ pe; jare omboetese reta yepi tumpa ambuae." 
Joshua24:3 Che ko aru peñemuñagüe Abraham, jókuae ɨ̈aka Éufrates jembeɨ güi jare amboguatauka opaete ɨvɨ Canaán rupi. Jare amee jeta oñemuña vaerä, tenonde amee chupe taɨ Isaac," 
Joshua24:4 jare Isaac pe amee mókoi taɨrä, Jacob jare Esaú. Esaú pe amee ɨvɨtɨ Seir oiko vaerä joko pe, ërei Jacob jare taɨ reta opa yogüɨraja Egipto pe." 
Joshua24:5 Jayave amondo Moisés jare Aarón, jare aiporarauka Egiptoɨgua reta, opa pogüɨnoe joko güi regua." 
Joshua24:6 Peñemuñagüe reta anoe Egipto güi yave, Egiptoɨgua reta oaɨkuemoña Ɨguasu Pɨ̈ta vae kotɨ, ikäretou ñeraro pegua reta pe jare kavayu regua reta ndive." 
Joshua24:7 Jare jae reta oyerure cheve yave, che ambopɨtumimbi jae reta jaɨkue kotɨ, Egiptoɨgua reta jenonde, jare ɨguasu pe opa ayasoi Egiptoɨgua reta. Peñemuñagüe reta oecha Egipto pegua reta pe ayapo vae. Jaɨkue rupi pe reta peiko ɨma año ñuu rupi," 
Joshua24:8 jare che pogüeru amorreo reta iɨvɨ pe, ɨ̈aka Jordán güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ. Jae reta oñeraro pe ndive, ërei che amee pepo pe, che amokañɨtei perenonde jare peyemombae jókuae ɨvɨ re." 
Joshua24:9 Joko güi opüa Balac, Zipor taɨ, Moab iñemuña reta juvicha guasu, jare oñeraro pe reta ndive. Balac omondo oekauka Balaam, Beor taɨ, oyepopeyu vaerä pekotɨ." 
Joshua24:10 Ërei che mbaetɨ amaeño Balaam oyepopeyu vaerä pekotɨ jare jei ñee kavi pekotɨ. Jökorai pogüɨroasayepe jae reta ipo güi. 
Joshua24:11 Jare peasa ɨ̈aka Jordán jare peyu Jericó pe. Jericó pe yogüɨreko vae reta oñeraro pe ndive: Amorreo reta, ferezeo reta, cananeo reta, heteo reta, gergeseo reta, heveo reta jare jebuseo reta, ërei che amee pepo pe opa pemoamɨri vaerä." 
Joshua24:12 Jare mókoi mburuvicha guasu reta, amorreo reta juvicha guasu mbaetɨ pe reta pemoamɨri kɨsepuku pe ani uvɨ pe, echa che ambou kɨɨye yavaetegüe perenonde, jae reta opa vaerä otekuarai pegüi ndei peväe joko pe mbove." 
Joshua24:13 Che amee peve ɨvɨ, pe mbaetɨ peparavɨkɨ pɨpe vae jare tëta guasu reta, pe mbaetɨ pemopüa vae, añave peiko pɨpe vae jare peu uva jare ɨvɨra olivo iagüe, pe mbaetɨ peñotɨ vae.”" 
Joshua24:14 Añave, pemboete yandeYa, peyeokuai chupe jupi rupi jare mboromboete rupi. Pemombo peyeugüi tumpa ambuae reta peñemuñagüe reta oyeokuai chupe ɨ̈aka Eufrates jovaicho kotɨ vae, jare Egipto pe vae, jare peyeokuai yandeYa pe." 
Joshua24:15 Ërei mbaetɨ peipota peyeokuai yandeYa pe yave, peiparavo peyeupe kia pe peyeokuai vaerä; tumpa reta, peñemuñagüe reta oyeokuai ɨ̈aka Éufrates jembeɨ pe yogüɨreko yave vae pe, ani amorreo reta kuae ɨvɨ pe yogüɨreko vae reta itumpa pe. Ërei che jare chero pegua reta ndive royeokuaita yandeYa peño." 
Joshua24:16 Jayave opaete vae jei: —¡Ngaraa romboete ïru tumpa reta yandeYa güi! 
Joshua24:17 Echa yandeYa Tumpa ko orerenoe jare oreñemuñagüe reta ɨvɨ Egipto güi, yeokuaiasɨ katu güi, jeta mɨakañɨ tuichagüe yae ete oyapo oreróvai, oreangareko tape rupi, jare orereepɨ roasa yave jeta tëta reta ipɨte rupi." 
Joshua24:18 YandeYa ko güɨnoe omombo orerenonde güi opaete tëta reta, jare amorreo reta kuae ɨvɨ pe yogüɨreko vae. Ore royeokuaita vi yandeYa pe, echa jae ko oreTumpa." 
Joshua24:19 Ërei Josué jei chupe reta: —Ngaraa pepuere peyeokuai yandeYa pe, echa jae ko Tumpa Iyoambae jare jägüɨro jembiparavo re vae; ngaraa güɨropɨa pepɨapochɨ reta jare peyoa reta." 
Joshua24:20 Pe pesɨrɨ yave yandeYa güi jare peyeokuai yave tumpa ambuae reta pe, jae oyapota ikavimbae vae peve jare opata pemokañɨtei jeta ma ikavi vae oyapo peve tëi reve." 
Joshua24:21 Jayave opaete vae jei Josué pe: —Mbaetɨ ko jökorai. Ore royeokuaita ko yandeYa peño. 
Joshua24:22 Jayave Josué jei opaete vae pe: —Pe retaño ko peikuaa peï, jókuae peiparavo yandeYa pe peyeokuai vaerä vae. Jare jae reta jei: —Jökoraita ko, ore toroikuaa kuae roe vae re." 
Joshua24:23 Josué jei chupe reta: —Jayave pemombo peyeugüi opaete tumpa ambuae reta pepɨte pe oime penoi vae jare peyerova opaete pepɨa ndive yandeYa Israel iTumpa kotɨ. 
Joshua24:24 Jare opaete vae jei Josué pe: —YandeYa Tumpa peño toroyeokuai jare toroyapo jae oreokuai vae. 
Joshua24:25 Jayave Josué oyapo morogüɨrökuavee päve opaete vae ndive jókuae ara voi Siquem pe jare omee chupe reta opaete mborookuai reta. 
Joshua24:26 Josué oikuatía jókuae ñee reta tupapire pe, Tumpa iporookuai reta oyekuatía ñogüɨnoia pe. Javoi oipɨɨ metei ita tuicha vae jare oñono ɨvɨra encina igüɨ pe, yandeYa iyemboetea iyɨpɨ pe oï vae pe," 
Joshua24:27 javoi jei opaete vae pe: —Kuae ita toiko yandemomaendúa vaerä echa oendu rami ko opaete ñee reta yandeYa ñanemomiari vae. Toiko pemomaendúa vaerä, agüɨye vaerä peapu peTumpa pe." 
Joshua24:28 Jaɨkue rupi Josué omondo opaete vae metei ñavo iɨvɨ ae ae kotɨ. 
Joshua24:29 Kuaekuae oasa güire Josué, Nun taɨ omano, yandeYa jembiokuai, ciento diez año güɨnoi yave." 
Joshua24:30 Oñotɨ reta iɨvɨ ae pe, Timnat-sera pe, ɨvɨtɨ Efraín re oï vae pe, ɨvɨtɨ Gaas güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ." 
Joshua24:31 Israel iñemuña reta oyeokuai yandeYa pe, Josué oikove oiko ramboeve jae reta ndive, jare jaɨkue rupi opaete ndechi reta Josué güi ɨma yogüɨreko vae reta, oikuaa opaete yandeYa oyapo mbaembae Israel iñemuña reta ndive vae." 
Joshua24:32 Israel iñemuña reta oñotɨ Siquem pe José jetegüe, Egipto güi güeru reta vae, Jacob ogua ɨvɨ Hamor iñemuña reta güi cien reare korepoti pegua pe, Siquem tu güi; jókuae opɨta José iñemuña reta imbaerä." 
Joshua24:33 Omano vi Eleazar, Aarón taɨ, jare oñotɨ reta taɨ Finees iɨvɨtɨ re, ɨvɨtɨ Efraín re oñemee chupe reta vae pe." 
Judges1:1 Josué omano güire, Israel iñemuña reta oparandu yandeYa pe oikuaa reta vaerä kia nunga ñemuña ra tenonde oyeupita ojo oñeraro cananeo reta ndive." 
Judges1:2 YandeYa jei chupe reta: Judá iñemuña reta ko opüata tenonde, jare chupe reta ko omeeta jókuae ɨvɨ." 
Judges1:3 Jayave Judá iñemuña reta jei jëtara Simeón iñemuña reta pe omoïru vaerä opa opɨ̈ro cananeo reta iɨvɨ, jae reta imbaerä vae, jare jaɨkue rupi opɨ̈ro päve vaerä vi Simeón iñemuña reta imbaerä vae. Jare Simeón iñemuña reta ikɨ̈reɨ omoïru jare yogüɨraja." 
Judges1:4 Judá iñemuña reta yogüɨraja jare yandeYa omee opa vaerä omoamɨri cananeo reta jare ferezeo reta. Jare Bezec pe diez mil opa oyuka reta, kuae reta ipɨte pe oï Adoni-bezec." 
Judges1:5  
Judges1:6 Ërei Adoni-bezec otekuarai, jare jae reta oaɨkuemoña jare oipɨɨ, jare opa oyasɨa chugüi ipoäka guasu jare ipɨ̈sa guasu." 
Judges1:7 Jayave Adoni-bezec jei: “Tenonde yave che ayasɨa setenta mburuvicha guasu reta ipoäka guasu jare ipɨ̈sa guasu, jare chemesa güi cherembíu osururugüe jou reta yepi, jókuae ayapo chupe reta rami etei Tumpa oyapo vi cheve.” Jare güɨraja reta Jerusalén pe, joko pe omano." 
Judges1:8 Jare Judá iñemuña reta oporepeña Jerusalén re jare opɨ̈ro, jare kɨsepuku pe opa oyuka tëta pegua reta güire, oapɨ reta tëta." 
Judges1:9 Jaɨkue rupi Judá iñemuña reta oporepeña cananeo reta yogüɨreko ɨvɨtɨ re ɨvɨ Neguev pe vae re, jare ɨvɨpe pegua reta re." 
Judges1:10 Jare oporepeña reta vi cananeo reta yogüɨreko tëta Hebrón pe vae re, Quiriat-arba jee yepi vae jare oyuka reta Sesai, Ahimán jare Talmai." 
Judges1:11 Jaɨkue rupi oporepeña reta tëta Debir re, tenonde yave Quiriat-sefer yepi vae." 
Judges1:12 Jare Caleb jei: Ameeta cherayɨ Acsa, tëta Debir opɨ̈ro vae jembirekorä." 
Judges1:13 Jare Otoniel, Cenaz taɨ opɨ̈ro jókuae tëta. Cenaz jae ko Caleb tɨvɨ. Jayave Caleb omee tayɨ Acsa, Otoniel jembirekorä." 
Judges1:14 Jare ojo ma jupíe yave, Otoniel omoñera jembireko oiporu vaerä tu pe ɨvɨ imbaerä. Caleb oecha yave tayɨ Acsa ogüeyɨ imburika güi, oparandu chupe: —¿Maratu pa reiko?" 
Judges1:15 Jare Acsa jei: —Aipota chembopota mbae pe. Remee ma cheve ɨvɨ Neguev, emee vi cheve ɨesaɨ reta. Jare Caleb omee chupe ɨesaɨ reta ɨvate kotɨgua jare ɨvɨpe rupigua." 
Judges1:16 Ceneo, Hobab iñemuña reta Moisés jovaya, ñogüɨnoe vi tëta guasu karandaɨtɨ güi Judá iñemuña reta ndive, jare yogüɨraja Judá iñuu Neguev pe oï vae pe, köiño Arad güi; jare joko pe oñemoëta reta jae reta ndive." 
Judges1:17 Jayave Judá iñemuña reta yogüɨraja Simeón iñemuña reta ndive jare omoamɨri cananeo reta Sefat pe yogüɨreko vae jare opa omboai; jare ombojee reta Horma jókuae tëta guasu. 
Judges1:18 Judá iñemuña reta opɨ̈ro vi tëta guasu Gaza iɨvɨ ndive, tëta guasu Ascalón iɨvɨ ndive jare tëta guasu Ecrón iɨvɨ ndive." 
Judges1:19 Jare yandeYa oï Judá iñemuña reta ndive, jae reta opa omoë omombo ɨvɨtɨ rupigua reta; ërei mbaetɨ ipuere opa omoë omombo ɨvɨpe rupigua reta, echa jae reta güɨnoi käretou jiero pegua reta ramo." 
Judges1:20 Caleb pe omee reta Hebrón, Moisés jei chupe rami, jare jae opa omoë omombo joko güi mboapɨ Anac iñemuña reta." 
Judges1:21 Ërei Benjamín iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere opa omoë omombo jebuseo reta Jerusalén pe yogüɨreko vae. Jókuae jeko pegua jebuseo reta yogüɨreko päve Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive Jerusalén pe añave rupi. 
Judges1:22 José iñemuña reta opüa Bet-el re, tenonde yave tëta Luz jee yepi vae, omondo reta oporopïaro vae joko pe. YandeYa omborɨ reta." 
Judges1:23  
Judges1:24 Oporopïaro vae reta oecha oë metei kuimbae jókuae tëta güi, jare jei reta chupe: “Remombeu oreve yave kerupi roike vaerä kuae tëta pe orepɨakavita ndeve.”" 
Judges1:25 Jare jókuae kuimbae omombeu chupe reta kerupi oike reta vaerä jókuae tëta pe, jare jae reta oike opa oyuka kɨsepuku pe jókuae tëta pegua reta; ërei iñɨ̈ro reta jókuae omombeu chupe reta vae pe jare opaete jëtara reta pe." 
Judges1:26 Jare jókuae kuimbae ojo Het iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe, joko pe omopüa ipɨau tëta jare ombojee Luz, jökorai jee añave rupi." 
Judges1:27 Manasés iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere opa omoë omombo tëta Bet-seán pegua reta, Taanac pegua reta, Dor pegua reta Ibleam pegua reta jare Meguido pegua reta; tëta raɨ reta jókuae tëta guasu reta iyɨ́vɨri rupigua ave mbaetɨ ipuere opa omoë reta omombo, jare cananeo reta jeiete yogüɨreko jókuae ɨvɨ pe." 
Judges1:28 Ërei Israel iñemuña reta oecha imbaepuere yae ma yave, omee mbaravɨkɨ poɨ yae vae cananeo reta pe, ërei mbaetɨ ipuere opa omoë omombo." 
Judges1:29 Efraín iñemuña reta mbaetɨ vi opa omoë omombo cananeo reta yogüɨreko Gezer pe vae, jókuae cananeo reta yogüɨrekoño jae reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges1:30 Zabulón iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere omoë omombo cananeo reta Quitrón pe yogüɨreko vae, jare Naalal pe yogüɨreko vae reta ave, cananeo reta yogüɨrekoño joko pe, ërei omombaravɨkɨasɨ katu reta." 
Judges1:31 Aser iñemuña reta mbaetɨ vi omoë omombo cananeo reta yogüɨreko Aco pe vae, Sidón pe vae, Ahlab pe vae, Aczib pe vae, Helba pe vae, Afec pe vae jare Rehob pe vae. Aser iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ipuere omoë omombo cananeo reta jeko pegua, yogüɨreko reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges1:32  
Judges1:33 Neftalí iñemuña reta mbaetɨ vi opa omoë omombo Bet-semes pegua jare Bet-anat pegua cananeo reta, ërei omee reta chupe mbaravɨkɨ poɨ vae, jare yogüɨreko cananeo reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges1:34 Jare amorreo reta omombo Dan iñemuña reta ɨvɨtɨ kotɨ, mbaetɨ omaeño ogüeyɨ reta ɨvɨpe kotɨ." 
Judges1:35 Jökorai amorreo reta opɨta yogüɨreko Heres pe, Ajalón jare Saalbim pe. Ërei José iñemuña reta imbaepuere yae ma yave, omee reta mbaravɨkɨ poɨgüe amorreo reta pe." 
Judges1:36 Amorreo reta iɨvɨ jembeɨ Acrabim kotɨ yayeupía güive Sela pe, jare oasa ye ɨvate kotɨ." 
Judges2:1 YandeYa iaraɨgua ojo Gilgal güi Boquim pe, jare jei Israel iñemuña reta pe: “Che ko pogüɨnoe ɨvɨ Egipto güi, jare pomoinge peñemuñagüe reta pe ɨvɨ arökuavee amee vaerä vae pe, echa jae chupe reta: ‘Ngaraai amboai cheñererökuavee pe ndive," 
Judges2:2 pe reta mbaetɨ yave peyapo ñemoïru jókuae tëta pegua reta ndive, pemboai yave chugüi reta itumpa-raanga reta pe mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae reta.’ Ërei pe reta mbaetɨ peyapo che jae vae, ¿maera pa ko kuae peyapo?" 
Judges2:3 Jáeramo añave jae peve: Ngaraa opa anoe amombo pepɨte güi kuae tëta, jae reta jare itumpa reta yogüɨrekota peve chikote rami jare ñuai rami.”" 
Judges2:4 YandeYa iaraɨgua opa imiari yave, opaete Israel iñemuña reta jäse täta oyaeo." 
Judges2:5 Jáeramo, jókuae oyaeo rendaa ombojee reta Boquim jare joko pe omee reta mɨmba oyeyukagüe yandeYa pe." 
Judges2:6 Josué omondo ma Israel iñemuña reta yave, opa yogüɨraja metei ñavo iɨvɨ ae ae rupi yogüɨreko." 
Judges2:7 Josué oikove ramboeve, opaete vae reta oyeokuai kavi yandeYa pe, jare opaete Josué iyaveigua tenondegua vae reta oikoveño vae reta jovake, jókuae oecha opaete mbae tuichagüe yandeYa oyapo Israel iñemuña reta peguarä vae." 
Judges2:8 Ërei Josué, Nun taɨ yandeYa jembiokuai omano, ciento diez año güɨnoi yave." 
Judges2:9 Jare oñotɨ reta iɨvɨ Timnat-sera pe, ɨvɨtɨ Gaas güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pegua pe." 
Judges2:10 Jare opa vi omano Israel iñemuña reta Josué iyaveigua. Jare jaɨkue rupi oñemuña vae reta mbaetɨ oikuaa yandeYa, mbaetɨ vi oikuaa reta opaete mbaembae oyapo Israel iñemuña peguarä vae." 
Judges2:11 Jaɨkue rupi Israel iñemuña reta oyapo ikavimbae vae yandeYa jesa róvai, omboete reta tumpa ambuae reta Baal jee vae." 
Judges2:12 Oeya reta yandeYa, iñemuñagüe reta iTumpa, Egipto güi güɨnoe reta vae, jare oguata reta tumpa ambuae reta jupíe, iyɨ́vɨri rupi tëta reta ñogüɨnoi vae itumpa reta, jókuae omboete reta; jökorai omboarasɨuka reta yandeYa." 
Judges2:13 Oeya reta yandeYa jare omboete reta tumpa-raanga Baal jare Astarot. 
Judges2:14 Jáeramo yandeYa iyarasɨ Israel iñemuña reta kotɨ, omee imonda vae reta opɨ̈ro vaerä chugüi reta imbaembae, jare omee vi jovaicho reta iyɨvɨrigua reta pe, jare mbaetɨ ma ipuere jovaicho reta re." 
Judges2:15 Jare ñeraroa pe yogüɨraja reta yave, yandeYa mbaetɨ omborɨ reta, jae jei rami, oñererökuavee omombeu kavi voi chupe reta rami; jare oiporara yae reta." 
Judges2:16 Jare yandeYa omopüa mburuvicha reta, oepɨ reta vaerä imbaembae opɨ̈ro chugüi vae reta güi." 
Judges2:17 Ërei Israel iñemuña reta mbaetɨi oyeapɨsaka jókuae mburuvicha reta re, oguata reta tumpa ambuae reta jaɨkue, jare jókuae omboete reta. Jarembaeño opia reta iñemuñagüe reta oyapose Tumpa iporookuai vae güi." 
Judges2:18 YandeYa omopüa yave mburuvicha, jae oï jókuae mburuvicha ndive, jare jae oepɨ Israel iñemuña reta jovaicho reta güi opaete ara oikove oiko ramboeve jókuae mburuvicha. YandeYa oiparareko omae jese reta, echa omoäse jovaicho reta oiporarauka chupe vae jare ombopɨatɨtɨ vae." 
Judges2:19 Ërei jókuae mburuvicha omano yave, jae reta opa ye oyerova, jare oasa ete ye oikomegua reta iñemuña reta güi, oyeokuai jare omboete reta tumpa ambuae reta; jare mbaetɨ oeya reta jembiapo kavimbae jare jeko kavimbae reta." 
Judges2:20 Jáeramo yandeYa iyarasɨ yae Israel iñemuña reta kotɨ, jare jei: “Kuae tëta güɨrokomegua morogüɨrökuavee päve ayapo iñemuñagüe reta ndive vae, jare mbaetɨ oipota oyapo reta cheporookuai." 
Judges2:21 Jáeramo che mbaetɨta vi anoe amombo chugüi reta, metei ave tëtaguasu, Josué omano yave opɨta vae.”" 
Judges2:22 Kuae tëtaguasu reta rupi yandeYa ojäa vaerä Israel iñemuña reta, oipotata ra oguata reta iporookuai rupi iñemuñagüe reta rami ani mbaetɨta ra." 
Judges2:23 Jáeramo yandeYa mbaetɨ jupiveiño opa güɨnoe omombo jókuae tëtaguasu reta, mbaetɨ omee Josué ipo pe, omaeño opɨta reta." 
Judges3:1 Kuae ko jae tëtaguasu reta yandeYa omaeño opɨta ojäa vaerä Israel iñemuña reta, jókuae mbaetɨ oikuaa reta kërai ko ñeraro opɨ̈ro vaerä ɨvɨ Canaán vae reta, echa ndei vɨteri oa reta." 
Judges3:2 Jare oikatu vaerä oñeraro Israel iñemuña reta, mbaetɨ etei oikuaa kërai ko ñeraro vae." 
Judges3:3 Opɨta pandepo filisteo reta juvicha, opaete cananeo reta, Sidón pegua reta jare heveo reta ɨvɨtɨ Líbano pe yogüɨreko vae reta, ɨvɨtɨ Baal-hermón güive ojoi oya tëta guasu Hamat re." 
Judges3:4 Kuae reta rupi yandeYa oipota ojäa Israel iñemuña reta, oikuaa vaerä oyapota ra mborookuai reta jae omee Moisés rupi iñemuñagüe reta pe vae." 
Judges3:5 Jökorai Israel iñemuña reta omboɨpɨ yogüɨreko cananeo reta ipɨte pe, Het iñemuña reta ipɨte pe, amorreo reta ipɨte pe, ferezeo reta ipɨte pe, heveo reta ipɨte pe jare jebuseo reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges3:6 Jare taɨ reta jare tayɨ reta omenda jókuae tëta pegua reta taɨ jare tayɨ reta ndive, jare omboete reta jae reta itumpa reta." 
Judges3:7 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oyapo ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai, ñakañɨ reta iYa Tumpa güi, jare omboete reta baal reta, jare Asera iä reta." 
Judges3:8 Jáeramo yandeYa iyarasɨ ikotɨ reta, jare omee Cusan-risataim mburuvicha guasu Mesopotamia pegua ipo pe; jare juri año Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨreko Cusan-risataim jeia re." 
Judges3:9 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oyerure mbɨatɨtɨ ndive yandeYa pe; jare yandeYa omopüa metei mburuvicha chupe reta, jare jae oepɨ reta; jae ko Otoniel, Cenaz taɨ. Cenaz jae ko Caleb tɨvɨ." 
Judges3:10 Jare yandeYa iEspíritu ou Otoniel re omboarakuaa katu vaerä, jare jae ojo Israel iñemuña reta jenonde, ñeraroa pe, jare yandeYa omee ipo pe Cusan-risataim, mburuvicha guasu Siria pegua, jare güɨnoi mbaepuere jese." 
Judges3:11 Javoi oime mbɨakatu jókuae ɨvɨ pe cuarenta año rupi, jare omano Otoniel, Cenaz taɨ." 
Judges3:12 Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oyapo ye ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai; jáeramo yandeYa omee mbaepuere Eglón mburuvicha guasu Moab pegua pe Israel re, oyapo reta ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai jeko pegua." 
Judges3:13 Kuae mburuvicha guasu oñemoïruuka Amón jare Amalec iñemuña reta pe jare yogüeru omoamɨri Israel iñemuña reta, opɨ̈ro reta tëta guasu karandaɨtɨ pegua, jae ko Jericó." 
Judges3:14 Jare Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨreko Eglón mburuvicha guasu Moab pegua jeia re dieciocho año. 
Judges3:15 Jare oyerure reta mbɨatɨtɨ ndive yandeYa pe; jare yandeYa omopüa chupe reta metei oporoepɨ vae, jae ko Aod iyasu vae, Gera taɨ, Benjamín iñemuña pegua. Metei ara Israel iñemuña reta omondo jae ndive mbaemboepɨ Eglón mburuvicha guasu Moab pegua pe." 
Judges3:16 Ërei Aod yepe oyapo iyeupe kɨsepuku jaimbe yoyavi vae, medio metro puku vae jare oñono jemimonde igüɨ pe iyakatu kotɨ;" 
Judges3:17 jaɨkue rupi ojo omee vaerä mbaemboepɨ Eglón pe, jókuae mburuvicha ko ikɨra yae vae." 
Judges3:18 Omee güire mbaemboepɨ Eglón pe, Aod oë ojo jupíe yogüeru vae reta ndive," 
Judges3:19 ërei yogüɨraja ma oväe tumpa-raanga reta köiño ñogüɨnoi Gilgal güi vae pe yave, Aod oyerova ye ojo Eglón oïa pe, jare jei chupe: —Mburuvicha guasu, oime anoi ñee reta amombeu vaerä ndeve, ërei kuae amombeuta ndeve yandeño pe. Jayave mburuvicha guasu oyókuai opa vaerä oë jóvai güi vae." 
Judges3:20 Jare Aod oya katu jae oguapɨ oï ramboeve jaeño o araku pegua pe (jae ko iröɨsa ngatu vae pe), jei chupe: —Aru ndeve Tumpa iñee mburuvicha guasu. Eglón oendu yave kuae, opüa jenda güi," 
Judges3:21 javoi Aod omondo iyasu iyakatu kotɨ güi oekɨ ikɨsepuku jare pɨpe oikutu Eglón jɨe pe. 
Judges3:22 Oikutuasɨ yae, mbaetɨ jaimbe vaeño opa okañɨ jese, iɨ reve opa okañɨ jese, echa Eglón ikɨra yae, jáeramo Aod mbaetɨ oekɨ ye jɨe güi ikɨse jare oyepɨyere ichuri." 
Judges3:23 Jaɨkue rupi Aod oyokenda öke omotäta reve japɨpe kotɨ jare oë ojo ïkotɨa rupi. 
Judges3:24 Ojo ma yave, yogüeru mburuvicha guasu pe oyeokuai vae reta, jare oecha öke oyeokenda oï yave, oyemongeta reta mburuvicha guasu ko oyeokenda ojo vaerä ñana pe." 
Judges3:25 Ërei oecha reta mbaetɨ oyepea jare mbaetɨ oë mburuvicha guasu yave, oyemoambeko reta. Javoi oipea reta öke iyave pe yave, oecha juvicha guasu oyepɨso ɨvɨ re omano oï." 
Judges3:26 Oyemoambeko reta ramboeve, Aod otekuarai, jare opa oasa tumpa-raanga reta Gilgal pe ñogüɨnoi vae rupi, jare ojo oñepɨ̈ro Seirat pe." 
Judges3:27 Ojo oväe Israel iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe yave, omoñee mimbɨ guakaräti ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pegua re oenɨi vaerä Israel iñemuña reta, jare opaete vae ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ güi Aod jupíe jare jae ojo tenonde chupe reta." 
Judges3:28 Jayave jae omombeu opaete yogüeru jupíe vae reta pe, yandeYa ko omee ipo pe jovaicho moabita reta vae. Jayave opaete vae yogüɨraja jupíe jare opɨ̈ro reta ɨ̈aka Jordán tɨpɨmbaea rupi tape oasa Moab kotɨ vae, jare mbaetɨ omaeño kia ave oasa." 
Judges3:29 Jare jókuae ara rupi oyuka reta diez mil kuimbae Moab pegua, jëia yae vae reta jare ñeraro regua reta, mbaetɨ etei ojoyepe metei ave." 
Judges3:30 Jökorai Israel iñemuña reta omoamɨri Moab pegua reta. Kuae jaɨkue rupi oiko mbɨakatu ɨvɨ pe ochenta año. 
Judges3:31 Jaɨkue rupi oiko Samgar, Anat taɨ, jae oyuka seisciento kuimbae filisteo, ɨvɨra puku iyapɨ re güɨnoi jiero vae pe, güeye omoäkua (oyemboarea) pɨpe vae. Samgar oepɨ vi Israel iñemuña reta." 
Judges4:1 Aod omano güire, Israel iñemuña reta oyapo ye ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai," 
Judges4:2 jare yandeYa omee reta Jabín mburuvicha guasu Canaán pegua ipo pe, oporookuai tëta Hazor pe vae. Isundaro reta juvicha ko jae Sísara, jae oiko Haroset-goim pe." 
Judges4:3 Jabín güɨnoi noveciento käretou jiero pegua, jare veinte año rupi oiporarauka yae Israel iñemuña reta pe. Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oyerure mbɨatɨtɨ ndive yandeYa pe." 
Judges4:4 Jókuae ara rupi mburuvicharä oiko metei kuña Israel iñemuña reta re, jae ko ñeemombeúa Débora, Lapidot jembireko." 
Judges4:5 Débora oyepokuaa oguapɨ karandaɨ igüɨ pe (jáeramo: “Débora ikarandaɨ” jei chupe vae), Ramá jare Bet-el ipäu pe, ɨvɨtɨ reta Efraín pegua pe, jare Israel iñemuña reta yogüeru yepi ípɨri oñono kavi vaerä chupe reta teko reta." 
Judges4:6 Jae omondo güeruruka Barac, Abinoam taɨ, tëta Cedes pe oiko vae, jókuae tëta oï Neftalí iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe, jare jei chupe: —YandeYa Israel iTumpa ndeokuai körai: “Ekua ɨvɨtɨ Tabor pe jare emboatɨ diez mil kuimbae Neftalí iñemuña pegua reta jare Zabulón iñemuña pegua reta." 
Judges4:7 Che amboukata Jabín isundaro juvicha Sísara, ou vaerä ɨ̈aka Cisón pe oñeraro nde ndive, ikäretou reta ñeraro pegua ndive jare isundaro reta ndive. Ërei che ameeta ndepo pe.”" 
Judges4:8 Barac jei chupe: —Nde reo cherupíe yave ajata, ërei mbaetɨta ko reo cherupíe yave ngaraa aja." 
Judges4:9 Débora jei: —Ajata nderupíe, jaeño kuae ñeraro reota reyapo vae rupi agüɨyeta reyembotuicha, echa yandeYa omee Sísara, kuña ipo pe. Jayave Débora ojo Barac jupíe Cedes pe." 
Judges4:10 Joko pe Barac omboatɨ Zabulón iñemuña reta jare Neftalí iñemuña pegua reta diez mil kuimbae. Débora ojo vi jupíe. 
Judges4:11 Jare ceneo Heber, Hobab, Moisés jovaya iñemuña osɨrɨ yepe jëtara ceneo reta güi jare ojo oñemoëta ɨvɨtɨ päu Zaanaim jee vae pe, Cedes iyɨpɨ pe oï vae pe." 
Judges4:12 Sísara oikuaa yave Barac oyeupi ko ɨvɨtɨ Tabor re," 
Judges4:13 omboatɨ ikäretou jiero pegua reta noveciento, jare opaete isundaro reta jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae, jare yogüɨraja Haroset-goim güi ɨ̈aka Cisón pe." 
Judges4:14 Jayave Débora jei Barac pe: —¡Epüa, echa kuae ara ko yandeYa omeeta ndepo pe Sísara! ¡YandeYa ojo ma perenonde! Jare Barac ogüeyɨ ɨvɨtɨ Tabor güi diez mil isundaro ndive," 
Judges4:15 jare yandeYa omoamɨriuka Sísara jare isundaro reta oñeraro ma yave Barac ndive; jare Sísara ogüeyɨ ikäretou güi otekuarai ipɨ re. 
Judges4:16 Ërei Barac omoña käretou reta jare sundaro reta Haroset-goim pe regua. Jókuae ara opaetei Sísara isundaro reta omano kɨsepuku pe, mbaetɨ etei jembɨre metei yepe." 
Judges4:17 Jare Sísara otekuarai ojo oväe Jael jo guakapi pegua pe, jae ko ceneo Heber jembireko, echa Jabín mburuvicha guasu Hazor pegua omae kavi oyoe ceneo Heber ndive jare jo pegua reta ndive." 
Judges4:18 Jare Jael oë oövaiti, jei chupe: —Eyu cheya, eyu kuae pe agüɨye ekɨɨye. Javoi Sísara oike o pe jare Jael omboyasoi asoya pe, jökorai omoñemi;" 
Judges4:19 jayave Sísara oiporu ɨ jou vaerä, echa ɨuve oyaporai yae ma. Jael oipea ɨrɨru mɨmbapire pegua neche oñovatu pɨpe vae jare omee jou; jare omboyasoi ye oñono asoya pe." 
Judges4:20 Sísara jei chupe: —Epɨta neröke pe, kia ou jare oparandu ndeve oime ra kia kuae pe oï vae yave, ere chupe mbaetɨ ko vae." 
Judges4:21 Ërei Sísara ikangɨ yae güi jopeɨ jare oke. Jayave Jael oipɨɨ martillo jare metei etaka o guakapi pegua omoata jese vae, jare ojo oyeendumbae (vɨari) reve oyatɨka Sísara iñäka-ɨke re, oikutu ɨvɨ re. Jökorai omano Sísara." 
Judges4:22 Jare Barac oaɨkuemoña Sísara ojo oväe Jael jo pe yave, Jael oë oövaiti jare jei chupe: —Eyu, taechauka ndeve kuimbae reaɨkuemoña reyu vae. Barac oike o guakapi pegua pe yave, oecha Sísara oyepɨso omano oï ɨvɨ re, jare etaka oyekutu oï iñäka-ɨke re." 
Judges4:23 Jökorai jókuae ara Tumpa omoamɨri Jabín mburuvicha guasu Canaán pegua, Israel iñemuña reta jóvai." 
Judges4:24 Jare Israel iñemuña reta omboɨpɨ güɨnoi mbaepuere Jabín re opa omokañɨtei regua. 
Judges5:1 Jókuae ara Débora jare Barac, Abinoam taɨ otairari reta körai, jei reve:" 
Judges5:2 “Opaete vae tomboete yandeYa, echa oime vɨteri Israel pe mburuvicha reta oïndaivi ñeraro peguarä vae; echa oime vɨteri opaete vae ipɨte pe ikɨ̈reɨ ojo ñeraro pe vae." 
Judges5:3 ¡Mburuvicha guasu reta, peendu cheve! ¡Mburuvicha reta peyeapɨsaka! ¡Che atairarita yandeYa pe! ¡Che atairarita Israel iTumpa pe!" 
Judges5:4 CheYa Tumpa, reë yave tëta Seir güi; reo Edom pegua reta iɨvɨ rupi yave, ɨvɨ jare ara okana, amapɨtu reta oitɨ ama." 
Judges5:5 CheYa Tumpa, nderóvai okana ɨvɨtɨ guasu reta; ɨvɨtɨ Sinaí okana Israel iTumpa jóvai." 
Judges5:6 Samgar, Anat taɨ iara pe, jare Jael iara pe, oguata vae reta oeya jape, oguata jupi vae, jare oguata reta tape ikavimbaea rupi;" 
Judges5:7 tëta raɨ reta Israel pegua opa oyemombo opɨta. Jayave che apüa. ¡Che, Débora, metei kuña Israel iñemuña pegua ichɨ!" 
Judges5:8 Oiparavo reta iyeupe ipɨau tumpa-raanga reta yave, oime avei ñeraro tëta guasu pe. Mbaetɨ oyekuaa yeopiaka ani mii yepe cuarenta mil Israel ñemuña reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges5:9 ¡Chepɨa oï Israel iñemuña juvicha reta re, cherëtaɨgua reta ikɨ̈reɨ yogüɨraja ñeraro pe vae reta re! ¡Opaete vae tomboete yandeYa!" 
Judges5:10 Pe reta, pepo mburika kuña tïi vae re vae; jare peguapɨ peporojäa vae, jare pe reta peguata vae, pemoërakua." 
Judges5:11 ¡Mɨmba reta iɨgua rɨru reta oïa pe, jare platillo reta ipu ndive pemoërakua yandeYa oporomoamɨri vae jare tëta raɨ reta oporomoamɨri Israel pe vae! Jayave yogüeruta imbae vae reta öke reta kotɨ." 
Judges5:12 ¡Epa, Débora, epa jare etairari! ¡Jare nde Barac, Abinoam taɨ, epüa jare eraja ndeyeupe reipɨɨgüe reta!" 
Judges5:13 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta ogüeyɨ, oñeraro jëia yae vae reta ndive; yandeYa jee re ogüeyɨ oñeraro vaerä, kuimbae reta ñeraro regua ndive." 
Judges5:14 Efraín iñemuña reta güi Amalec pe yogüɨreko vae amogüe kuimbae reta ogüeyɨ, jaɨkue yogüeru Benjamín iñemuña reta. Maquir iñemuña reta güi ogüeyɨ vi mburuvicha reta, Jökoraiño vi Zabulón iñemuña juvicha reta." 
Judges5:15 Isacar iñemuña reta juvicha reta yogüɨraja vi Débora jupíe, Isacar ojo vi Barac rami, echa ojo jupíe ɨvɨtɨ päu pe. Rubén iñemuña reta ipɨte pe oime tëi ñogüɨnoi ipɨa-kɨ̈reɨ ngatu vae reta." 
Judges5:16 ¿Maera pa opɨta reta vecha rókai pe, oendu reta vaerä vecha iyangarekoa reta jemimbɨ ñee? ¡Rubén iñemuña reta ipɨte pe jeta kuimbae okɨɨye yae vae!" 
Judges5:17 Galaad opɨta ɨ̈aka Jordán jovaicho pe; Dan iñemuña reta opɨta barco reta oimea pe, jare Aser iñemuña opɨta ɨguasu jembeɨ pe, jare mbaetɨ omɨi barco reta oë oua güi," 
Judges5:18 ërei Zabulón jare Neftalí iñemuña reta ɨvɨtɨ rupi, omoëgua reta jekove mano pe." 
Judges5:19 Jayave mburuvicha guasu reta yogüeru oñeraro, Taanac pe oñeraro mburuvicha guasu reta Canaán pegua, ɨupa Meguido pegua iyɨpɨ pe, ërei mbaetɨ opɨ̈ro reta korepoti yepe, ani mbaeyekou." 
Judges5:20 Ara güi yasɨtata reta oñeraro, jókuae oïa güi oñoraro rami Sísara ndive;" 
Judges5:21 ɨesaɨ, ɨesaɨ ñɨma yae vae, ɨesaɨ Cisón pegua opaetei reporomboai. ¡Nde repɨ̈ro imbaepuere yae vae reta iyaseo re!" 
Judges5:22 ¡Kavayu reta ipɨ oyeendu! ¡Jókuae jëia vae reta ikavayu isɨrɨkɨ osɨi vae reta! 
Judges5:23 Jare yandeYa iaraɨgua omoërakua: ‘¡Yepopeyu toï tëta Meroz re jare pɨpe yogüɨreko vae reta re!’ Echa mbaetɨ yogüeru omborɨ yandeYa, imbaepuere yae vae reta kotɨ." 
Judges5:24 ¡Jael, eyekou neïru kuña reta ipɨte pe; nde, ceneo Heber jembireko! ¡Eyekou o guakapi pegua pe kuña reta ipɨte pe!" 
Judges5:25 Sísara oiporu ɨ jou vaerä, ërei Jael omee jou neche. ¡Ikavigüe kaua pe omee jou neche kɨra!" 
Judges5:26 Etaka oipɨɨ iyasu kotɨ jare iyakatu kotɨ martillo, Sísara iñäka re okua, oasa iñäka-ɨke etaka pe." 
Judges5:27 Sísara oyeapa Jael igüɨ pe; oyepoka, joko pe omano." 
Judges5:28 Sísara ichɨ oyemoambeko, omae ventana rupi, jare jei: ‘¿Maera ra ikäretou mbaetɨño ou oväe? ¿Maera ra ikäretou ñeraro pegua ou raiviä?’" 
Judges5:29 Jembiokuai kuña reta yarakuaa katu vae jei chupe, jare jókuae etei jei vi iyeupe:" 
Judges5:30 ‘Güɨramoi oime omboyao ñogüɨnoi oyoupe ñeraro pe opɨ̈rogüe. Metei ani mókoi tembipɨɨ kuñatai, ñeraro regua peguarä ñavo; Sísara peguarä temimonde ipïra kavi vae; metei ani mókoi, oporomoamɨri vae iyayu reguarä jeta ipïra vae. Oporomoamɨri vae reta juvicha reta peguarä temimonde jeta ipïra vae.’" 
Judges5:31 ¡Jökorai tokañɨtei opaete nderovaicho reta cheYa Tumpa, jare nderaɨu vae reta tijembipeasɨ, kuaraɨ jembipeasɨ rami!” Jókuae jaɨkue rupi oiko mbɨakatu jókuae ɨvɨ pe cuarenta año." 
Judges6:1 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oyapo ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai; jare yandeYa omee reta Madián iñemuña reta ipo pe chiu año rupi. 
Judges6:2 Jare Madián iñemuña reta güɨrekoasɨ katu yae Israel iñemuña reta jeko pegua, opa yogüɨraja oyapo iyeupe oñemi reta vaerä ɨvɨkua rupi, ɨvɨtɨ rupi jare jëguambaea rupi." 
Judges6:3 Echa Israel iñemuña reta jemitɨ oime ñavo, Madián iñemuña reta, amalecita reta jare kuaraɨ oëa kotɨgua reta yogüeru oporepeña jese reta." 
Judges6:4 Oyembojeyupa reta Israel iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe jare güɨrokomegua reta chugüi jemitɨ, kuae ojoi oya ɨvɨ Gaza re, oeyambae reve Israel iñemuña reta pe mbae ave jou reta vaerä, vecha ave ani güeye reta ave ani mburika reta yepe." 
Judges6:5 Echa jo guakapi pegua jare jɨmba reve reve yogüeru opa omboai ɨvɨ pegua mbaembae. Yogüeru jeta icamello ndive tuku ou opa mbae omokañɨtei rami. 
Judges6:6 Madián iñemuña reta jeko pegua Israel iñemuña reta oiporara yae karuai, jáeramo jae reta oyerure yandeYa pe mbɨatɨtɨ reve." 
Judges6:7 Israel iñemuña reta oyerure ma yandeYa pe yave, oyora Madián iñemuña reta ipo güi." 
Judges6:8 YandeYa ombou metei ñeemombeúa Israel iñemuña reta pe, jare jei chupe reta: “Körai jei yandeYa Israel iñemuña reta iTumpa: ‘Che ko pogüɨnoe ɨvɨ Egipto güi yeokuaiasɨ katu güi," 
Judges6:9 ërei mbaetɨ poyora Egiptoɨgua reta güiño, poyora vi opaete oiporarauka peve vae reta ipo güi. Opa anoe amombo reta perenonde güi jare iɨvɨ amee peve." 
Judges6:10 Jare jae ko peve reta, che ko jae peYa Tumpa, agüɨye pekɨɨye amorreo reta itumpa reta güi iɨvɨ pe añave peï vae; ërei pe reta mbaetɨ peyapo che jaegüe.’ ”" 
Judges6:11 Jare yandeYa iaraɨgua ou oguapɨ ɨvɨra encina Ofra pe oï vae igüɨ pe, jae ko Joás Abiezer iñemuña imbae. Gedeón, Joás taɨ ombopiriri oï trigo uva oñetɨamía pe, oñomi vaerä Madián iñemuña reta güi." 
Judges6:12 YandeYa iaraɨgua oyekuaa jare jei chupe: —¡Kuimbae ipɨ̈rata jare jëia yae vae, yandeYa oï nde ndive!" 
Judges6:13 Jare Gedeón jei: —Atataɨ cheya, oreYa oime oiko ore ndive yave ¿maera pa oasa ore ndive opaete kuae mbaembae? ¿Jama pa jókuae mɨakañɨ reta oreñemuñagüe reta imiari oreve jese vae, orerenoe ɨvɨ Egipto güi yave vae? Jare añave orereeya oremee Madián iñemuña reta ipo pe." 
Judges6:14 YandeYa omae jese jare jei chupe: —Jókuae mɨ̈rata renoi vae ndive ekua, jare eepɨ Israel iñemuña reta Madián iñemuña reta ipo güi. Che etei ko romondo." 
Judges6:15 Ërei Gedeón jekuae jei ye: —Atataɨ cheya, ¿këraita pa aepɨ Israel iñemuña reta? Mase, ko cherëtara reta paravete vae ko Manasés iñemuña reta ipɨte pe, jare che ko taɨkuegua ete cherëtara reta ipɨte pe." 
Judges6:16 Jare yandeYa jei chupe: —Añetete che aïta nde ndive, remoamɨrita Madián iñemuña reta metei kuimbae vae ramiño." 
Judges6:17 Jayave Gedeón jei chupe: —Ndepɨakatu ko chekotɨ yave, eechauka cheve nde ko nemiari che ndive vae." 
Judges6:18 Romoñera agüɨye vaerä reo kuae güi ayu ye regua, chekɨ̈reɨ aru metei mbota añono nderóvai. Jare jae jei chupe: —Kuae pe roärota reyu ye regua." 
Judges6:19 Jayave Gedeón ojo omboyɨ kavara kuimbae raɨ, jare veinte kilo trigokúi oyapo mbɨyape ovumbae; jare soo oñono kanata raɨ pe jare yapepo pe tembíu tɨɨgüe vae, jare güɨraja jókuae ɨvɨra encina igüɨ pe." 
Judges6:20 Jayave Tumpa iaraɨgua jei: —Eipɨɨ soo jare mbɨyape ovumbae jare eñono ita guasu re, jare epɨyere tembíu tɨɨgüe vae. Jare jökorai oyapo." 
Judges6:21 Jare araɨgua ipo pe güɨnoi popoka vae pe oñátai soo jare mbɨyape, jare jókuae ita guasu güi oë tata, jare opa oapɨ soo jare mbɨyape; javoi yandeYa iaraɨgua okañɨ jóvai güi." 
Judges6:22 Gedeón oecha yandeYa iaraɨgua ko yave jei: —¡Atataɨ cheYa! ¡Aecha cheYa iaraɨgua jova! 
Judges6:23 Ërei yandeYa jei chupe: —Agüɨye ekɨɨye ngaraa remano. Ndepɨakatuño. 
Judges6:24 Jayave Gedeón omopüa metei mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae yandeYa peguarä jare ombojee yandeYa-Salom kuae oimeño Ofra pe, Abiezer iñemuña reta jëta pe." 
Judges6:25 Jókuae pɨ̈tu voi yandeYa jei Gedeón pe: —Eipɨɨ metei toro nderu jɨmba güi, toro mokoía chiu año vae, jare opa emboai Baal pegua mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae nderu imbae jare eyasɨa vi Asera iä oï jae ndive vae," 
Judges6:26 jare ɨvatea pe emopüa che ndeYa Tumpa peguarä mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae. Eipɨɨ jókuae toro jare emee cheve mɨmba oyeyuka opaetei oyeapɨ vae, reiporu reve yepearä jókuae Asera iä opa reyasɨa vae." 
Judges6:27 Jayave Gedeón güɨraja payandepo jembiokuai kuimbae, jare oyapo yandeYa oyókuai rami. Ërei okɨɨye tu jëtara güi jare tëta pegua reta güi jeko pegua, oyapo pɨ̈tu yave." 
Judges6:28 Ndeimbove yave tëta pegua reta oecha Baal pegua mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae opa oyemboai jare iyɨpɨ pegua Asera iä opa oyeasɨa, jare toro mokoía oñemee mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae, ipɨau mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae re." 
Judges6:29 Metei ñavo oparandu reta oyoupe: “¿Kia pa kuae oyapo?” Jare oipota rupi oparandu reta güire oikuaa reta Gedeón, Joás taɨ ko oyapo vae, jare yogüɨraja jei Joás pe:" 
Judges6:30 —Enoe nderaɨ ikatu pe royuka vaerä. ¡Jae opa omboai Baal pegua mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae jare oyasɨa Asera iä oï iyɨpɨ pe vae! 
Judges6:31 Ërei Joás jei jókuae yogüeru vae reta pe: —¿Peepɨta pa Baal, jare peñerarota pa jese? ¡Kia ñavo oepɨ Baal vae tomano kuae ndeimbove voi! Baal Tumpa ko yave, pemaeño toyeepɨ jókuae kuimbae opa omboai mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae güi." 
Judges6:32 Jayave güive ombojee reta Gedeón Jerobaal pe, jae ko: “Baal toyeepɨ chugüi”, echa Gedeón opa omboai Baal peguarä mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae." 
Judges6:33 Jayave opaete Madián iñemuña reta jare amalecita reta jare kuaraɨ oëa kotɨgua reta oyomboatɨ jare oasa reta ɨ̈aka Jordán, jare oyembojeyupa reta ɨvɨtɨ päu ipe kavi vae Jezreel pe." 
Judges6:34 Jayave, yandeYa iEspíritu ou Gedeón re jare jae omoñee mimbɨ vecha kuimbae-räti yave Abiezer iñemuña reta oyomboatɨ jae ndive." 
Judges6:35 Jare omondo ñee jerajaa reta opaete Manasés iñemuña reta pe, jare jae reta vi oyomboatɨ jae ndive; jökoraiño vi omondo ñee jerajaa reta Aser, Zabulón jare Neftalí iñemuña reta pe, jare jae reta oë oövaiti." 
Judges6:36 Jare Gedeón jei Tumpa pe: “Añetete che rupi reepɨta Israel iñemuña reta rere cheve rami yave," 
Judges6:37 ko añave añonota vecharaagüe trigo oyembopiriría pe; jare ndeimbove ɨsápɨi oï vecharaagüe reño yave, jare opaete ɨvɨ otini yave, aikuaata reepɨta ko Israel iñemuña reta che rupi vae, rere rami.”" 
Judges6:38 Jare jökorai oasa, echa ndeimbove opüa yave oitɨami vecharaagüe jare oekɨ chugüi ɨsápɨi, metei tasa guasu tɨnɨe." 
Judges6:39 Ërei Gedeón jei Tumpa pe: “Agüɨye ndearasɨ chekotɨ, jekuae amoë ye cheñee yave; jaeño aipota aikuaa kavi ye vecharaagüe rupi. Romoñera jaeño vecharaagüe otini vaerä opɨta, jare ɨvɨ re toï ɨsápɨi.”" 
Judges6:40 Jare jókuae pɨ̈tu Tumpa oyapo jökorai; vecharaagüeño otini opɨta, jare opaete ɨvɨ re oime ɨsápɨi." 
Judges7:1 Ndeimbove yave opüa Jerobaal, jae ko Gedeón, jare opaete jae ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta, jare yogüɨraja oyembojeyupa reta ɨesaɨ Harod iyɨpɨ pe; jare Madián iñemuña reta jeyupa oï chugüi reta ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ, ɨvɨtɨ More ipäu ipe kavía pe." 
Judges7:2 Jare yandeYa jei Gedeón pe: “Tëta ñogüɨnoi nde ndive vae jeta yae ko amee vaerä Madián iñemuña reta pepo pe, echa Israel iñemuña reta oyererovia katuta jae reta aeño ko oporomoamɨri vae." 
Judges7:3 Jáeramo, añave ere opaete vae pe, kia ñavo okɨɨye yave, toyerova ye jëta kotɨ kuae Galaad iɨvɨtɨ güi.” Jare oyerova ye veintidó mil kuimbae, jare opɨta diez mil." 
Judges7:4 Jare yandeYa jei Gedeón pe: “Jeta yae vɨteri ko; eraja reta ɨ̈aka pe, jare joko pe aiparavota ndeve; jare che jaeta ndeve: Kuae tojo nderupíe; jae ojota nderupíe; ërei oipotagüe vae pe jae yave ndeve: Kuae agüɨye tojo, jókuae kuimbae agüɨye tojo.”" 
Judges7:5 Jayave Gedeón güɨraja tëta pegua reta ɨ̈aka pe; jare yandeYa jei chupe: “Opaete ipo pe oupi ɨ jou vae reta, jókuae eñono tee; jaeramiño vi opaete oyetavatɨka ɨ jou vae eñono tee.”" 
Judges7:6 Jare oyepapa tresciento kuimbae reta, ipo pe oñono ɨ jou vae, jare opaete ïru reta oyetavatɨka jou ɨ." 
Judges7:7 Jayave yandeYa jei Gedeón pe: “Kuae tresciento kuimbae ipo pe ɨ jou vae reta rupi poepɨta, jare ameeta Madián iñemuña reta ndepo pe; jare opaete ïru reta toyogüɨraja ye jëta jëta ae kotɨ.”" 
Judges7:8 Jare omombɨta tembíu jare mimbɨguasu kuimbae reta peguarä yave, opa ye omondo jëta jëta ae kotɨ opaete ïru Israel reta, jaeño omombɨta jókuae tresciento kuimbae reta. Madián iñemuña reta jeyupa opɨta ɨ́vɨkotɨ chugüi reta, ipe kavía pe." 
Judges7:9 Jayave jókuae pɨ̈tu yandeYa jei chupe: “Epüa, jare egüeyɨ teyupa kotɨ; echa che ko amee reta ndepo pe." 
Judges7:10 Ërei rekɨɨye regüeyɨ jokotɨ yave, egüeyɨ nderembiokuai Fura ndive," 
Judges7:11 jare eendu imiari reta vae; jayave reñemoäta ngatuta, jare reporepeñata teyupa re.” Jayave Gedeón ogüeyɨ jembiokuai Fura ndive, tovaicho reta köi yae ñogüɨnoi chugüi retaa kotɨ." 
Judges7:12 Jare Madián iñemuña reta, jare Amalec iñemuña reta jare kuaraɨ oëa kotɨgua reta, oñemoai ɨvɨpe kavi rupi, tuku jeta yae vae rami, jare jɨmba camello reta oyepapa rapeä, ɨguasu jembeɨ pe ɨvɨkuitï jeta yae rami." 
Judges7:13 Jare Gedeón ojo oväe yave, metei kuimbae imiari oï ipaɨu re iñeïru pe, jei reve: —Che apaɨu. Cheke pe aecha cebada pegua mbɨyape, otokororo ou Madián iñemuña reta jeyupa kotɨ, ou oväe metei küaraɨa guakapi pegua pe jare oa jese yave opaetei oitɨ jókuae küaraɨa guakapi pegua." 
Judges7:14 Jare iñeïru jei chupe: —Kuae mbaetɨ ye ïru mbae, Gedeón, Joás Israel iñemuña pegua taɨ ikɨsepuku ko, Tumpa ko opa omee ipo pe Madián iñemuña reta, opaete jeyupa ndive." 
Judges7:15 Jare Gedeón oendu jókuae miari mbaɨu regua yave, jare mbae oipota jei vae yave, omboete Tumpa. Jare ou ye Israel iñemuña reta jeyupa pe yave jei: —¡Pepüa, echa yandeYa omee pepo pe Madián iñemuña reta!" 
Judges7:16 Jare omboyao jókuae tresciento kuimbae mboapɨ yemboyao pe, jare omee opaete vae ipo pe mimbɨguasu jare tinaa ipombae japɨpe pe mechero jendɨ reve." 
Judges7:17 Jare jei chupe reta: —Pemae cheré, jare peyapo che ayapo rami. Che aja ma aväe teyupa jembeɨ jovaicho pe yave, pe reta peyapo che ayapo rami." 
Judges7:18 Che amoñeeta mimbɨguasu, jare opaete che ndive ñogüɨnoi vae reta; jayave pe reta pemoñee vi mimbɨ guasu opaete teyupa jembeɨ rupi, jare pesapúkai: “¡OreYa jee re jare Gedeón re!”" 
Judges7:19 Gedeón jare cien kuimbae jae ndive güɨraja vae reta opa yogüɨraja oväe teyupa jembeɨ ïru pe, pɨare mbɨte yave sundaro omaeäro vae reta opa ramo oyopoepɨ yave; jare omoñee reta mimbɨguasu, jare oyoka reta tinaa ipo pe güɨraja reta vae." 
Judges7:20 Jare jókuae mboapɨ yemboyao vae reta omoñee mimbɨguasu jare oyoka reta tinaa, jare oipɨɨ reta iyasu kotɨ imechero, jare iyakatu kotɨ mimbɨguasu omoñee reta vae, jare osapúkai reta: “¡OreYa jee re jare Gedeón ikɨsepuku re!”" 
Judges7:21 Jare metei ñavo vae oyemboɨ sɨmbi jenda ñavo pe teyupa iyɨ́vɨri rupi; jayave opaete tovaicho reta oë osɨi jäse reve otekuarai reta. 
Judges7:22 Jare jókuae tresciento vae reta jeiete omoñee mimbɨguasu. Jare yandeYa omoñerarouka oyoupii aeño opaete teyupa pegua reta. Jare tovaicho reta otekuarai yogüɨraja regua oväe Bet-sita kotɨ, Zerera re katu, Abel-mehola jembeɨ pe, Tabat pe."
