Judges7:23 Jayave oyomboatɨ Neftalí iñemuña reta, Aser iñemuña reta, jare opaete Manasés iñemuña reta oaɨkuemoña vaerä Madián iñemuña reta." 
Judges7:24 Gedeón omondo vi ñee jerajaa reta opaete ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pegua rupi oyókuai reve kuimbae reta ogüeyɨ vaerä oñoraro Madián iñemuña reta ndive jare opɨ̈ro reta vaerä ɨ̈aka Bet-bara jare Jordán rupi tape oasa vae, ndei yogüɨraja oväe joko pe mbove. Efraín iñemuña reta oyapo jókuae mborookuai," 
Judges7:25 jare oipɨɨ reta mókoi reve mburuvicha guasu Madián iñemuña reta juvicha, Oreb jare Zeeb. Oreb oyuka reta ɨ̈vavira Oreb jee añave vae pe, jare Zeeb oyuka reta Zeeb jee vae pe, uva oñetɨamisea pe. Jare oaɨkuemoña poi reta ma yave, güɨraja reta Gedeón pe, Oreb jare Zeeb iñäkagüe, ɨ̈aka Jordán jovaicho pe." 
Judges8:1 Efraín iñemuña pegua reta iyarasɨ jare oyoaka reta Gedeón ndive, echa jae mbaetɨ omondo omombarandu reta yogüɨraja yave oñeraro Madián iñemuña reta ndive." 
Judges8:2 Ërei jae jei chupe reta: —¿Mbaetɨ yera peikuaa pe reta peyapogüe tuicha yae ko che ayapo vae güi vae? Michiecha peyapo vae ko tuicha yae ore reta royapo vae güi. 
Judges8:3 Tumpa omee pepo pe Oreb jare Zeeb, Madián iñemuña juvicha reta, ¿mbae pa che ayapo amboyovake vaerä kuae peyapogüe? Kuae ñee reta Gedeón güi oendu reta yave, Efraín iñemuña reta iyarasɨ poi reta ikotɨ." 
Judges8:4 Gedeón jare tresciento kuimbae reta yogüeru oväe Jordán pe jare oasa reta jovaicho pe, yepe tëi ikangɨ yae reta ërei jekuaeñoi oporoaɨkuemoña reta." 
Judges8:5 Jare jei Sucot pegua reta pe: —Peyapo ikavi vae, pemee mbae yepe tou che ndive yogüeru vae reta, echa ikangɨ yae reta. Roaɨkuemoña ko royu Zeba jare Zalmuna, Madián iñemuña reta juvicha guasu reta." 
Judges8:6 Jare Sucot pegua mburuvicha reta jei: —¿Opa ma yera peipɨɨ Zeba jare Zalmuna romongaru vaerä ndesundaro reta? 
Judges8:7 Jare Gedeón jei chupe reta: —¡YandeYa opa omee Zeba jare Zalmuna chepo pe güire, ayu yeta jare opata ponupa ñurati ñuu rupigua pe!" 
Judges8:8 Joko güi ojo Peniel pe, jare oiporu vi Sucot pegua reta pe oiporu rami. Ërei Peniel pegua reta jei, Sucot pegua reta jei rami etei," 
Judges8:9 Gedeón jei chupe reta: —¡Ayerova ye aporomoamɨría güi yave, opata amboai kuae o ɨvate!" 
Judges8:10 Zeba jare Zalmuna ñogüɨnoi Carcor pe quince mil sundaro ndive, jaeño ma jókuae sundaro reta kuaraɨ oëa kotɨgua jembɨregüe, echa opa omano chugüi reta ciento veinte mil kuimbae ñeraro regua." 
Judges8:11 Gedeón ojo tape ñuu jembeɨ rupi ojo vae rupi. Noba jare Jogbeha güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, jare oë chupe reta mbaetɨ oyangareko ñogüɨnoi yave." 
Judges8:12 Zeba jare Zalmuna opa oë otekuarai, ërei Gedeón oaɨkuemoña jare oipɨɨ jókuae mókoi Madián iñemuña juvicha reta jare isundaro reta opa oñemoai moai." 
Judges8:13 Gedeón, Joás taɨ oyerova ye ñeraroa güi, ndei pɨ̈tu mbove." 
Judges8:14 Jayave oipɨɨ metei kunumi Sucot pegua, jare oparandu chupe mburuvicha reta re; jare jókuae kunumi oikuatía omee setenta y siete mburuvicha reta jare tenondegua vae reta Sucot pegua jee." 
Judges8:15 Jayave Gedeón ojo Sucot pe jare jei jókuae tëta pegua reta pe: —¿Pemaendúa pa kërai pepuka cheré Zeba jare Zalmuna jeko pegua? ¿Pemaendúa pa peäteɨ pemongaru chesundaro reta ikangɨ yae yogüeru yave pere oreve mbaetɨño roipɨɨ vae? ¡Añave, ko ñogüɨnoi!" 
Judges8:16 Jayave Gedeón oipɨɨ ñurati ñuu rupigua jare pɨpe oinupa Sucot pegua tenondegua vae reta. 
Judges8:17 Opa oitɨ o ɨvate Peniel pegua jare opa vi oyuka jókuae tëta guasu pegua reta. 
Judges8:18 Jaɨkue rupi oparandu Zeba jare Zalmuna pe: —¿Kërai pa jókuae kuimbae reta peyuka Tabor pe vae? Jae reta jei chupe: —Nde rami etei reta, metei ñavo mburuvicha taɨ retaecha." 
Judges8:19 Jayave Gedeón jäse osapúkai: —¡Cherɨkeɨ reta ko! ¡Chesɨ imembɨraɨe reta ko peyuka! ¡YandeYa jee re tae peve, peyukaä yave mona, ngaraa tëi poyuka!" 
Judges8:20 Jare jei taɨrɨpɨ Jeter pe: —¡Epüa jare opa eyuka! Ërei Jeter mbaetɨ oekɨ ikɨsepuku jɨru güi, echa taɨrusu yae vɨteri ko." 
Judges8:21 Jayave Zeba jare Zalmuna jei reta Gedeón pe: —¡Nde oreyuka! ¡Jökorai yaikuaa kuimbae jëia ko vae nde! Jayave Gedeón opüa jare opa oyuka, Zeba jare Zalmuna icamello reta ipoɨ opa oekɨ." 
Judges8:22 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta jei Gedeón pe: —Eiko oreruvicharä nde jare neñemuña reta, echa oreyora Madián iñemuña reta ipo güi." 
Judges8:23 Ërei Gedeón jei chupe reta: —Che, ani cheñemuña reta ave ngaraa roiko peruvicharä YandeYa ko peruvicha." 
Judges8:24 Jaeño aipota pemee cheve moäka-vera reta pepɨ̈rogüe. Echa Madián pegua reta omomora yae oro, jae ko ismaelita reta." 
Judges8:25 Israel iñemuña reta ipɨakatu reve oipɨso ɨvɨ re ñeapevaka, jare metei ñavo oñono pɨpe moäka-vera reta opɨ̈rogüe, jare jei reta Gedeón pe: —¡Ko oï!" 
Judges8:26 Jare opaete moäka-vera oyemboatɨgüe oupitɨ seri diecinueve kilo oro, oyepapambae reve mbae ipöra vae jare mbae jepɨ vae, temimonderä pɨ̈ta vae mburuvicha guasu reta Madián iñemuña pegua reta omonde vae jare camello yayu regua reta ipoɨ." 
Judges8:27 Jókuae oro güi Gedeón oyapo tumpa-raanga, jare oñono Ofra pe, jae jëta pe, jare opaete Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja joko pe jókuae tumpa-raanga jeko pegua jare opia reta Tumpa güi; kuae rupi ou yemboavai Gedeón pe jare jo pegua reta pe." 
Judges8:28 Jökorai Madián iñemuña reta oñemomichiuka Israel iñemuña reta pe, jare mbaetɨ ye ma oñemopüa reta. Gedeón oikove oiko ramboeve oime mbɨakatu jókuae ɨvɨ pe cuarenta año." 
Judges8:29 Jerobaal, jae ko Gedeón, ojo oiko jo ae pe, güɨnoi setenta taɨ, echa jeta yae ko jembireko." 
Judges8:30  
Judges8:31 Metei kuña güɨrekoiño vae Siquem pegua, imembɨ vi chupe, jare jókuae taɨ ombojee Abimelec." 
Judges8:32 Gedeón, Joás taɨ omano indechi yae pe, jare oñotɨ reta tu Joás jɨvɨa Ofra pe oïa pe, Abiezer iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Judges8:33 Gedeón omano güire Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oyerova ye Tumpa güi omboete vaerä baal reta, jare oiparavo reta itumparä Baal-berit." 
Judges8:34 Jare mbaetɨ imaendúa Israel iñemuña reta yandeYa Tumpa re, opaete jovaicho reta ipo güi oyora vae," 
Judges8:35 mbaetɨ vi omboyekuaa reta ipɨakavi Jerobaal jo pegua reta re, jae ko Gedeón, jókuae ikavi vae oyapo Israel iñemuña reta vae re." 
Judges9:1 Jerobaal taɨ Abimelec, ojo Siquem pe imiari vaerä ichɨ jaɨe reta ndive, jei reve:" 
Judges9:2 —Pomoñera pemiari vaerä opaete Siquem pegua reta ndive, ¿jaekavi ra ñogüɨnoi peruvicharä setenta vae Jerobaal taɨ reta, ani metei kuimbaeño? Pemaendúa che jae ko perëtara ete metei tugüɨ rupi vae." 
Judges9:3 Jare ichɨ jaɨe reta omombeu jókuae ñee opaete kuimbae Siquem pegua reta pe, jare opaete vae ipɨa oñono Abimelec kotɨ, echa jei reta: “Ñanerëtara ko.”" 
Judges9:4 Jare Baal-berit itupao güi oekɨ reta setenta reare korepoti pegua omee Abimelec pe. Jókuae korepoti pe Abimelec omboepɨ kuimbae reta yogüɨrekoiño vae pe yogüɨraja vaerä jupíe 
Judges9:5 jare yogüɨraja reta jupíe Ofra pe, tu Jerobaal oikosea pe, jare opa oyuka tɨkeɨ setenta vae reta meteia ita reño; ërei Jotam oñemi jare oasayepe, jae ko Jerobaal taɨ taɨkuegua ete." 
Judges9:6 Jayave opaete Siquem pegua reta oyemboatɨ Milo pegua reta ndive ɨvɨra encina jare ita oïa pe, jare omboguapɨ reta Abimelec mburuvicha guasurä." 
Judges9:7 Jotam oikuaa yave oyeupi ɨvɨtɨ Gerizim re, jare joko güi täta osapúkai opaete vae oendu vaerä: “¡Peyeapɨsaka cheré opaete kuimbae Siquem pegua reta! ¡Jare jökorai Tumpa toyeapɨsaka peré!" 
Judges9:8 Metei ara ɨvɨra reta oyomboatɨ oiparavo juvicha guasurä, jare jei reta olivo pe: —Eiko oreruvicha guasurä." 
Judges9:9 Ërei olivo jei: —¿Aeyata ra cheasaite Tumpa oyemboete pɨpe vae jare kuimbae reta vae, aja vaerä aiko ɨvɨra reta juvicha guasurä?" 
Judges9:10 Jayave ɨvɨra reta jei ɨva pe: —Eiko oreruvicha guasurä. 
Judges9:11 Ërei ɨva jei: —¿Aeyata ra cheia kavi jare jëe ngatu vae, aja vaerä aiko ɨvɨra reta juvicha guasurä?" 
Judges9:12 Jayave ɨvɨra reta jei uva pe: —Eiko oreruvicha guasurä. 
Judges9:13 Ërei uva jei chupe reta: —¿Aeyata ra vino omboyerovia Tumpa jare kuimbae reta vae, aja vaerä aiko ɨvɨra reta juvicha guasurä?" 
Judges9:14 Jare mbaetɨ ye ma yave ɨvɨra reta jei yuu pe: —Eiko oreruvicha guasurä. 
Judges9:15 Jare yuu jei: —Añetete ko peipota aiko peruvicha guasurä yave, opaete vae peiko jaegüe rupi, jare mbaetɨ yave oëta tata chegüi opa vaerä oapɨ ɨ̈vɨrare reta ɨvategüe Líbano pegua." 
Judges9:16 Jare añave che aparandu peve: ¿Pemboete jare pepɨa jupi reve kavi pa ko pemboguapɨ Abimelec mburuvicha guasurä? ¿Jökorai pa Jerobaal jare jo pegua reta re pemae, jae peparareko rami?" 
Judges9:17 Echa cheru oñemoë perekovia pe jare oñeraro, jökorai omee jekove peyora vaerä Madián iñemuña reta ipo güi;" 
Judges9:18 ërei ngatu pe reta peñemopüa cheru jo pegua reta re, opa peyuka taɨ reta setenta vae meteia ita reño; jare perëtara Abimelec pemboguapɨ mburuvicha guasurä Siquem pegua reta re." 
Judges9:19 Ërei che jae peve añave: Pe reta peyapo kavi yave jupi vae jare pemboete kavi Jerobaal, jare jo pegua reta, peiko kavita Abimelec ndive, jare jae pe ndive;" 
Judges9:20 ërei mbaetɨ yave, ¡Abimelec güi toë peve tata opa vaerä Siquem pegua reta jare Milo pegua reta omokañɨtei; jare Siquem güi jare Milo güi toë tata opa vaerä omokañɨtei Abimelec!”" 
Judges9:21 Jotam opa güire jei kuae ñee, otekuarai jare ojo oiko Beer pe, echa okɨɨye tɨkeɨ Abimelec güi." 
Judges9:22 Abimelec oiko mburuvicharä Israel iñemuña reta re mboapɨ año rupi yave," 
Judges9:23 Tumpa ombou yemongeta ikavimbae Abimelec pe jare Siquem pegua kuimbae reta pe, jare Siquem pegua reta opüa Abimelec re," 
Judges9:24 jökorai Abimelec pe jekovia vaerä setenta Jerobaal taɨ reta opa oyuka vae, jare vi Siquem pegua reta oporomborɨ katu vae pe." 
Judges9:25 Jare Siquem pegua reta omondo oñemi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi ɨvɨtɨ re jare kia oasa jokoropi vae güi opɨ̈ro reta imbaembae. Jare kuae oikuaa Abimelec. 
Judges9:26 Jare Gaal, Ebed taɨ oasa jëtara reta ndive Siquem rupi, jare Siquem pegua reta güɨrovia katu jese reta," 
Judges9:27 kuae reta ñogüɨnoe oipoo uva ko pe jare oyapo reta vino, oyapo reta vi arete tuicha vae, oike okaru jare okau reta itumpa-raanga reta jo pe, jei reve ñee kavimbae Abimelec kotɨ." 
Judges9:28 Jare Gaal, Ebed taɨ jei: “¿Mbae mbatee pa Abimelec, Jerobaal taɨñoä pa ko, Zebul jaeä pa imborɨa? ¿Kia pa Siquem oiko vaerä Abimelec jeia re? Yayeokuai Hamor pe, jae ko kuae tëta omboɨpɨ vae, jare agüɨye yaiko Abimelec, Jerobaal taɨ jeia re." 
Judges9:29 ¡Che peruvicharä aiko yave mona, aramoete ko anoeta amombo Abimelec!” Jare jei ye: “¡Abimelec, ekua emboatɨ ndesundaro reta jare eyu ñañoraro!”" 
Judges9:30 Zebul, tëta guasu juvicha oikuaa yave jókuae Gaal, Ebed taɨ jei vae, iyarasɨ yae" 
Judges9:31 jare omondo vɨari kuae ñee Abimelec pe tëta Aruma pe: “Gaal, Ebed taɨ yogüeru jëtara reta ndive Siquem pe, jare omboarasɨuka ñogüɨnoi ndekotɨ tëta pegua reta." 
Judges9:32 Jáeramo ekua pɨ̈tu yave ndesundaro reta ndive peñemi peï. 
Judges9:33 Jare köe yave pepüa tëta re, jare Gaal oë tëta pegua reta ndive oñoraro pe ndive yave, eyapo chupe rerovia jae kavita vae.”" 
Judges9:34 Jökorai Abimelec jare opaete isundaro reta ñogüɨnoe pɨ̈tu yave jare oñemi kavi okätɨro reta tëta Siquem ikupe rupi, irundɨ yemboyao pe." 
Judges9:35 Jare Gaal, Ebed taɨ oë yave tëta guasu jöke pe, Abimelec jare isundaro reta ñogüɨnoe jókuae oñemi okätɨro ñogüɨnoia güi." 
Judges9:36 Gaal oecha yave, jei Zebul pe: —¡Mase, ɨvɨtɨ güi ogüeyɨ yogüeru sundaro! Zebul jei: —Mbaetɨ ko, ɨvɨtɨ iküaraɨa ko sundaroecha ndeve." 
Judges9:37 Ërei Gaal jekuae jei: —¡Ɨvɨtɨ rupi joko vi ogüeyɨ yogüeru sundaro! ¡Jare ïru yemboyao joko yogüeru maratuta vae imombeúa reta ɨvɨra encina kotɨ tape ojo vae rupi! 
Judges9:38 Zebul jei chupe: —¡Emoë neñee añave, reyemboete reve mbae rerese vae! ¡Nde rerese, Abimelec mbaeä etei ko, yaiko vaerä jëia re! Joko ñogüɨnoi sundaro reta reroviambae vae. ¡Ekua, eñeraro añave jae reta ndive!" 
Judges9:39 Jare Gaal oë Siquem pegua reta jenonde, jare oñoraro Abimelec ndive." 
Judges9:40 Ërei Abimelec omoña, jare Gaal otekuarai chugüi. Jeta yae omano vae, ojoi oväe tëta guasu jöke pe." 
Judges9:41 Jare Abimelec opɨta Aruma pe; jare Zebul opa omoë omombo Gaal jëtara reta ndive, agüɨye vaerä ma yogüɨreko Siquem pe." 
Judges9:42 Pɨareve pe Siquem pegua reta ñogüɨnoe ikatu pe kaa pe. Abimelec oikuaa yave," 
Judges9:43 mboapɨ yemboyao oyapo isundaro reta jare oñemi kavi okätɨro reta kaa pe; jare oecha reta yave Siquem pegua reta oë tëta güi oporepeña reta jese. 
Judges9:44 Jae jare jupiegua reta oporepeña tëta guasu jöke re jare opɨ̈ro, ïru mókoi yemboyao reta oporoyuka ramboeve ikatu rupi." 
Judges9:45 Jare Abimelec oñoraro tëta guasu pegua reta ndive opaete jókuae ara, jare opɨ̈ro, opa oyuka jókuae tëta pegua reta jare omoai yukɨ pɨpe." 
Judges9:46 Kuae oikuaa yave o ɨvate Siquem pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta, opa oñepɨ̈ro itumpa Berit itupao pe." 
Judges9:47 Jare Abimelec oikuaa oime ko oyemboatɨ ñogüɨnoi joko pe yave," 
Judges9:48 ojo opaete isundaro ndive ɨvɨtɨ Salmón pe, jare metei yɨɨ pe oyasɨa ɨvɨra jäka, jare oñono iyatiɨ re, jare jei opaete isundaro reta pe oyapo reta vaerä aramoete jae oyapo rami." 
Judges9:49 Opaete oyasɨa ɨvɨra jäka jare yogüɨraja reta Abimelec jaɨkue, yogüɨraja regua oväe reta tupao oñekësea pe, joko pe omboatɨ reta jókuae ɨvɨra jare oyatapɨ reta jese, jökorai opa oyuka o ɨvate Siquem pegua reta, oupitɨ ñogüɨnoi mil rupi kuimbae jare kuña reta." 
Judges9:50 Jaɨkue rupi Abimelec oporepeña tëta Tebes re, opa oñova javoi opɨ̈ro." 
Judges9:51 Jókuae tëta mbɨte pe oime metei o ɨvate, joko pe oñemi opaete jókuae tëta pegua reta, kuimbae jare kuña reta jare opaete mburuvicha reta. Oyokenda reta öke omotäta reve japɨpe kotɨ jare oyeupi reta o iárambo;" 
Judges9:52 ërei Abimelec ojo oväe jókuae öke pe yave oporepeña jese. Oyatapɨta ma jese yave," 
Judges9:53 metei kuña oitɨ jese ita trigo oyeyoso pɨpe vae jare oyoka iñäka. 
Judges9:54 Abimelec oenɨi aramoete imborɨa yeopiaka ovoɨ chupe vae, jare jei chupe: “Eekɨ ndekɨsepuku jare cheyuka, echa mbaetɨ aipota jei reta vae: ‘Metei kuña pe ko oyeyukauka.’ ”" 
Judges9:55 Israel iñemuña reta oecha yave Abimelec omano, opa ye yogüɨraja jëta jëta ae kotɨ." 
Judges9:56 Jökorai Tumpa omboepɨuka Abimelec pe oporoyuka vae, echa oyapo ikavimbae tu kotɨ, opa oyuka setenta tɨkeɨ reta vae rupi." 
Judges9:57 Jare Tumpa omee vi Siquem pegua reta omboepɨ vaerä iporoyuka. Jökorai Jotam iyepopeyu ou oyembopo, jae ko Jerobaal taɨ." 
Judges10:1 Abimelec jaɨkue rupi, metei kuimbae Isacar iñemuña pegua Tola jee vae, Fúa taɨ, Dodo jɨmɨmino oñemopüa oepɨ vaerä Israel iñemuña reta. Tola oiko Samir pe ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pegua pe," 
Judges10:2 jare veintitré año oiko mburuvicharä Israel pe, omano jare oñotɨ reta Samir pe." 
Judges10:3 Jaɨkue rupi oñemopüa Jair Galaad pegua, jare oiko mburuvicharä Israel pe veintidó año." 
Judges10:4 Jair güɨnoi treinta taɨ, mburika re opo vae reta, jare güɨnoi treinta tëta guasu; kuae tëta guasu reta jee “Jair jëta guasu reta”. Kuae reta ñogüɨnoi ɨvɨ Galaad pe." 
Judges10:5 Jair omano yave oñotɨ reta Camón pe. 
Judges10:6 Jare Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oyapo ye ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai, jare omboete reta Baal jare Astarot, jökoraiño vi tumpa ambuae reta Siria pegua, Sidón pegua, Moab pegua, Amón iñemuña reta itumpa jare filisteo reta itumpa reta pe; jare oeya reta yandeYa, mbaetɨ oyeokuai reta chupe." 
Judges10:7 Jáeramo yandeYa iyarasɨ ikotɨ reta jare omee reta filisteo reta ipo pe jare Amón iñemuña reta ipo pe. 
Judges10:8 Jayave güive, dieciocho año, filisteo reta jare Amón iñemuña reta oiporarauka yae opaete Israel iñemuña Galaad pe yogüɨreko vae, Jordán jovaicho pe amorreo reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Judges10:9 Jare Amón iñemuña reta oasa vi ɨ̈aka Jordán oñoraro vaerä Judá, Benjamín jare Efraín iñemuña reta ndive, jare Israel iñemuña reta ipɨatɨtɨ yae." 
Judges10:10 Jayave oyerure reta yandeYa pe omborɨ reta vaerä, jare jei reta: “OreTumpa, oreyoa ndekotɨ, echa rosɨrɨ ndegüi jare rojo romboete jare royeokuai baal reta pe.”" 
Judges10:11 Jare yandeYa jei Israel iñemuña reta pe: “Pe reta peiporara yae peikose Egiptoɨgua reta ipo pe, amorreo reta ipo pe, Amón iñemuña reta ipo pe, filisteo reta ipo pe," 
Judges10:12 Sidón pegua reta ipo pe, Amalec iñemuña reta ipo pe, jare Madián iñemuña reta ipo pe; ërei pe reta peiporu yave cheve, che pogüɨroasayepe." 
Judges10:13 Ërei pe reta jekuae chereeya, jare pemboete tumpa ambuae reta, jayave che ngaraa ye ma poepɨ." 
Judges10:14 ¡Pekua, jare peiporu yemborɨ jókuae tumpa reta peiparavo peyeupe vae pe! ¡Jae reta tapereroasayepe peiporara peï yave!”" 
Judges10:15 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta jei yandeYa pe: “Oreyoa ko, eyapo oreve nde nderemimbota, ërei, ¡eyapo oreve ikavi vae, orereepɨ añave!”" 
Judges10:16 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oeya tumpa ambuae reta jare oyerova ye reta omee mbaemboete yandeYa pe; jare yandeYa mbaetɨ ma güɨropɨa Israel iñemuña reta oiporara ñogüɨnoi vae. 
Judges10:17 Oyomboatɨ Amón iñemuña reta jare oyembojeyupa Galaad pe. Israel iñemuña reta oyomboatɨ vi jare oyembojeyupa reta Mizpa pe. 
Judges10:18 Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨreko Galaad pe vae, jare juvicha reta, jei reta oyoupe, kia oporogüɨraja ñeraroa pe oñoraro vaerä Amón iñemuña reta ndive vae, toiko mburuvicharä." 
Judges11:1 Jefté jae ko jëia yae vae ɨvɨ Galaad pegua. Jae ko metei kuña iyaguasa pota vae imembɨ, tu jee Galaad;" 
Judges11:2 ërei Galaad jembireko imembɨ ye mbovɨ chupe, jare kuae reta okuakuaa ma yave güɨnoe reta omombo ipɨte güi Jefté, jei reta reve chupe: “Mbaetɨta yanderu imbaembaegüe renoi ndembaerä.” Ichɨ tee jeko pegua." 
Judges11:3 Jayave Jefté otekuarai tɨvɨ reta güi jare ojo oñemoëta Tob pe, joko pe jeko kavimbae vae reta oñemoïru jae ndive jare oë jae reta ndive oyapo ikavimbae." 
Judges11:4 Oväe ara, metei ara Amón iñemuña reta oñemopüa Israel iñemuña reta re," 
Judges11:5 jare Galaad pegua tenondegua vae reta omondo güeru vaerä Jefté, ɨvɨ Tob güi," 
Judges11:6 jei reta chupe: —Eyu, roipota nde reiko oreruvicharä ñañoraro vaerä Amón iñemuña reta ndive." 
Judges11:7 Jefté jei chupe reta: —¿Chemotareɨä yera pe reta, jare chemomboä yera cheru jo güi? ¿Maera pa añave peiporara ma peï yave chereeka?" 
Judges11:8 Jare Galaad pegua tenondegua vae reta jei: —Añetete roiporara yae ma roï vae jeko pegua royu roeka reo vaerä reñeraro Amón iñemuña reta ndive jare eiko oreruvicharä opaete Galaad pe roiko vae pe. 
Judges11:9 Jare Jefté jei chupe reta: —Pe reta peipota ayerova ye, aja vaerä añoraro Amón iñemuña reta ndive, ërei yandeYa omee ko cheve aporomoamɨri vaerä yave, aikota peruvicharä." 
Judges11:10 Jare Galaad pegua tenondegua vae reta jei chupe: —YandeYa oikuaa oï yanderegua, toroyapo opaete kuae rere vae." 
Judges11:11 Jayave Jefté ojo jupíe reta, jare opaete vae oñono mburuvicharä jare ñeraro pe tenondeguarä. Mizpa pe, Jefté jei ye tenonde yave jei vae, yandeYa jóvai." 
Judges11:12 Jare omondo ñee jerajaa reta Amón iñemuña reta juvicha guasu pe, jei reve: “¿Mbae teko pa reväe cheré reyu vaerä repüa cherëta re?”" 
Judges11:13 Jare Amón iñemuña reta juvicha guasu jei ñee jerajaa reta pe: “Pe, Israel iñemuña reta Egipto güi peë yave, pepɨ̈ro oregüi oreɨvɨ, ɨ̈aka Arnón güive ɨ̈aka Jaboc pe jare Jordán. Jáeramo añave pemee ye cheve ikavi rupi.”" 
Judges11:14 Jefté jekuae omondo ye ïru ñee jerajaa reta Amón iñemuña reta juvicha guasu pe," 
Judges11:15 jei vaerä chupe: “Jefté jei körai: Israel iñemuña reta mbaetɨ ko opɨ̈ro Moab-ɨgua reta iɨvɨ ani Amón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ ave. 
Judges11:16 Echa Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe Egipto güi yave, oasa reta ñuu rupi Ɨguasu Pɨ̈ta vae kotɨ, jökorai yogüeru oväe Cades pe." 
Judges11:17 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta omondo ñee jerajaa reta Edom pegua mburuvicha guasu pe oiporu vaerä Israel iñemuña reta oasa iɨvɨ rupi, ërei jae mbaetɨ oipota, jökoraiño vi mburuvicha guasu Moab pegua pe oiporu tëi, ërei mbaetɨ vi oipota. Jáeramo opɨta reta Cades pe." 
Judges11:18 Jaɨkue rupi yogüɨraja reta ñuu rupi, opa oyere Edom iɨvɨ re jare Moab re, yogüɨraja regua oväe Moab güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, jare joko pe oyembojeyupa reta ɨ̈aka Arnón jovaicho pe. Ërei mbaetɨ oasa reta, echa joko güi oyemboɨpɨ Moab iɨvɨ." 
Judges11:19 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta omondo ñee jerajaa reta Sehón amorreo reta juvicha guasu Hesbón pegua pe, jei reve: ‘Romoñera remaeño vaerä roasa ndeɨvɨ rupi rojo regua roväe oreɨvɨ pe.’" 
Judges11:20 Sehón mbaetɨ güɨrovia jare mbaetɨ omaeño oasa reta iɨvɨ rupi, ërei omboatɨ opaete isundaro jare oyembojeyupa Jahaza pe, jare oñeraro Israel iñemuña reta ndive." 
Judges11:21 Ërei oreYa Israel iTumpa omee Sehón jare opaete vae, Israel iñemuña reta ipo pe, jare oporomoamɨri Israel iñemuña reta, jökorai oyemombae opaete jókuae ɨvɨ re amorreo reta yogüɨreko pɨpe vae re;" 
Judges11:22 oyemombae opaete amorreo reta iɨvɨ re, Arnón güive Jaboc pe, jare ñuu güive ɨ̈aka Jordán pe." 
Judges11:23 Jayave, ¿nde reipota pa opa renoe remombo oreYa opɨ̈ro amorreo reta güi jare omee Israel iñemuña reta imbaerä vae?" 
Judges11:24 Netumpa Quemos omee mbae ndeve yave, ¿ndembaeä pa? Jökorai ko oreYa Israel iTumpa opa omoë omombo vae reta imbaegüe opɨta orembaerä." 
Judges11:25 ¿Reyererovia katu yae pa mburuvicha guasu Balac Moab pegua Zipor taɨ güi? Jae mbaetɨ ko ou oñeraro Israel iñemuña reta ndive. 
Judges11:26 Tresciento año ma roiko Hesbón pe, Aroer jare tëta raɨ iyɨvɨrigua jare opaete tëta reta ɨ̈aka Arnón iyɨvɨrigua reta pe, ¿maera pa mbaetɨ peñeengeta kuae ɨvɨ re opaete jókuae ara reta oasagüe rupi?" 
Judges11:27 Che mbaetɨ etei ikavimbae ayapo ndeve. Nde reyapo reï ikavimbae, echa reyu reporepeña oreré. Ërei oreYa ko jae oporojäa vae, jae tojäa Israel iñemuña reta jare Amón iñemuña reta.”" 
Judges11:28 Ërei Amón iñemuña reta juvicha guasu mbaetɨ oyandu Jefté iñee jerajaa reta omombeu vae. 
Judges11:29 Jare yandeYa iEspíritu ou Jefté re, jare jae oasa Galaad jare Manasés rupi, jare oasa vi Mizpa Galaad pegua rupi oike vaerä ojo Amón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Judges11:30 Jare Jefté oyapo ñererökuavee yandeYa pe, jei reve: “Amón iñemuña reta remee yave chepo pe," 
Judges11:31 che tamee ndeve mbota oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae jókuae tenonde oë cherövaiti cherëta güi vae, ayerova ye yave ñeraroa güi.”" 
Judges11:32 Jare Jefté ojo oñeraro Amón iñemuña reta ndive, jare yandeYa omee ipo pe." 
Judges11:33 Jefté oyuka jeta Amón iñemuña reta jare opɨ̈ro veinte tëta guasu, Aroer güive ojoi oväe Minit pe jare ɨvɨ ñäkɨ ngatúa uva renda pe. Jökorai Israel iñemuña reta omoamɨri Amón iñemuña reta." 
Judges11:34 Jare Jefté oyerova ye jëta Mizpa kotɨ yave, tayɨ jaevaeño oë oövaiti güɨropo reve jare ombopu angúa raɨ, Jefté mbaetɨ ye ïru tayɨ ani taɨ güɨnoi chugüi." 
Judges11:35 Jayave, jae oecha yave tayɨ, omondoro jemimonde jei reve: —¡Cherayɨ, tuicha chembopɨatɨtɨ! ¡Nde etei reyu chepɨatɨtɨrä, echa añererökuavee ko yandeYa pe, jókuae ambopota ko chupe!" 
Judges11:36 Jare tayɨ jei chupe: —Cheru, eyapo che ndive jókuae reñererökuavee yandeYa pe vae, echa jae ombopo ma ndeve remoamɨri vaerä nderovaicho Amón iñemuña reta." 
Judges11:37 Ërei romoñera mókoi yasɨ remee vaerä cheve aguata ɨvɨtɨ rupi, cheïru reta ndive ayaeo reve, amendambae amanota vae jeko pegua." 
Judges11:38 Jare Jefté omee chupe mókoi yasɨ, jókuae ara rupi oguata iñeïru reta ndive ɨvɨtɨ rupi, oyaeo, echa omendambae omanota." 
Judges11:39 Kuae jaɨkue rupi ou ye tu jëta pe, jare tu oyapo jae ndive oñererökuavee rami. Jökorai Jefté tayɨ omano oasambae reve kuimbae ndive." 
Judges11:40 Jáeramo Israel iñemuña reta jeko, jae ko año ñavo kuñatai reta yogüɨraja oyaeo irundɨ ara Jefté Galaad pegua tayɨ re." 
Judges12:1 Jayave kuimbae reta Efraín iñemuña pegua reta oyomboatɨ jare oasa reta ɨ̈aka Jordán ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ Zafón re katu, jare yogüɨraja jei reta Jefté pe: —¿Maera pa reasa reo reñeraro Amón iñemuña reta ndive remombeumbae reve oreve? Echa rojota tëi ko nderupíe, ¡añave, roapɨta ndero nde ndive!" 
Judges12:2 Jefté jei chupe reta: —Che, jare cherëtaɨgua reta rogüɨnoi teko yavai yae vae Amón iñemuña reta ndive, jare che poekauka, ërei pe reta mbaetɨ peyu orereepɨ." 
Judges12:3 Jare aecha mbaetɨ ma peyu oremborɨ vaerä yave, añemoëgua mano pe jare añoraro Amón iñemuña reta ndive, jare yandeYa omee cheve amoamɨri vaerä. ¿Maera pa añave peyu peñeraro vaerä che ndive?" 
Judges12:4 Jayave Jefté omboatɨ opaete kuimbae Galaad pegua, jare oñeraro Efraín iñemuña reta ndive jare omoamɨri. Efraín iñemuña pegua reta jei: “Efraín jare Manasés iñemuña reta güi oëgüe reta ko ñogüɨnoi Galaad pegua reta ipɨte pe.”" 
Judges12:5 Galaad pegua reta opɨ̈ro Efraín iñemuña reta güi ɨ̈aka Jordán tɨpɨmbaea jare amogüe Efraín pegua otekuarai vae oväe joko pe jare oiporu oasa vaerä yave, jae reta oparandu chupe Efraín iñemuña reta pegua ra ko vae. Jare jókuae otekuarai vae jei yave mbaetɨ," 
Judges12:6 oiporu jei vaerä “Shibolet”; jae jei yave “Sibolet” oipɨɨ jare oñaseokɨ̈ti ɨ̈aka Jordán tɨpɨmbaea pe, echa mbaetɨ ipuere jei vaerä jókuae ñee pe; jökorai oyuka reta Efraín iñemuña pegua reta cuarenta y dos mil kuimbae." 
Judges12:7 Jefté oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä ova año. Omano yave oñotɨ reta metei tëta Galaad pegua pe. 
Judges12:8 Jefté jaɨkue rupi, oiko mburuvicharä Ibzán, Belén pegua," 
Judges12:9 güɨnoi treinta taɨ jare treinta tayɨ, jare opareve omomenda tëta ambuae pegua reta ndive, Ibzán oiko mburuvicharä Israel iñemuña reta pe chiu año," 
Judges12:10 jare omano yave oñotɨ reta Belén pe. 
Judges12:11 Jaɨkue rupi, Elón, Zabulón iñemuña pegua oiko mburuvicharä Israel iñemuña reta pe payandepo año" 
Judges12:12 jare omano yave oñotɨ reta Ajalón pe, jëtara Zabulón iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe." 
Judges12:13 Jae jaɨkue rupi, Abdón, Hilel Piratón pegua taɨ, oiko mburuvicharä Israel iñemuña reta pe" 
Judges12:14 chau año rupi. Abdón güɨnoi cuarenta taɨ jare treinta jɨmɨmino, mburika re opo vae reta." 
Judges12:15 Omano yave oñotɨ reta Piratón pe, Efraín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ pe oï vae pe, Amalec pegua ɨvɨtɨ pe." 
Judges13:1 Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oyapo ye ikavimbae yandeYa jesa róvai, jare yandeYa omee filisteo reta ipo pe cuarenta año rupi." 
Judges13:2 Zora pe oiko metei kuimbae Manoa jee vae Dan iñemuña pegua; jembireko mbaetɨ imembɨ, echa imembɨmbae ko." 
Judges13:3 Ërei yandeYa iaraɨgua oyekuaa chupe, jei reve: “Mbaetɨ nemembɨ, echa nde imembɨmbae ko. Ërei añave ndepuruata jare oata nemembɨ kuimbae." 
Judges13:4 Añave güive agüɨye jeu vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae, ani tembíu peumbae vaerä pereko vae reta," 
Judges13:5 jare jókuae nemembɨ renoita vae mbaetɨta reñapi, echa ndei oa güive voi Tumpa pe oñeñono tee vae ko, nasareorä ko, jae omboɨpɨta oepɨ Israel iñemuña reta filisteo reta ipo güi.”" 
Judges13:6 Jare kuña ojo imiari ime pe, jei chupe: “Metei kuimbae Tumpa jembiokuai ou chépɨri, jare chemongɨɨye yae, echa jova Tumpa iaraɨguaecha. Mbaetɨ aparandu chupe ketɨ güi ko ou vae ani kia ko vae, jae ave mbaetɨ oyemombeu cheve." 
Judges13:7 Jae jei cheve: ‘Ndepuruata jare oata nemembɨ kuimbae; jáeramo añave güive agüɨyeta reu vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae ani tembíu peumbae vaerä pereko vae reta, echa michia raɨ Tumpa pe oñeñono tee vae ko nasareorä ko ndei oa güive voi, omano regua.’ ”" 
Judges13:8 Jayave Manoa oyerure yandeYa pe jei: “CheYa, romoñera rembou ye vaerä jókuae kuimbae rembou vae, oremboe vaerä kërai rogüɨreko jókuae michia raɨ oata vae.”" 
Judges13:9 Jare Tumpa oendu Manoa iyerure, araɨgua oyekuaa ye kuña pe, ko pe oï yave. Ërei ime Manoa mbaetɨ oï jae ndive ramo," 
Judges13:10 jae osɨi ojo omombeu ime pe, jei: —¡Mase, jókuae kuimbae oyekuaa cheve vae oyekuaa ye ma cheve!" 
Judges13:11 Manoa opüa ojo jembireko ndive jókuae kuimbae oïa pe, jare jei chupe: —¿Jae pa nde ïru ara nemiari cherembireko ndive vae? Araɨgua jei chupe: —Jae ko che." 
Judges13:12 Jayave Manoa jei: —Jókuae remombeu vae oyembopo yave, ¿këraita pa rombokuakuaa jókuae michia raɨ? ¿Këraita pa rogüɨreko?" 
Judges13:13 YandeYa iaraɨgua jei Manoa pe: —Nderembireko toyapo opaete jae chupe vae: 
Judges13:14 Agüɨye tou uva güi mbae oyeapogüe, agüɨye tou vino ani mbae oporombosavaɨpo vae, ani tembíu peumbae vaerä pereko vae reta. Toyapo opaete jaegüe." 
Judges13:15 Manoa mbaetɨ ave oikuaa jókuae kuimbae jae ko yandeYa iaraɨgua, jei chupe: —Romoñera repɨta vaerä ore ndive rekaru, romboyɨta kavara kuimbae raɨ ndeve. Ërei araɨgua jei chupe: —Yepe tëi chemombɨta, ngaraa jau pe ndive tembíu. Ërei pepuere pemee jókuae kavara kuimbae raɨ yandeYa pe mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae." 
Judges13:16  
Judges13:17 Jayave Manoa jei araɨgua pe: —¿Mbae pa nderee? Oremaendúa vaerä nderé romboete reve, oyembopo ma yave kuae remombeu vae." 
Judges13:18 Ërei araɨgua jei chupe: —¿Maera pa reipota reikuaa cheree? Oporomopɨakañɨ yae vae ko. 
Judges13:19 Manoa oipɨɨ kavara kuimbae raɨ jare mbota temitɨ jäɨgüe, jare oñono ita guasu iárambo jare omee mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae yandeYa pe. Jayave araɨgua oyapo mɨakañɨ Manoa jare jembireko jóvai;" 
Judges13:20 tata jendɨ opüa ɨvate yave, Manoa jare jembireko oecha reta jókuae Tumpa iaraɨgua ojo ara kotɨ tata jendɨ opüa vae rupi. Jayave oyetavatɨka itindɨasɨ reta ɨvɨ re." 
Judges13:21 YandeYa iaraɨgua mbaetɨ ye oyekuaa Manoa pe ani jembireko pe. Jayave Manoa oikuaa jae ko yandeYa iaraɨgua vae," 
Judges13:22 jare jei jembireko pe: —Ñamanota ko, echa Tumpa yaecha." 
Judges13:23 Ërei kuña jei: —YandeYa oipota yandeyuka yave, ngaraa tëi omae mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae re, jare temitɨ jäɨgüe re, jare ngaraa oechauka yandeve opaete kuae mbaembae, ngaraa vi opa mbae omombeu yandeve." 
Judges13:24 Jare jókuae kuña imembɨ oa metei kuimbae raɨ, ombojee Sansón. Okuakuaa michia raɨ jare yandeYa iporerekua jese." 
Judges13:25 Jare metei ara Sansón oï Dan iñemuña reta jeyupa pe Zora jare Estaol ipäu pe yave. YandeYa iEspíritu omboɨpɨ oparavɨkɨ jese. 
Judges14:1 Metei ara Sansón ogüeyɨ ojo tëta Timnat pe jare oecha metei kuña, filisteo reta tayɨ," 
Judges14:2 jare oyerova ye jëta pe yave omombeu tu jare ichɨ pe. Jei chupe reta: —Timnat pe aecha metei kuña filisteo reta tayɨ, pomoñera pemomiari vaerä cherembirekorä." 
Judges14:3 Ërei tu jare ichɨ jei reta chupe: —¿Mbaetɨ pa kuña opaete nerëtara ipɨte pe, reo vaerä reeka kuña ïru tëta rupi, filisteo itumpa-raanga pota vae reta ipɨte pe? Jare Sansón jei tu pe: —Pemomiariño cheve, echa jókuae kuñatai aipota yae ko." 
Judges14:4 Tu jare ichɨ mbaetɨ ave oikuaa kuae yandeYa güi ko ou jökorai vaerä, echa Tumpa oeka filisteo reta jeko omboyekuaa vaerä, echa jókuae ara rupi filisteo reta güɨnoi mbaepuere Israel iñemuña reta re." 
Judges14:5 Sansón ojo tu ndive jare ichɨ ndive Timnat kotɨ, jókuae tëta pegua reta iuvarupa pe ma yogüɨraja oväe yave, ko metei yaguapope taɨrusu vae oñee ou ikotɨ." 
Judges14:6 Jayave yandeYa iespíritu ou Sansón re, jare jae opa omondoo ndoo ipo pe etei yaguapope kavara raɨ rami; ërei jókuae mbaetɨ omombeu tu jare ichɨ pe." 
Judges14:7 Javoi ojo omomiari kuñatai oipota yae vae. 
Judges14:8 Mbovɨ ara jaɨkue rupi, Sansón ojo omenda vaerä kuñatai ndive yave, opia tape güi omae vaerä jókuae yaguapope jëogüegüe re, jare oväe pɨpe ei tu jare metei ipe ei." 
Judges14:9 Oipɨɨ jókuae metei ipe ei vae jare jou ojo oiko. Oupitɨ tu jare ichɨ yave omee vi chupe reta jou vaerä, ërei mbaetɨ omombeu chupe reta jókuae ei yaguapope jëogüegüe güi ko oekɨ vae." 
Judges14:10 Sansón tu ojo kuñatai oïa pe; jare Sansón oyapo arete, jókuae tëta pegua kunumi reta jeko rami." 
Judges14:11 Ërei filisteo reta okɨɨye chugüi ramo güɨraja treinta ivɨa-ïrurä ñogüɨnoi vaerä jae ndive. 
Judges14:12 Jare jókuae treinta vae pe, Sansón jei: —Jaeta peve mbae yavai yae vae. Chiu ara kuae arete oikota vae pe pemombeu cheve mbae ra oipota jei vae yave, che ameeta metei ñavo vae pe temimonde iarambogua lino ikavi yae vae pegua, jare temimonde arete pegua." 
Judges14:13 Ërei mbaetɨ jae kavi pemombeu mbae ko oipota jei vae yave, metei ñavo pegüi reta pemeeta cheve temimonde iarambogua lino ikavi yae vae pegua jare temimonde arete pegua. Jare jae reta jei chupe: —Ere oreve, toroyeapɨsaka jese." 
Judges14:14 Jayave Sansón jei chupe reta: “Oporou vae güi oë tembíu; jare ipɨ̈rata yae vae güi oë jëe yae vae.” Mboapɨ ara rupi, jae reta mbaetɨño oikuaa mbae ra oipota jei vae;" 
Judges14:15 jayave irundɨa ara pe jei reta Sansón jembireko pe: —Eeka kërai neme omombeu vaerä ndeve mbae ra oipota jei jókuae jei oreve vae, mbaetɨ yave roapɨta jare nerëtara reta opata vi roapɨ. ¡Pepɨ̈ro orembaembae oregüi vaeräño ndipo peparea oreve!" 
Judges14:16 Jayave Sansón jembireko oyaeo reve ojo, jare jei chupe: —¡Mbaetɨ cheraɨu, chemotareɨ yepe, echa mbae yavai yae vae rere cheraɨe reta pe vae, mbaetɨ remombeu cheve mbae ra oipota jei vae! Jare Sansón jei jembireko pe: —Cheru jare chesɨ pe mbaetɨ amombeu vae, ¿amombeuta ra ndeve?" 
Judges14:17 Ërei jae jekuaeñoi oyaeo opaete jókuae chiu ara arete oiko vae pe, jare chiúa ara pe omombeu chupe, echa oyaporai yae jese. Jayave jókuae kuña ojo omombeu jaɨe reta pe." 
Judges14:18 Chiúa ara pe, ndei kuaraɨ oike mbove tëta pegua reta yogüɨraja jei Sansón pe: “Mbaetɨ yé mbae jëeasɨ ei güi vae, mbaetɨ yé mbae ipɨ̈rata yaguapope güi vae.” Jare Sansón jei chupe reta: “Cheguaka pe pembaeara ramo peikuaa mbae oipota jei vae.”" 
Judges14:19 YandeYa iEspíritu ou jese, jare ojo tëta Ascalón kotɨ joko pe oyuka treinta kuimbae opa opɨ̈ro chugüi reta imbaembae jare pɨpe omboepɨ jókuae ñee yavai vae omombeu chupe vae reta pe. Jare ojo tu jëta pe iyarasɨ yae reve," 
Judges14:20 jare Sansón jembireko, tu omee Sansón ichëi pe chugüi." 
Judges15:1 Oasa mbovɨ ara rupi, metei ara trigo oyepoo iara pe, Sansón ojo jembireko pɨri güɨraja chupe metei kavara kuimbae raɨ. Ojo oväe yave jei: —Taike tamae cherembireko re o pe. Ërei kuña tu mbaetɨ omaeño oike," 
Judges15:2 jei chupe: —Ayemongeta ko mbaetɨ ma reipota, jáeramo amee ndevɨa-ïru pe. Ërei ngatu oime ipɨkɨɨ maepöra yae chugüi vae; jókuae ereko tɨke jekovia pe." 
Judges15:3 Ërei Sansón jei chupe: —¡Añave mbaetɨ eteita filisteo reta chemboeko, ikavimbae ayapo chupe reta yave!" 
Judges15:4 Jayave ojo oipɨɨ tresciento aguara, jare oñapɨti metei vae juguai ïru juguai ndive, oñono reve jókuae mókoi vae juguai re mbae jendɨ vaerä;" 
Judges15:5 jaɨkue rupi omoendɨ tata, jare oyora aguara reta filisteo reta jemitɨ pɨte pe, jare oapɨ trigo oyemboatɨgüe, oyemboɨgüe, uva jare olivorupa." 
Judges15:6 Filisteo reta omboɨpɨ oparandu kia ra jókuae oyapo vae, jare oikuaa reta Sansón ko oyapo, oyepɨ vaerä jembireko, tu omee tayɨ chugüi Sansón ichëi pe vae jeko pegua yave, yogüɨraja reta opa oapɨ kuña jare tu." 
Judges15:7 Jayave Sansón jei: —Kuae peyapo vae jeko pegua, ¡Tumpa jee re ngaraa cheapɨ ayepɨ regua peré!" 
Judges15:8 Jare oporepeña jese reta iyarasɨ yae reve opa regua ikägüe oakɨo kɨo oyuka. Jare ojo oiko ɨvɨkua oï ɨ̈vavira Etam pe vae pe. 
Judges15:9 Jayave filisteo reta yogüeru oyembojeyupa Judá pe, oñemoai reta Lehi kotɨ," 
Judges15:10 jare kuimbae reta Judá pegua oparandu chupe reta: —¿Maera pa ko peyu peporepeña oreré? Jare jae reta jei: —Royu ko roipɨɨ Sansón royapo vaerä chupe jae oyapo oreve rami. 
Judges15:11 Kuae oendu yave, Judá pegua reta yogüɨraja tres mil kuimbae ɨvɨkua oï ɨ̈vavira Etam pe vae pe, jare jei reta Sansón pe: —¿Mbaetɨ pa reikuaa filisteo reta güɨnoi ko mbaepuere oreré vae? ¿Maera pa oreñono kuae teko pe? Sansón jei chupe reta: —Jae reta oyapo cheve rami ko che ayapo vi chupe reta." 
Judges15:12 Jayave jae reta jei chupe: —Ore reta royu ko ropɨɨ romee filisteo reta ipo pe. Sansón jei: —Pere añetete cheve Tumpa jee re, mbaetɨta ra pe reta cheyuka." 
Judges15:13 Jare jae reta jei chupe: —Mbaetɨ, ngaraa royuka, jaeño orekɨ̈reɨ ropɨɨ jare romee filisteo reta ipo pe. Jayave oipɨɨ jare oñapɨti mókoi tɨmasa ipɨau vae pe, jare güɨnoe reta oñemi oïa güi." 
Judges15:14 Yogüeru oväe reta Lehi pe yave, filisteo reta oë chupe osapúkai reve oyerovia güi. Ërei yandeYa iespíritu ou jese, jare omondoo tɨmasa reta oyeokua pɨpe vae opa ókai rami;" 
Judges15:15 javoi oipɨɨ mburika jañɨkagüe ndei ave otini ete vae, pɨpe oyuka mil filisteo." 
Judges15:16 Jaɨkue rupi jei: “Metei mburika jañɨkagüe pe ayapo metei jare mókoi atɨ; mburika jañɨkagüe pe ayuka mil kuimbae reta.” 
Judges15:17 Opa imiari yave omombo ipo güi mburika jañɨkagüe, jare ombojee jókuae oporoyukaa Ramat-lehi." 
Judges15:18 Jare Sansón oyaporai yae ma ɨuve ramo, oenɨi yandeYa jare jei chupe: “¿Remaeñota pa cheyuka ɨuve kuae itumpa-raanga pota vae reta ipɨte pe, remee güire aporomoamɨri?”" 
Judges15:19 Jayave Tumpa oipea ɨvɨkua Lehi pe oï vae; jare oë ɨ joko güi, Sansón jou jókuae ɨ, jare oyandu ipɨ̈rata ye. Jáeramo jókuae ɨesaɨ oï añave Lehi pe vae ombojee En-hacore." 
Judges15:20 Sansón oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä veinte año rupi, filisteo reta jókuae ara rupi güɨnoi mbaepuere jókuae ɨvɨ re yave." 
Judges16:1 Metei ara Sansón ojo tëta Gaza pe, jare joko pe oecha metei kuña iyaguasa pota vae, jare oike jo pe oke jae ndive jókuae pɨ̈tu." 
Judges16:2 Gaza pegua reta oikuaa Sansón oime ko oï jókuae tëta pe yave, oimama reta jare oäro reta öke opaete jókuae pɨ̈tu, oyemongeta reta oyuka vaerä köe ma yave." 
Judges16:3 Ërei Sansón jaeño oke pɨare mbɨte regua. Pɨare mbɨte opüa jare ojo tëta guasu jöke oekɨ jöke-ɨta reve jare oñemotäta pɨpe vae, jare oñono ikupe re güɨroyeupi ɨvɨtɨ ɨvate vae oï Hebrón jóvai vae re." 
Judges16:4 Kuae jaɨkue rupi Sansón iporopota metei kuña Dalila jee vae re, tëta Sorec ɨvɨtɨ päu pegua re." 
Judges16:5 Jare filisteo reta juvicha reta yogüeru Dalila pɨri, jare jei reta chupe: —Embotavɨ Sansón jare eikuaa chugüi kërai güi ko ipɨ̈rata yae vae, kërai ra orepuereta jese; jökorai roipɨɨ jare roñapɨti vaerä. Kuae reyapo yave romeeta ndeve metei ñavo mil cien reare korepoti pegua." 
Judges16:6 Jayave jae jei Sansón pe: —Romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve kërai güi ko nepɨ̈rata yae vae, jare ¿oime pa kërai reñeapɨti yave, mbaetɨta ndepuere remondoo?" 
Judges16:7 Jare Sansón jei: —Cheäpɨti yave chiu yoɨvɨ güɨrapa iïcha ipɨau pe, opɨ̈rota chegüi chepɨ̈rata jare oipotagüe kuimbae ramiñota apɨta." 
Judges16:8 Jare filisteo reta juvicha reta güeru Dalila pe güɨrapa iïcha ipɨau vae jare pɨpe Dalila oñapɨti Sansón. 
Judges16:9 Jókuae kuña omoñemi ma oñono tenonde voi kuimbae reta jo iárambo, jáeramo jei: —¡Sansón, ko filisteo reta yogüeru ndeve! Jayave Sansón opa omondoo tɨmasa okaigüe opa oso rami. Jare filisteo reta mbaetɨ oikuaa maera ko ipɨ̈rata yae vae." 
Judges16:10 Dalila jei chupe: —¡Chembotavɨ! ¡Ndeapu yepe cheve! Ërei añave romoñera remombeu vaerä cheve, ¿kërai pa chepuere roäpɨti?" 
Judges16:11 Sansón jei chupe: —Cheäpɨti täta tɨmasa ipɨau jare ndei etei oyeporu vae pe yave, opɨ̈rota chegüi chepɨ̈rata jare oipotagüe kuimbae ramiñota apɨta." 
Judges16:12 Jayave Dalila oipɨɨ metei tɨmasa ipɨau vae, jare pɨpe oñapɨti Sansón, jare jei: —¡Sansón, ko filisteo reta yogüeru ndeve! Jae tenonde yave rami omoñemi oñono kuimbae reta jo iárambo; ërei Sansón opa omondoo ipoapɨ güi tɨmasa reta, inimbo ramiño." 
Judges16:13 Dalila jei Sansón pe: —¡Jekuae chembotavɨ ye! ¡Ndeapu ye cheve! ¡Emombeu cheve! ¿Kërai pa chepuere roäpɨti? Jare Sansón jei chupe: —Chea eñope chiu tɨmasa ombaapo vae jembiapo iïcha ndive, jare etaka re emotäta eñono ɨvɨ re, jökorai opɨ̈rota chegüi chepɨ̈rata jare oipotagüe kuimbae ramiñota apɨta. Jayave Dalila omonge Sansón jare oñope ia chiu tɨmasa ombaapo vae jembiapo iïcha ndive," 
Judges16:14 jare opa oyapo güire oyatɨka etaka ɨvɨ re jare jei: —¡Sansón, ko filisteo reta yogüeru ndeve! Ërei Sansón opüa jare güɨnoe jókuae ia oñeope vae etaka reve, jókuae ɨvɨ re oyeatɨka oï vae." 
Judges16:15 Jayave jae jei chupe: —¡Ndeapu! ¿Maera pa roaɨu rere cheve? Kuae re mboapɨ ma chembotavɨ, jare mbaetɨ remombeu cheve kërai güi ko nepɨ̈rata yae vae." 
Judges16:16 Echa oparandu avei yae chupe opaete ara rupi ramo Sansón ombopɨakaviä yae jare oipotaecha omano; 
Judges16:17 jáeramo omombeu chupe: —Mbaetɨi añeapi, echa ndei chesɨ güi aa mbove cheñono tee reta Tumpa peguarä nasareorä. Opa yave chea oñapi apɨtata chepɨ̈ratambae oipotagüe kuimbae ramiño." 
Judges16:18 Dalila oikuaa ma ketɨ güi ko Sansón güɨnoi ipɨ̈rata yae vae yave, omondo jei filisteo reta juvicha reta pe: —¡Añave peyu, Sansón omombeu ma cheve kërai güi ko ipɨ̈rata yae vae! Jayave jae reta yogüɨraja ípɨri güɨraja reve korepoti ipo pe." 
Judges16:19 Jare Dalila omonge jäpapau pe Sansón, jare oenɨi metei kuimbae oñapi vaerä jókuae chiu ia oñeañopegüe. Javoi omboɨpɨ oyuvanga jese, echa mbaetɨ ma ipɨ̈rata." 
Judges16:20 Jare jei chupe: —¡Sansón, ko filisteo reta yogüeru ndeve! Sansón okuera oke oï vae güi yave, oyemongeta oyeyora vaerä tenonde yave rami, ërei jae mbaetɨ oikuaa yandeYa osɨrɨ ko chugüi vae." 
Judges16:21 Jayave filisteo reta oipɨɨ jare opa güɨnoe chugüi jesäɨ jare güɨraja reta Gaza pe; joko pe oñapɨti reta karena jiero iyu vae pegua pe jare oiko tembipɨɨ rɨru pe ombaeyoso vaerä. 
Judges16:22 Ërei ngatu ia omboɨpɨ ye okuakuaa jókuae oñapi reta güire. 
Judges16:23 Jayave filisteo reta juvicha reta oyomboatɨ omee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe itumpa Dagón pe, jare otairari reta: “Ñanetumpa ko omee yandepo pe yanderovaicho Sansón.”" 
Judges16:24 Opaete vae reta oecha yave otairari vi omboete reta reve itumpa, jei reta: “Ñanetumpa ko omee yandepo pe yanderovaicho Sansón, omokañɨtei ñaneremitɨ vae, jare ñanerëtara jeta oyuka vae.”" 
Judges16:25 Jare oyandu reta ipɨa pe oyerovia yae ma yave, imaendúa reta güeru vaerä Sansón ipɨte pe oyuvanga vaerä jese, jökorai oyerovia reta vaerä. Jayave güɨnoe reta Sansón tembipɨɨ rɨru güi jare oyuvanga reta jese, jökorai oyembovɨa katu reta. Jare oñono reta okɨta mókoi vae ipäu pe." 
Judges16:26 Jayave Sansón jei kunumi oipoko vae pe: —Chereraja, jare chembopoko mókoi okɨta opaete o oguapɨ jese vae re, ayeko vaerä jese." 
Judges16:27 Opaete filisteo reta jare juvicha reta ñogüɨnoi jókuae tupao pe, o ɨvategua pe kuimbae jare kuña reta oupitɨ tres mil ñogüɨnoi joko güi omae reta kërai oyuvanga Sansón re oyembovɨa katu reta vaerä." 
Judges16:28 Jayave Sansón oyerure yandeYa pe, jare jei chupe: “CheYa Tumpa, nemaendúa añave cheré, chemomɨ̈rata, romoñera kuae mókoi cheresa re ayepɨ vaerä opaete re metei jeia pe.”" 
Judges16:29 Sansón opovɨvɨ jókuae mókoi okɨta opaete o oguapɨ jese vae re, ipo iyakatu oñono metei re jare ipo iyasu oñono ïru re." 
Judges16:30 Jayave Sansón jei: “¡Filisteo reta tomano che ndive!” Jayave omoaña opaete ipɨ̈rata ndive jare tupao osururu filisteo reta juvicha reta re jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta re. Sansón omano yave jeta yae oporoyuka tenonde yave oporoyuka vae güi. 
Judges16:31 Jaɨkue rupi Sansón jëtara reta yogüeru güɨraja jëogüegüe, jare oñotɨ reta Zora jare Estaol ipäu pe, tu Manoa jɨvɨa oïa pe. Veinte año rupi Sansón oiko Israel iñemuña reta juvicharä." 
Judges17:1 Ɨvɨtɨ ɨvɨ Efraín pegua pe oiko metei kuimbae Micaía jee vae," 
Judges17:2 jae oyemombeu ichɨ pe, jei: —Jókuae mil cien reare korepoti pegua oñomi ndegüi vae re reyepopeyu vae, che oime anoi jókuae korepoti. Che ko añomi ndegüi; ërei añave tamee ye ndeve, echa aendu rere jókuae korepoti reñono tee ko yandeYa peguarä, remondo vaerä reyapouka metei mbae iä oñeopa vae jare oyemondɨkui vae korepoti pegua. Jare omee ye chupe korepoti. Jayave ichɨ jei: —¡Tumpa tiporerekua nderé chemembɨ!" 
Judges17:3  
Judges17:4 Micaía omee ye güire korepoti ichɨ pe, jae omee jókuae dosciento reare korepoti, ipoki mbae iä korepoti pegua oyapo vae pe, oyapouka vaerä metei mbae iä oñeova korepoti pe vae, oñono vaerä Micaía jo pe." 
Judges17:5 Micaía güɨnoi tumpa-raanga reta jenda, jare oyapo temimonde iyɨvambae jare mbae iä reta jare ombojee metei taɨ reta güi sacerdoterä." 
Judges17:6 Echa jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe, metei vae ñavo oyapo ipɨa jemimbota." 
Judges17:7 Oiko metei kunumi ketɨgua tëta Belén, Judá pegua jae ko levita." 
Judges17:8 Jókuae kunumi oë Belén güi oeka kia pe oiko vaerä, jare oguata oiko ɨvɨtɨ reta Efraín pegua rupi ojo oväe Micaía jëta pe." 
Judges17:9 Jare Micaía oparandu chupe: —¿Ketɨ güi pa reyu? Kunumi jei: —Belén güi, levita ko che, aeka aiko kia pe aiko vaerä." 
Judges17:10 Micaía jei chupe: —Epɨta jayave chépɨri kuae pe, reiko vaerä chesacerdoterä jare chemboarakuaa vaerä. Che amboepɨta ndeve payandepo siclo reare korepoti pegua año pe, jare ameeta vi ndeve tembíu jare temimonde. Jare levita opɨta joko pe." 
Judges17:11 Jókuae Levita ikɨ̈reɨ opɨta oiko vaerä Micaía pɨri, jare jae oiko chupe taɨ rami." 
Judges17:12 Jare Micaía oñono tee isacerdoterä jókuae levita, jare opɨta oiko Micaía pɨri jo pe." 
Judges17:13 Jayave Micaía oyemongeta Tumpa iporerekua oimeta güɨnoi, echa levita güɨnoi isacerdoterä." 
Judges18:1 Jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe. Dan iñemuña reta mbaetɨ vɨteri vi güɨnoi ɨvɨ imbae ae, Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte pe. Jáeramo oeka yogüɨreko ɨvɨ pɨpe oñemoëta vaerä." 
Judges18:2 Jáeramo Dan iñemuña reta güi omondo reta pandepo kuimbae jëia yae vae Zora jare Estaol güi, kuae reta yogüɨraja omae jare oikuaa kavi vaerä kërai ko jókuae ɨvɨ. Jei reta chupe: “Pekua peikuaa kavi ɨvɨ.” Jare jókuae pandepo vae reta yogüɨraja Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ pe jare yogüɨraja oväe Micaía jo pe, joko pe oke reta." 
Judges18:3 Micaía jo güi köi ma yogüɨraja yave oikuaa reta jókuae kunumi levita iñee, jare yogüɨraja reta oparandu chupe: —¿Kia pa ndereru kuae kotɨ? ¿Maera pa kuae pe reï? ¿Jare mbae pa reyapo kuae pe?" 
Judges18:4 Jare jókuae kunumi levita omombeu opaete Micaía oyapo chupe vae, jare oyapo isacerdoterä vae." 
Judges18:5 Jayave jae reta jei chupe: —Eparandu Tumpa pe, kuae royu rojo vae jaekavita ra oreve." 
Judges18:6 Jare sacerdote levita jei chupe reta: —Pekua pepɨakatu reve; yandeYa ko ojo perenonde peangareko vaerä peoa rupi. 
Judges18:7 Jayave jókuae pandepo kuimbae vae reta opa oë yogüɨraja oväe tëta Lais pe. Jare oecha reta jókuae tëta pegua reta yogüɨreko pɨagüive Sidón pegua reta rami, oyepokuaa mbaetɨ kia omoambeko jare mbaetɨ mbae oata chupe reta. Mombɨrɨ yogüɨreko oyougüi Sidón pegua reta ndive jare mbaetɨ oñemoïru reta kia ndive ave." 
Judges18:8 Jayave jókuae pandepo kuimbae yogüɨraja omae vae yogüeru ye Zora jare Estaol pe, jëtara reta ñogüɨnoia pe yave, oparandu reta chupe: —¿Kërai pa peguata? Jayave jae reta jei:" 
Judges18:9 —Rojo roguata jókuae ɨvɨ rupi, jare roecha jókuae ɨvɨ ikavi yae. ¡Pepüa! ¡Ñaporepeña jese! ¡Agüɨye pemaeiño peï, ikavi ko yaja ñapɨ̈ro jókuae ɨvɨ!" 
Judges18:10 Echa peo peväe joko pe yave peechata joko pegua reta yogüɨreko pɨagüive jare ɨvɨ tuicha vae, mbaetɨ etei mbae oata pɨpe. Tumpa omeeta jókuae ɨvɨ pepo pe." 
Judges18:11 Jayave seisciento kuimbae Dan iñemuña pegua ñogüɨnoe Zora jare Estaol güi jembiporu ñeraro pegua reve reve," 
Judges18:12 jare yogüɨraja oväe Judá pe, joko pe oyembojeyupa reta, Quiriat-jearim güi kuaraɨ oikea kotɨ, Dan Jeyupa ombojee reta añave regua vae pe." 
Judges18:13 Joko güi yogüɨraja Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ pe, jare yogüɨraja oväe Micaía jo pe." 
Judges18:14 Jayave jókuae pandepo yogüɨraja oikuaa ɨvɨ Lais vae reta jei jëtara reta pe: —¿Peikuaa pa kuae pe oime mbae vae? Kuae pe oime temimonde iyɨvambae jare tumpa reta mbae iä oñeopa vae jare korepoti oyemondɨkuigüe pegua. ¿Peyemongeta kavi mbae peyapo vaerä? 
Judges18:15 Jayave jókuae pandepo vae reta yogüɨraja kunumi levita pɨri Micaía jo pe, jare oparandu reta chupe kërai ra oï vae." 
Judges18:16 Jare jókuae seisciento kuimbae Dan iñemuña pegua reta okätɨro öke pe jembiporu ñeraro pegua reve reve. 
Judges18:17 Jare jókuae pandepo vae reta oike o pe jare oipɨɨ reta mbae iä oñeopa vae jare korepoti oyemondɨkuigüe pegua, jare temimonde iyɨvambae sacerdote imiari ramboeve öke pe jókuae seisciento kuimbae reta ndive." 
Judges18:18 Sacerdote oecha yave jókuae pandepo vae reta oike Micaía jo pe jare güɨnoe mbae iä, temimonde iyɨvambae jare tumpa reta oñeopa vae jare oyemondɨkuigüe, jei chupe reta: —¿Mbae pa peyapo peï?" 
Judges18:19 Jae reta jei chupe: —¡Nekïrii, yaja orerupíe! ¡Roipota reiko vaerä oreve sacerdoterä jare eiko oreve oreru rami! ¿Jaekavi pa ndeve reiko vaerä metei kuimbae isacerdoteräño opaete Israel iñemuña reta güi, jae ko metei tëtara metei tu güi vae?" 
Judges18:20 Kuae ikavi sacerdote pe, jare oipɨɨ temimonde iyɨvambae jare tumpa reta mɨmba iä reta jare ojo Dan iñemuña reta jupíe." 
Judges18:21 Jayave jae reta ogüeyɨ tape pe jare omboɨpɨ oguata, oñono reta tenonde michia reta, mɨmba reta jare opaete imbaembae güɨraja vae." 
Judges18:22 Mombɨrɨ ma yogüɨraja Micaía jo güi yave, Micaía jare jo iyɨvɨrigua reta ndive oyomboatɨ jare oaɨkuemoña Dan iñemuña reta." 
Judges18:23 Dan iñemuña reta oendu yave osapúkai chupe oaɨkuemoña vae reta, oyerova reta ye oparandu Micaía pe: —¿Maratu pa reiko? ¿Maera pa pesapúkai mbatee oreve?" 
Judges18:24 Jare Micaía jei chupe reta: —Pe reta peru peraja chegüi chetumpa reta, che ayapo vae, jare peraja vi chegüi chesacerdote, jare chereeya köraiño. Jare peparandu yeño cheve: ¿Maratu ra aiko vae?" 
Judges18:25 Ërei Dan iñemuña reta jei chupe: —Agüɨye neñeeäta oreve, echa güɨramoi amogüe orepɨte güi iyarasɨ katu vae oñemopüata nderé, jare nemokañɨteita opaete nerëtara ndive." 
Judges18:26 Micaía oecha jae reta jeta yae yave, oyerova ye ojo jëta kotɨ; jare Dan iñemuña reta yogüɨraja vi joko güi" 
Judges18:27 opaete Micaía oyapogüe ndive, jare isacerdote ndive yogüɨraja regua oväe Lais pe. Dan iñemuña reta opa oyuka kɨsepuku pe joko pe yogüɨreko pɨagüive vae reta jare opa oapɨ reta tëta guasu." 
Judges18:28 Mbaetɨ kia oepɨ reta vaerä, echa mombɨrɨ ñogüɨnoi Sidón güi, mbaetɨ vi oñemoïru kia ndive. Kuae tëta guasu oï ɨvɨpe kavi Bet-rehob pe. Jaɨkue rupi Dan iñemuña reta omopüa pɨau ye jókuae tëta guasu jare opɨta oñemoëta joko pe." 
Judges18:29 Jare ombojee Dan, iñemuñagüe jee pe, jae ko Israel taɨ; tenonde yave jee yepi kuae tëta guasu Lais." 
Judges18:30 Joko pe Dan iñemuña reta oñono tumpa-raanga reta oñemopöra oyeapo vae omboete reta vaerä, jare isacerdote jae ko Jonatán, Gersón taɨ, Moisés jɨmɨmino. Jaɨkue rupi Jonatán iñemuña reta yogüɨreko Dan iñemuña reta isacerdoterä, oyererajauka reta regua tembipɨɨrä." 
Judges18:31 Joko pe güɨreko reta tumpa-raanga reta Micaía oyapogüe, opaete ara Silo pe Tumpa jo oime reve." 
Judges19:1 Jókuae ara rupi, ndei vɨteri oime mburuvicha guasu Israel pe yave, oiko metei levita ketɨgua mombɨrɨ Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ re, jae güɨreko jembirekorä metei kuña Belén, Judá pegua." 
Judges19:2 Ërei jókuae kuña jeko kaviä chupe, jare ojo chugüi tu jëta pe, Belén Judá pegua pe, joko pe oiko irundɨ yasɨ," 
Judges19:3 jókuae levita ojo oeka omomiari vaerä mboroaɨu ndive güeru ye vaerä jupíe. Güɨraja vi jupíe metei jembiokuai, jare mókoi mburika; jare jókuae kuña omoinge ime tu jo pe." 
Judges19:4 Kuña tu oyerovia reve omboresive, jare oparea chupe opɨta vaerä ípɨri; levita jare jembiokuai opɨta reta mboapɨ ara kuña tu jo pe, okaru reta jare jou reta vino jare oke reta joko pe," 
Judges19:5 jare irundɨa ara pe ndeimbove yave opüa reta oyupavo yogüeru vaerä. Ërei jaema yogüeruta yave, kuña tu jei jovaya pe: —Ekaru räri kërai yepe, nepɨ̈rata vaerä, javoi ekua kuri." 
Judges19:6 Jare mókoi reve oguapɨ okaru jare jou reta vino, jare kuña tu oiporu opɨta ye vaerä jókuae pɨ̈tu." 
Judges19:7 Yepe tëi levita opüa ojo vaerä, ërei jovaya omoñera yae ramo opɨta ye jókuae pɨ̈tu." 
Judges19:8 Pandepoa ara pe, levita opüa ndeimboveasɨ ojo vaerä, ërei jovaya jekuae omoñera ye okaru vaerä, jare kuaraɨ ñapɨa yave ojo vaerä. Jayave okaru päve reta kaaruasɨ regua." 
Judges19:9 Javoi levita opüa ma ojo vaerä jembireko jare jembiokuai ndive yave, jovaya omombeu chupe kaaruasɨ yae ma ko vae, jare oparea ye chupe jókuae pɨ̈tu opɨta vaerä oyerovia reve, jare ndeimboveasɨ oë vaerä ojo." 
Judges19:10 Ërei levita mbaetɨ ma oipota opɨta ye jókuae pɨ̈tu, oyupavo jare yogüeru jembireko jare jembiokuai ndive, jare mókoi imburika ndive. Jebús jóvai ma ñogüɨnoi yave, jae ko Jerusalén," 
Judges19:11 tembiokuai jei levita pe: —¿Mbae pa rere yapɨta vaerä kuae pɨ̈tu kuae jebuseo reta jëta pe? 
Judges19:12 Ërei levita jei chupe: —Ngaraa yaja tëta Israel iñemuñambae pɨri. Yaasaño chugüi Gabaa kotɨ," 
Judges19:13 yaja yapɨta Gabaa pe ani Ramá pe. 
Judges19:14 Oasa reta, jare kuaraɨ oike ma yave yogüɨraja oväe Gabaa pe, Benjamín iñemuña reta jëta pe." 
Judges19:15 Jayave opia reta tape güi oike tëta Gabaa pe oputuu vaerä jókuae pɨ̈tu, jare yogüɨraja oguapɨ jókuae tëta guasu joka pe, echa mbaetɨ kia omee jo chupe reta oputuu vaerä." 
Judges19:16 Jare ko metei ndechi ou oiko kaaruasɨ yave iparavɨkɨa güi, jae ko ketɨgua Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ kotɨ güi ou vae, jae oiko Gabaa pegua reta ipɨte pe, Gabaa pegua reta jae ko Benjamín iñemuña reta." 
Judges19:17 Jókuae ndechi oecha yave oguata oiko vae tëta guasu joka pe, oparandu chupe: —¿Ketɨ güi pa reyu, jare ketɨ pa reo?" 
Judges19:18 Jare levita jei chupe: —Belén Judá pegua güi ko royu roasa koropi rojo vaerä mombɨrɨ Efraín pegua ɨvɨtɨ kotɨ che aikoa pe. Aja Belén Judá pegua pe, añave ayu aja cherëta kotɨ, ërei mbaetɨ roväe kia jo pe roputuu vaerä." 
Judges19:19 Oime rogüɨnoi kapii jare atiɨgüe chemburika reta peguarä, jare tembíu jare vino cheveguarä, cherembireko peguarä jare cherembiokuai peguarä, mbaetɨ etei mbae oata oreve." 
Judges19:20 Jare jókuae ndechi jei chupe: —Chemboyerovia yae kuae reyu vae. Che tayemoambeko opaete reipota vae re. Ngaraa amaeño repɨta reke kuae oka pe. 
Judges19:21 Jare ndechi güɨraja reta jo pe, jare omongaru mburika reta, jare jae reta oyoe ipɨ, okaru jare jou reta vino." 
Judges19:22 Ërei ovɨakatu yae ma ñogüɨnoi yave, mbovɨ kuimbae jeko ikavimbae jókuae tëta pegua reta oimama o, jare omboɨpɨ okua reta öke re, jare jei reta jókuae ndechi o iya pe: —¡Enoe kuimbae ndembouparä renoi vae! ¡Orekɨ̈reɨ mbae royapo chupe!" 
Judges19:23 Ërei o iya oë jei chupe reta: —¡Agüɨye cherëtara reta! Pomoñera ¡Agüɨye peyapo ikavimbae yae vae kuae kuimbae pe, chemboupa pe!" 
Judges19:24 Mase, joko oï cherayɨ mbaetɨ etei oasa kuimbae ndive vae. Jare ko vi oï kuae kuimbae jembireko. Tanoe peve peremimbota peyapo vaerä chupe. Ërei kuae kuimbae pe agüɨye peyapo ikavimbae yae vae." 
Judges19:25 Ërei jókuae kuimbae reta mbaetɨ oyeapɨsaka ndechi re. Jayave jókuae levita oipɨɨ jembireko jare güɨnoe chupe reta ikatu pe. Jare oyapo reta ipɨa jemimbota chupe opaete jókuae pɨ̈tu köe regua, jare oeya reta köeta yave." 
Judges19:26 Köe ma ou yave kuña ou ndechi jo jöke pe, ime oïa pe, jare omano oa, joko pe iköe." 
Judges19:27 Jare ndeimbove ime opüa oipea öke oë ojo vaerä yave, oecha jembireko oï öke pe, ipo reta güɨnoi reve öke pe etei." 
Judges19:28 Jayave jei chupe: —Epüa jare yaja mo. Ërei jae mbaetɨ iñee omoë. Jayave jae oupi jare oñono jëogüegüe imburika re, jare ojo jëta kotɨ." 
Judges19:29 Ojo oväe jëta pe yave oipɨɨ metei kɨse jare opa omboyao yao jembireko jëogüegüe iyoapɨa pɨa rupi, oyapo doce yemboyao, jare omondo opaete Israel iñemuña reta iɨvɨ rupi." 
Judges19:30 Opaete jókuae oecha vae, jei reta: —Israel iñemuña reta oë ɨvɨ Egipto güi güive, mbaetɨi oyeapo ani oyeecha kuae nunga. Yayemongeta kuae re, jare yaiparavo mbae ra yayapota vae." 
Judges20:1 Jayave opaete Israel iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe, Dan güive Beerseba jare Galaad kotɨ güi, oyomboatɨ reta metei rami Mizpa pe, yandeYa jóvai." 
Judges20:2 Jare opaete tëta reta juvicha reta ñogüɨnoi Tumpa imbae vae reta iyemboatɨa pe, opaete Israel iñemuña pegua reta güi ñogüɨnoi cuatrociento mil kuimbae ñeraro regua." 
Judges20:3 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta oikuaa Israel iñemuña reta yogüeru Mizpa pe. Jare Israel iñemuña reta oparandu jókuae levita pe, kërai ra jókuae ikavimbae yae oasa vae." 
Judges20:4 Jayave levita, kuña omano vae ime jei: —Cherembireko ndive royu roväe Gabaa Benjamín iñemuña reta jëta pe, ropɨta vaerä jókuae pɨ̈tu joko pe." 
Judges20:5 Ërei opüa cheré jókuae pɨ̈tu Gabaa pegua reta, opa oimama o roputuu roï pɨpe vae cheyuka reta vaerä, jare cherembireko pe oyapo jae reta ipɨa jemimbota, jáeramo omano." 
Judges20:6 Jayave che aipɨɨ cherembireko jëogüegüe opa amboyao yao, jare amondo opaete Israel iñemuña reta iɨvɨ rupi, oikuaa reta vaerä kuae ikavimbae yae oasa vae." 
Judges20:7 Añave opaete Israel iñemuña reta kuae pe peï vae, peyemongeta jare pemae mbae ra peyapota vae." 
Judges20:8 Jayave opaete vae reta metei rami iyemongeta, opüa oyemboɨ jare jei reta: —Agüɨye metei ave kia tojo ye jo guakapi pegua pe ani jëta kotɨ yandepɨte güi." 
Judges20:9 Kuae yayapota añave, yayombosuerte yaikuaa vaerä kia ra tenonde ojota oporepeña Gabaa re." 
Judges20:10 Opaete ñemuña güi oyeekɨta cien vae güi payandepo kuimbae, mil vae güi cien jare diez mil vae güi mil, güɨraja vaerä tembíu opaete vae peguarä; jare ïru reta yogüɨrajata Gabaa pe Benjamín iñemuña reta pe omboekovia jókuae ikavimbae yae oyapo ɨvɨ Israel pe vae." 
Judges20:11 Opaete Israel iñemuña reta oyomboatɨ metei rami oporepeña vaerä tëta guasu re. 
Judges20:12 Jare omondo ñee jerajaa reta opaete ɨvɨ rupi, Benjamín iñemuña reta iɨvɨ rupi, jei reta vaerä chupe: “¿Maera pa ikavimbae yae oyapo amogüe reta pepɨte pe?" 
Judges20:13 Pemee orepo pe jókuae jeko kavimbae reta, kuae Gabaa pe ñogüɨnoi vae royuka vaerä, jare toyetɨo ɨvɨ Israel kuae ikavimbae güi.” Ërei Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta mbaetɨ oyapo jëtara Israel iñemuña reta jeigüe." 
Judges20:14 Ërei ngatu tëta guasu reta Benjamín iñemuña pegua oyomboatɨ Gabaa pe, oñeraro vaerä jëtara Israel iñemuña reta ndive." 
Judges20:15 Jare Benjamín iñemuña tëta guasu reta güi oyomboatɨ vae, oupitɨ veintisei mil kuimbae ñeraro regua, oyepapambae reve seteciento kuimbae oyeparavogüe Gabaa pegua reta." 
Judges20:16 Jókuae seteciento kuimbae reta oyeparavogüe, iyasu vae reta ko, opaete oikatu ojäa tamamboka oyavɨmbae reve aagüe vae ko." 
Judges20:17 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oyepapa vi, oyepapambae reve Benjamín iñemuña reta; opaete reve cuatrociento mil kuimbae ñeraro regua." 
Judges20:18 Jaɨkue rupi opüa Israel iñemuña reta jare yogüɨraja Bet-el pe, jare oparandu reta Tumpa pe, jei reve: —¿Kia räri pa oregüi reta tenonde ojota oñeraro Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive? Jare yandeYa jei chupe reta: —Judá räri tojo tenonde." 
Judges20:19 Jare Israel iñemuña reta opüa ndeimbove yogüɨraja oyembojeyupa Gabaa jóvai. 
Judges20:20 Jare ñogüɨnoe oñeraro Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive; oyeapo kavi reta oñeraro vaerä Gabaa iyɨpɨ pe. 
Judges20:21 Jayave ñogüɨnoe Gabaa güi Benjamín iñemuña reta; opa oyuka jókuae ara veintidó mil kuimbae Israel iñemuña pegua reta. 
Judges20:22 Ërei oñemoäta ngatu ye opaete vae, kuimbae Israel iñemuña pegua reta, jare oyeapo kavi reta ye oñeraro vaerä kárumbo ma oñeraroa pe." 
Judges20:23 Echa Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja oyaeo yandeYa jóvai pɨ̈tu regua, jare oparandu reta yandeYa pe, jei reve: “¿Rojo yeta pa roñeraro orerëtara Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive?” Jare yandeYa jei chupe reta: —Pekua ye chupe." 
Judges20:24 Jare Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja ye Benjamín iñemuña reta pe, mókoi araa pe." 
Judges20:25 Ërei jókuae ara jekuae Benjamín iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe ye Gabaa güi chupe reta jare jekuae oyuka ye ïru dieciocho mil kuimbae ñeraro regua reta. 
Judges20:26 Jayave yogüɨraja ye opaete Israel iñemuña reta jare opaete tëta, jare oguapɨ oyaeo reta Bet-el pe, jare oyekuaku reta tembíu güi jókuae ara pɨ̈tu regua, jare omee reta mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae, jare mbota yembopɨakatu pegua yandeYa jóvai." 
Judges20:27 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oparandu yandeYa pe (echa käjou morogüɨrökuavee päve pegua oï joko pe jókuae ara," 
Judges20:28 jare sacerdote Finees, Eleazar taɨ, Aarón jɨmɨmino oyapo mbaravɨkɨ jókuae ara), jei reta chupe: “¿Rojo yeta pa roñeraro orerëtara Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive ani mbaetɨta pa?” Jare yandeYa jei chupe reta: “Pekua, echa pɨareve che opata amee pepo pe.”" 
Judges20:29 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi tëta Gabaa ikupe rupi. 
Judges20:30 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta yogüɨraja ye Benjamín iñemuña reta pe mboapɨa ara pe, jare oyeapo kavi reta oñeraro vaerä Gabaa iyɨpɨ pe tenonde yave rami." 
Judges20:31 Jare jekuae Benjamín iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoe ye oövaiti tovaicho reta, oeya mombɨrɨ katu tëta guasu jare omboɨpɨ oyuka reta amogüe jovaicho tenonde yave rami, tape ojo Bet-el kotɨ vae rupi jare Gabaa pegua ko rape rupi; jare oyuka reta treinta rupi kuimbae Israel iñemuña pegua." 
Judges20:32 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta jei: “Ñamoamɨri reta ye tenonde yave rami.” Ërei Israel iñemuña reta jei: “Yatekuarai, mombɨrɨ ñogüɨnoe reta vaerä tëta guasu güi tape rupi.”" 
Judges20:33 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta opaete opüa oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoia güi jare oyeapo kavi reta Baal-tamar pe, jare tëta guasu Gabaa ikupe rupi kapii tëɨa rupi oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi vae ñogüɨnoe vi joko güi." 
Judges20:34 Jare oporepeña reta Gabaa re diez mil kuimbae oyeparavo Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte güi vae. Jare jeiete ñeraro, Benjamín iñemuña reta mbaetɨ oikuaa jaema ko ñamɨri ñogüɨnoi vae." 
Judges20:35 Jare yandeYa omee Israel iñemuña reta pe omoamɨri vaerä Benjamín iñemuña reta, jókuae ara Israel iñemuña reta oyuka veinticinco mil cien kuimbae ñeraro regua reta Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta." 
Judges20:36 Jayave Benjamín iñemuña reta oecha iñamɨri opɨta. Echa Israel iñemuña pegua reta otekuarai ñeraro güi rami oyeapo, oecha yave Benjamín iñemuña reta yogüeru chupe reta, echa oyerovia jókuae oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi tëta Gabaa ikupe rupi vae re." 
Judges20:37 Jókuae kuimbae reta opüa tëta Gabaa re iparanoe jare oyuka kɨsepuku pe opaete tëta guasu pegua. 
Judges20:38 Echa kuimbae oñemi kavi okätɨro ñogüɨnoi tëta ikupe rupi vae reta omombeu Israel iñemuña reta pe ikañɨmaa vaerä tätati ɨvate opüa vae rupi, opɨ̈ro ma yave tëta guasu." 
Judges20:39 Israel iñemuña reta jeiete oñemoñauka Benjamín iñemuña reta pe yave treinta kuimbae rupi omano; jayave jei reta: “Jaema ñamoamɨri tenonde yave rami.” 
Judges20:40 Jökorai yave omboɨpɨ oyekuaa tätati tëta guasu kotɨ, jare Benjamín iñemuña reta omae yave jaɨkue kotɨ oecha reta tätati opüa ɨvate." 
Judges20:41 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta oporepeña jovaicho reta re, jare Benjamín iñemuña reta okɨɨye echa oikuaa reta iñamɨri ma ñogüɨnoi." 
Judges20:42 Otekuarai reta tëi Israel iñemuña reta güi ñuu kotɨ tape ojo vae rupi, ërei mbaetɨ ojoyepe reta, echa tëta opɨ̈ro vae reta ñogüɨnoe vi oövaiti jare opa oyuka." 
Judges20:43 Jökorai opa oimama reta Benjamín iñemuña reta jare oaɨkuemoña opa regua oyuka Menúha güive Gabaa güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ regua. 
Judges20:44 Jare Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta omano dieciocho mil kuimbae ñeraro regua reta. 
Judges20:45 Ïru reta oyerova otekuarai ñuu kotɨ ɨ̈vavira Rimón kotɨ, ërei jókuae osɨi vae reta güi tape rupi opa oyuka cinco mil; Israel iñemuña reta jekuae oaɨkuemoña Gidom kotɨ jare oyuka reta dos mil kuimbae." 
Judges20:46 Benjamín iñemuña reta ñeraro regua omano veinticinco mil kuimbae. 
Judges20:47 Ërei seisciento Benjamín iñemuña reta otekuarai ñuu kotɨ ɨ̈vavira Rimón pe; joko pe yogüɨreko irundɨ yasɨ. 
Judges20:48 Jare Israel iñemuña reta oporepeña ïru Benjamín iñemuña reta re jare oyuka reta kɨsepuku pe opaete kuimbae tëta guasu ñavo, oyuka reve mɨmba ani oipotagüe japerä rupi oïgüe, oapɨ reve tëta guasu reta." 
Judges21:1 Israel iñemuña reta jei yepe Tumpa jee re Mizpa pe, agüɨye vaerä tayɨ reta omaeño omenda Benjamín iñemuña pegua reta ndive." 
Judges21:2 Ërei oyemboatɨ reta Bet-el pe jare ñogüɨnoi reta Tumpa jóvai pɨ̈tu regua, jäse reve oyaeo jare jei reta:" 
Judges21:3 “¡OreYa, Israel iTumpa! ¿Maera pa ko kuae oasa ore ndive? ¿Maera pa oatata metei ñemuña Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte pe?”" 
Judges21:4 Pɨareve pe Israel iñemuña reta opüa ndeimboveasɨ, oyapo reta mɨmba oyeyuka oyeapɨ jese vae jare omee reta mɨmba oyeyukagüe opaetei oyeapɨ vae jare mbota yembopɨakatu pegua." 
Judges21:5 Jare oparandu reta oyoupe: “¿Kia pa yandegüi reta mbaetɨ oï yandepɨte pe yayemboatɨ yave Mizpa pe?” Echa jei reta, añetete oyukata jókuae mbaetɨ oï yemboatɨa pe vae." 
Judges21:6 Ipɨatɨtɨ yae Israel iñemuña reta, jëtara Benjamín iñemuña reta ndive oasa vae re, jare jei reta: “Kuae ara okañɨ Israel iñemuña reta ipɨte güi metei ñemuña." 
Judges21:7 ¿Mbae pa yayapota yandepuere vaerä ñaväe kuña Benjamín iñemuña reta oimeño oikove vae reta peguarä? Echa yande reta yae ma Tumpa jee re agüɨye vaerä yanderayɨ reta omenda jae reta ndive. 
Judges21:8 ¿Oime pa kia nunga Israel iñemuña pegua mbaetɨ ojo yandeYa jóvai Mizpa pe yandeatɨ yave vae?” Jayave imaendúa reta Jabes-galaad pegua reta mbaetɨ metei ave yogüɨraja yemboatɨa pe vae re," 
Judges21:9 echa tee reta oenɨi yave, mbaetɨ etei oyekuaa kia jee jókuae tëta pegua." 
Judges21:10 Jayave opaete vae omondo doce mil kuimbae jëia vae reta oyuka vaerä kɨsepuku pe Jabes-galaad pegua reta, oyuka vi michia reta jare kuña reta, oasa ma kuimbae ndive vae reta." 
Judges21:11  
Judges21:12 Jare Jabes-galaad pegua reta ipɨte pe oväe reta cuatrociento kuñatai ndeiño etei oasa kuimbae ndive vae, jare güeru reta teyupa oï Silo pe, ɨvɨ Canaán pe." 
Judges21:13 Jayave opaete vae reta, omondo oikuaauka Benjamín iñemuña reta ñogüɨnoi ɨ̈vavira Rimón pe vae pe, jare oparea chupe reta yogüeru vaerä iñɨ̈ro chupe reta." 
Judges21:14 Benjamín iñemuña reta yogüeru, jare Israel iñemuña pegua reta omee chupe reta kuña reta Jabes-galaad güi güerugüe. Ërei mbaetɨ oupitɨ opaete peguarä." 
Judges21:15 Jare Israel iñemuña reta pegua reta pe paravete Benjamín iñemuña reta, echa yandeYa omboai metei ñemuña Israel iñemuña reta güi." 
Judges21:16 Jayave tëta pegua tenondegua vae reta jei: “¿Kërai pa yandepuereta ñaväe kuña jókuae oata vae reta peguarä? Echa opa ko omano ikuña reta. 
Judges21:17 Benjamín agüɨye tokañɨ Israel iñemuña ipɨte güi, jókuae oasayepe vae reta rupi, toime Benjamín iñemuña reta Israel iñemuña ipɨte pe." 
Judges21:18 Ërei yande mbaetɨ yandepuere yanderayɨ reta ñamee jembireko retarä; echa opaete yande Israel iñemuña, ñañererökuavee Tumpa jee re agüɨye vaerä ñamee yanderayɨ reta Benjamín iñemuña reta pe, kia omee Benjamín iñemuña reta jembirekorä vae, toiporara." 
Judges21:19 Ërei ngatu oime año ñavo arete tuicha vae oyeapo Silo pe yandeYa peguarä, jae ko Bet-el güi ɨvɨtuguasu kotɨ tape Bet-el güi ojo Siquem kotɨ vae güi kuaraɨ oëa kotɨ, Lebona güi arayevɨ kotɨ.”" 
Judges21:20 Jayave Israel iñemuña itenondegua reta omondo ñee Benjamín iñemuña reta pe, jei: “Pekua peñemi uvarupa rupi köiño Silo güi," 
Judges21:21 jare peïndaivi peï. Jare peecha kuñatai reta ñogüɨnoe opɨrae yave, peë jókuae peñemía güi jare peñomi peävo kuñatai, jare peraja peɨvɨ pe." 
Judges21:22 Jare kuñatai reta tu ani ikɨvɨ reta yogüeru iñeengeta jese oreve yave, roeta chupe: ‘Pomoñera peɨ̈ro vaerä chupe reta, echa ore roñeraro Jabes-galaad pegua reta ndive yave mbaetɨ orepuere roväe kuña opaete peguarä. Jare pe reta mbaetɨ ko pemee chupe reta, penoi vaerä teko jókuae ñererökuavee Tumpa jee re oyeapo vae kotɨ.’ ”" 
Judges21:23 Benjamín iñemuña reta oyapo jókuae jei reta chupe vae, metei ñavo oñomi kuñatai opɨrae ñogüɨnoi vae güi, jare opa yogüɨraja iɨvɨ pe. Jare omopüa ye tëta guasu reta, jare yogüɨreko pɨpe." 
Judges21:24 Jayave Israel iñemuña reta opa vi yogüɨraja ye joko güi, iɨvɨ ae ae pe iñemuña reta pɨri, jëtara ae pɨri." 
Judges21:25 Jókuae ara rupi mbaetɨ vɨteri mburuvicha guasu Israel pe, jare metei vae ñavo oyapo ipɨa jemimbota." 
Ruth1:1 Arakae mburuvicha oporoepɨ vae reta yogüɨreko yave, oiko karuai jókuae ɨvɨ pe, jare metei kuimbae tëta Belén pe oiko vae ɨvɨ Judá pe, ojo oñemoëta ɨvɨ Moab pe jembireko ndive jare mókoi taɨ reta." 
Ruth1:2 Jókuae kuimbae ko jee Elimelec, jare jembireko jee Noemí; jare taɨ reta jee Mahlón jare Quelión, Efrataɨgua reta, jae ko Belén ɨvɨ Judá pe oï vae. Yogüɨraja oväe ɨvɨ Moab pe jare joko pe oñemoëta reta." 
Ruth1:3 Jare omano Elimelec, Noemí ime, jare opɨta mókoi imembɨraɨe reta ndive." 
Ruth1:4 Kuae reta omenda kuña Moab pegua reta ndive; metei jee Orfa jare ïru jee Rut; joko pe yogüɨreko payandepo año. 
Ruth1:5 Jare omano vi Mahlón jare Quelión; jökorai Noemí opɨta iyangarekoambae, imembɨraɨembae jare imembae." 
Ruth1:6 Jayave oyemongeta oyerova ye vaerä imembɨtatɨgüe reta ndive ɨvɨ Moab güi; echa jërakua chupe, Tumpa iporomborɨ rupi oime ye ma tembíu jókuae jëtagüe pe." 
Ruth1:7 Jayave oë jókuae oikosea güi, mókoi reve imembɨtatɨgüe ndive, jare omboɨpɨ reta oguata yogüɨraja vaerä ɨvɨ Judá kotɨ;" 
Ruth1:8 jare Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe reta pe: —Pekua ye pesɨ pɨri; yandeYa togüɨnoi mboroparareko pekotɨ, pe reta peyangarekose chemembɨ amɨri reta re jare cheré rami." 
Ruth1:9 YandeYa tomee peve peiko kavi ye vaerä peme jëta pe. Javoi oovapɨte imembɨtatɨgüe reta, jare jae reta opoko oyaeo," 
Ruth1:10 jare jei reta chupe: —¡Ngaraa! ¡Ore rojota ko nde ndive ndeɨvɨ kotɨ! 
Ruth1:11 Jare Noemí jekuae jei ye: —Pekua ye chemembɨ reta, ¿maera pa peota cherupíe? Mbaetɨta ma che chemembɨ ye ipuere vaerä yogüɨreko pemerä." 
Ruth1:12 Pekua ye chemembɨ reta; echa che, chetɨ̈aro ma ko cheme ye vaerä. Yepe tëi mona jae cheyeupe: Chepuereño amenda ye chemembɨ vaerä," 
Ruth1:13 ¿peärota pa opa okuakuaa regua? ¿Peärota pa pekueraimbae reve jae reta peaɨu jeko pegua? Ngaraa ko pepuere chemembɨ reta; che ko anoi mbɨatɨtɨ tuicha yae pegüi, echa yandeYa ombou cheré aiko vaerä jasɨ katu rupi." 
Ruth1:14 Jare jae reta jekuae oyaeo ye. Jökorai Orfa oñemokɨ̈reɨ oyerova ye vaerä jare oovapɨte imesɨgüe jare ojo, ërei Rut opɨta jae ndive." 
Ruth1:15 Jare Noemí jei chupe: —Mase, ko chemembɨtatɨ oyerova ye ma jëta kotɨ jare itumpa reta kotɨ; nde ekua vi jaɨkue." 
Ruth1:16 Ërei Rut jei chupe: —¡Agüɨye chemoñera roeya vaerä jare asɨrɨ vaerä ndegüi! Nde reoa rupi, che taja, jare kerupi nde reikoa pe, che taiko vi; nerëta toiko cherëtarä, jare neTumpa toiko vi cheTumparä." 
Ruth1:17 Nde remanoa pe, che tamano jare joko pe tañeotɨuka; yandeYa täta toiporarauka cheve asɨrɨ ko ndegüi yave, jaeño mano ipuere yandembosɨrɨ oyougüi." 
Ruth1:18 Jayave Noemí oecha Rut ikɨ̈reɨ yae ojo jupíe, jókuae güire mbaetɨ ye mbae jei chupe," 
Ruth1:19 jayave mókoi reve yogüɨraja Belén kotɨ. Jare opa ma yogüɨraja oväe Belén pe yave, opaete tëta guasu pegua reta ipɨakañɨ, jae ou oväe jeko pegua, jare jei reta: —¿Jaeä pa ko kuae Noemí?" 
Ruth1:20 Jare Noemí jei chupe reta: —Agüɨye mo chereenɨi Noemí pe, chereenɨi Mara pe, echa Imbaepuere yae ete vae cheñono mbɨatɨtɨ tuicha yae pe." 
Ruth1:21 Che aja kuae güi yerovia ndive, ërei yandeYa chemboyerova ye chepogüɨrai. ¿Maera pa chereenɨita Noemí pe? Echa ko Imbaepuere yae ete vae oiporarauka cheve jare chembopɨatɨtɨuka." 
Ruth1:22 Körai Noemí oyerova ye ɨvɨ Moab güi imembɨtatɨgüe Rut ndive; jare yogüeru oväe Belén pe, cebada oyemboɨpɨ ma oyepoo yave." 
Ruth2:1 Noemí güɨnoi ime amɨri Elimelec jëtaragüe, kuimbae oikokatu vae, jae ko jee Booz." 
Ruth2:2 Metei ara Rut Moab pegua jei Noemí pe: —Romoñera remaeño vaerä aja kó pe ayevɨka, jókuae ipɨakavita omae cheré vae reta jaɨkue. —Ekuaño chemembɨ —jei chupe imesɨgüe." 
Ruth2:3 Jayave ojo, jare ojo ma oväe yave omboɨpɨ oyevɨka ombaepoo vae reta jaɨkue; jare jókuae kó iya yepe jae Booz, Elimelec amɨri jëtara." 
Ruth2:4 Jókuae ara etei Booz ou oväe Belén güi, jare ombaepoo vae reta pe jei: —¡YandeYa toï pe ndive! Jare jae reta jei chupe: —¡YandeYa tiporerekua nderé!" 
Ruth2:5 Jare Booz jei jembiokuai ombaepoo vae reta itenondegua pe: —¿Kia jëtara pa kuae kuñatai? 
Ruth2:6 Jare tembiokuai, ombaepoo vae reta itenondegua jei: —Jae ko kuñatai Moab pegua, Noemí ndive ou ɨvɨ Moab kotɨ güi vae." 
Ruth2:7 Jae jei cheve: “Romoñera remaeño vaerä ayevɨka jare amboatɨ ombaepoo vae reta jaɨkue.” Jare oike ndeimbove güive kuae ora regua oputuumbae etei michi pegua yepe. 
Ruth2:8 Jayave Booz jei Rut pe: —Eyeapɨsaka, agüɨye ekua eyevɨka ïru kó rupi, agüɨye ave easa kuae güi; jare kuae pe eï cherembiokuai kuña reta ndive," 
Ruth2:9 emae kavi kia kó pe ma ombaepoo vae reta ñogüɨnoi vae re jare ekua jaɨkue reta; echa ayókuai ma tembiokuai reta agüɨye vaerä mbae jei ndeve jare ndeɨuve yave, ekua ɨrɨru reta ñogüɨnoia pe jare eɨu jókuae tembiokuai reta güɨnoegüe güi." 
Ruth2:10 Jayave jae itindɨasɨ ɨvɨ re, jare jei chupe: —¿Maera pa ndepɨakavi remae chekotɨ, ketɨgua che reve?" 
Ruth2:11 Jare Booz jei chupe: —Aikuaa opaete reyapo nemesɨgüe ndive, neme omano güire vae re, jare reeya nderu jare ndesɨ jare ɨvɨ rea pɨpe vae, jare reyu reiko tëta nde reikuaambae vae pe." 
Ruth2:12 ¡YandeYa tomboekovia ndeve opaete nderembiapo rupi! ¡Jare tandeangareko yandeYa Tumpa Israel pegua, kërai reyu reñepɨ̈ro jese vae!" 
Ruth2:13 Jare jae jei: —Cheya, taväe ndegüi ndepɨakavi; echa chembopɨakatu, jare ndepɨa yerovia reve chemomiari nderembiokuai rami, yepe tëi nderembiokuaiä che." 
Ruth2:14 Jare Booz jei chupe, jaema okaru retata yave: —Eyu kuae pe jeu mbɨyape jare emoäkɨ ndeyeupe vinagre pe. Jare jae ou oguapɨ ombaepoo vae reta iyɨpɨ pe, jare Booz omee chupe mbae (cebada) jäɨ oyeimbegüe, jare jou jɨ̈vɨata regua jare jembɨre chupe." 
Ruth2:15 Javoi opüa ye oyevɨka vaerä. Jare Booz oyókuai jembiokuai reta jei reve: —Toyevɨka vi oyeokuagüe reta ipɨte rupi jare agüɨye pemomaraiuka; 
Ruth2:16 jare pemaeñota vi oa chupe mbovɨ katu mi, pe peyokuata vae güi, jae omonoo vaerä, ¡jare agüɨye peñeengeta chupe!" 
Ruth2:17 Jayave oyevɨka kó pe pɨ̈tu regua, jare oyɨkɨi cebada jókuae oyevɨkagüe jare oë chupe veinte kilo oasa." 
Ruth2:18 Jare ojo ye tëta guasu kotɨ ivoɨta ndive; jare imesɨgüe oecha kuae oyevɨkagüe, javoi güɨnoe vi jókuae omonagüe jare omee chupe." 
Ruth2:19 Jare imesɨgüe oparandu chupe: —¿Kia pe pa reyevɨka añave? ¿Kia pe pa jeta mbatee reyevɨka? ¡Toiko kavi jókuae ndeparareko vae! Jare Rut imiari imesɨgüe pe, kia iko pe ko oparavɨkɨ vae; jare jei chupe: —Jókuae kuimbae iko pe kuae ara aparavɨkɨ vae jee Booz." 
Ruth2:20 Jare Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe pe: —¡YandeYa tiporerekua jese! Jae ipɨakavi yandeve añave, opa ma omano vae reta pe ipɨakavi rami. Jókuae kuimbae jae ko orerëtara, jae güɨnoita mbaepuere yandemboepɨ vaerä." 
Ruth2:21 Jare Rut Moab pegua jei: —Javoi jei vi cheve: Eyea cherembiokuai kuña reta ndive, kuae cheko pe opa regua mbaarɨvo." 
Ruth2:22 Jayave Noemí jei imembɨtatɨgüe pe: —Ikavi yae ko chemembɨ, repɨta vaerä jembiokuai kuña reta ndive, agüɨye vaerä reo ïru kó rupi, agüɨye vaerä metei ave mbae jei ndeve." 
Ruth2:23 Jayave jekuaeño opɨta Booz jembiokuai kuña reta ndive oyevɨka vaerä, opa regua oyepoo cebada jare trigo; jare jekuaeño oiko imesɨgüe ndive." 
Ruth3:1 Jókuae güire Noemí jei Rut pe: —Chemembɨ, che taeka nemerä, reiko kavi vaerä." 
Ruth3:2 Booz jae ko orerëtara, jembiokuai kuña reta ndive nde reiko vae, kuae pɨ̈tu ojota kó pe ombaemboveve, omboyao vaerä cebada ipiregüe güi." 
Ruth3:3 Jayave eyau, eñemokäti kavi, jare emonde nderemimonde ikavi vae, jare ekua jokotɨ mbaembopiriría renda pe; ërei agüɨye eyeechauka chupe, jae opa regua okaru jare oɨu." 
Ruth3:4 Jare emae kavi jese ketɨ ra oyapakuata oke vae, javoi ekua eipea itɨma, jare eyapakua joko pe; jare jae jeita ndeve mbae ko reyapota vae." 
Ruth3:5 Jare Rut jei chupe: —Tayapo opaete nde cheokuai vae. 
Ruth3:6 Jayave ojo kó kotɨ jare oyapo opaete imesɨgüe oyókuai rami. 
Ruth3:7 Jare Booz opa ma okaru jare oɨu yave, oyerovia katu reve ojo oyapakua oke mbaeatɨ iyɨpɨ pe. Jayave Rut kïrii ngatu ou oipea chugüi itɨma jare oyapakua joko pe." 
Ruth3:8 Jare pɨare mbɨte ma yave, jókuae kuimbae güɨramoiño osareko jare oyere yave oñeiämondo, echa metei kuña oyapakua oï itɨma rupi." 
Ruth3:9 Jayave Booz oparandu chupe: —¿Kia pa nde? Jare Rut jei chupe: —Che ko Rut nderembiokuai, nde ko cheme amɨri jëtaragüe, emenda che ndive." 
Ruth3:10 Jayave Booz jei: —¡YandeYa tiporerekua nderé! Ikavi vae ko reyapo tenonde reyapo vae güi. Ndepuere tëi reeka kuimbae taɨrusu vae, oikokatu vae ani ramo paravete vae." 
Ruth3:11 Ërei, añave agüɨye ekɨɨye; tayapo nde ndive nde rere vae, echa opaete cherëtaɨgua reta oikuaa nde ko jae metei kuña jeko kavi yae vae." 
Ruth3:12 Mase, añete che ko jae jókuae kuimbae jëtara, ërei oime ko ïru ma köiño chugüi vae." 
Ruth3:13 Añave neköe kuae pe, pɨareve yaikuaata jae oipotata ra ndemboepɨ vae, oipota yave tandemboepɨ; ërei mbaetɨ yave oipota ndemboepɨ, che romboepɨta. YandeYa jee re kuae jae ndeve, añave eputuu köe regua." 
Ruth3:14 Jare oke güire itɨma rupi köe regua, Booz opüa ndei köe kavi mbove; echa jei: “Agüɨye toikuaa metei ave, kuae kuña ou ko kuae kó pe vae.”" 
Ruth3:15 Javoi jei chupe: —Eru reñeapeva pɨpe vae, jare eipɨɨ. Jare jae oipɨɨ ramboeve, Booz oñono pɨpe cebada cuarenta kilo oasa, javoi ombovoɨ; jare ojo tëta guasu kotɨ." 
Ruth3:16 Jare ou ye ma oväe yave, imesɨgüe oparandu chupe: —¿Kërai pa reguata chemembɨ? Jare omombeu chupe opaete jókuae kuimbae ndive imiari vae." 
Ruth3:17 Jare jei: —Kuae cebada omee cheve, jei cheve reve: “Agüɨye vaerä ndepogüɨrai reyerova ye nemesɨgüe kotɨ.”" 
Ruth3:18 Jayave Noemí jei: —Chemembɨ, eäro añave, yaikuaa regua këraita ra oyeapo kuae teko vae; echa jókuae kuimbae ngaraa ikuérai opa oyapo kavi regua kuae teko." 
Ruth4:1 Jayave Booz ojo oguapɨ tëta guasu jöke yemboatɨa renda pe; jare ko ou jókuae kuimbae, Booz imiari jese vae, jare jei chupe: —Eyu räri kuae pe jare eguapɨ. Jare jókuae kuimbae ou oguapɨ." 
Ruth4:2 Jayave jae oenɨi payandepo kuimbae reta, tëta guasu pegua tenondegua reta jare jei: —Peguapɨ kuae pe. Jare jókuae kuimbae reta oguapɨ." 
Ruth4:3 Javoi Booz jei jókuae jëtara pe: —Noemí ou ye ɨvɨ Moab güi vae, omeeta ñanerëtara Elimelec amɨri iɨvɨ." 
Ruth4:4 Jare ayemongeta aikuaauka vaerä ndeve, jare amombeu ndeve, regua vaerä, kuae pe oguapɨ ñogüɨnoi vae reta jovake, jare cherëta pegua tenondegua reta jovake; nde reipota remboepɨ yave, emboepɨ, jare mbaetɨ yave reipota remboepɨ, emombeu cheve, che aikuaa vaerä; echa mbaetɨ yé ïru omboepɨ vaerä, jaeño nde, jare che nderaɨkue rupi. Jare jae jei chupe: —Che tamboepɨ." 
Ruth4:5 Jayave Booz jei ye chupe: —Ɨvɨ regua yave Noemí güi, jókuae ara rerekota vi ko Rut Moab pegua, omano vae jembirekogüe, jókuae ɨvɨ oiko vaerä omano vae jee reño." 
Ruth4:6 Jayave Booz jëtara jei: —Jökorai ko yave, mbaetɨta amboepɨ, agüɨye vaerä arokomegua chembaeyekou. Nde emboepɨ; tamboasa ndeve, echa mbaetɨta chepuere amboepɨ." 
Ruth4:7 Jókuae ara rupi Israel pe teko jae ko, oñoëtara vae omboasa yave mbae oyoupe ani ramo mbae omee oyoupe yave, omoañete vaerä oipotagüe yemongeta, jókuae omee vae omboi ipɨapaa jare omee jókuae ogua vae pe; körai kuae nunga oyeapo Israel pe, yemongeta oñemoañete vaerä." 
Ruth4:8 Jayave Booz jëtara jei: —Nde egua. Jare omboi ipɨapaa omee chupe. 
Ruth4:9 Jare Booz jei tenondegua reta pe jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta pe: —Opaete perovake ayapo kuae; Noemí güi agua aï opaete Elimelec amɨri iɨvɨ jare opaete Quelión jare Mahlón imbae. 
Ruth4:10 Jare arekota vi cherembirekorä Rut, Moab pegua, Mahlón amɨri jembirekogüe; jókuae ɨvɨ oiko vaerä omano vae jee reño, agüɨye vaerä jókuae omano vae jee oyemboai jëtara ipɨte güi jare iɨvɨ güi." 
Ruth4:11 Jare tenondegua reta jare opaete joko pe ñogüɨnoi vae reta jei: —Orerovake ko reyapo. ¡YandeYa toyapo ndeve jókuae kuña oiketa ndero pe vae Raquel jare Lea rami, kuae reta güi oñemuña tëta Israel! Jare nde eiko kuimbae tuicha yae vae Efrata pe, jare jërakua vae Belén pe." 
Ruth4:12 Jare neñemuña toiko Fares iñemuña rami. Fares ko jae Tamar imembɨ, Judá taɨ; jókuae kuñatai rupi yandeYa tomee neñemuñarä." 
Ruth4:13 Booz güɨreko Rut, jare yandeYa omee ipurúa vaerä Booz pe jare imembɨ metei kunumi raɨ." 
Ruth4:14 Jare kuña reta jei Noemí pe: —Toyemboeteuka yandeYa, jae omee ndeve neramarirorä, kuae jee jërakua yaeta Israel pe;" 
Ruth4:15 kuae oikota ndemoingove katu vaerä jare ndeangareko vaerä netɨ̈aro yae ma yave; echa nemembɨtatɨgüe nderaɨu yae vae imembɨ ko, Rut iporomborɨ ko ndeveguarä ikavi yae ete, renoi yave chiu nemembɨraɨe reta güi." 
Ruth4:16 Jare Noemí oipɨɨ michia raɨ, jare oñono jäpapau pe, jare oyangareko jese ombokuakuaa regua." 
Ruth4:17 Jare jëta iyɨpɨ pegua reta ombojee, jei reta reve: —¡Noemí pe oa metei kunumi! Jare ombojee reta Obed. Kuae ko jae Isaí tu, David tamɨi." 
Ruth4:18 Kuae ko jae Fares iñemuña reta: Fares taɨ jae ko Hezrón; 
Ruth4:19 Hezrón taɨ ko Ram, jare Ram taɨ ko Aminadab;" 
Ruth4:20 Aminadab taɨ ko Naasón; Naasón taɨ ko Salmón; 
Ruth4:21 Salmón taɨ ko Booz; Booz taɨ ko Obed; 
Ruth4:22 Obed taɨ ko Isaí; jare Isaí taɨ, jae David." 
1Samuel1:1 Oiko metei kuimbae Ramataim Zofim pegua pe, ɨvɨtɨ Efraín pe, Elcana jee vae, jae ko Jeroham taɨ, Jeroham jae ko Eliú taɨ, Eliú jae ko Tohu taɨ, Tohu jae ko Zuf taɨ, Efraín iñemuña pegua." 
1Samuel1:2 Jare Elcana mókoi jembireko. Metei jee Ana, ïru jee Penina. Jare Penina oime imembɨ reta, ërei Ana mbaetɨ imembɨ." 
1Samuel1:3 Año ñavo jókuae kuimbae ojo jëta güi tëta Silo jee vae pe ombaemboete vaerä jare omee vaerä mɨmba oyeyukagüe yandeYa imbaepuere yae ete vae pe. Jókuae mókoi Elí taɨ yogüɨrekoa pe, Ofni jare Finees, yandeYa isacerdote."
